1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"fmt"
     5→	"math"
     6→	"math/rand"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/exec"
     9→	"runtime"
    10→	"sort"
    11→	"strconv"
    12→	"strings"
    13→	"syscall"
    14→	"time"
    15→
    16→	"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/key"
    17→	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
    18→	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
    19→)
    20→
    21→type errMsg error
    22→
    23→type processData struct {
    24→	processes   []Process
    25→	systemStats SystemStats
    26→	lastUpdate  time.Time
    27→}
    28→
    29→type model struct {
    30→	width    int
    31→	height   int
    32→	frame    int
    33→	quitting bool
    34→	err      error
    35→
    36→	viewMode string
    37→
    38→	// Theme management
    39→	themeManager *ThemeManager
    40→
    41→	// View management
    42→	viewRouter   *ViewRouter
    43→	settingsPage *SettingsPageModel
    44→	aiAssistant  *AIAssistantModel
    45→
    46→	processes     []Process
    47→	systemStats   SystemStats
    48→	selectedRow   int
    49→	sortColumn    string
    50→	sortReverse   bool
    51→	searchMode    bool
    52→	searchQuery   string
    53→	filteredProcs []Process
    54→	scrollOffset  int
    55→
    56→	connections    []NetworkConnection
    57→	interfaces     []NetworkInterface
    58→	networkTraffic []float64
    59→	bandwidthIn    []float64
    60→	bandwidthOut   []float64
    61→
    62→	alerts            []SystemAlert
    63→	alertScrollOffset int
    64→
    65→	showKillDialog bool
    66→	killPID        int
    67→	selectedPanel  int
    68→
    69→	// Enhanced visual effects
    70→	orbs          []orb
    71→	lightRays     []lightRay
    72→	matrixRain    []matrixDrop
    73→	energyField   []energyNode
    74→	cpuHistory    [][]float64
    75→	memHistory    []float64
    76→	glowIntensity float64
    77→	pulsePhase    float64
    78→}
    79→
    80→// getThemeColors returns current theme colors
    81→func (m model) getThemeColors() map[string]lipgloss.Color {
    82→	return m.themeManager.GetLipglossColors()
    83→}
    84→
    85→// Legacy color variables for backward compatibility
    86→var (
    87→	// These will be updated by the theme system
    88→	primary   = lipgloss.Color("#6366f1") // Indigo
    89→	secondary = lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6") // Violet
    90→	accent    = lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4") // Cyan
    91→	success   = lipgloss.Color("#10b981") // Emerald
    92→	warning   = lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b") // Amber
    93→	danger    = lipgloss.Color("#ef4444") // Red
    94→
    95→	// Background and text
    96→	bg        = lipgloss.Color("#0f0f23") // Deep space blue
    97→	bgLight   = lipgloss.Color("#1e1e3f") // Lighter background
    98→	text      = lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0") // Light gray
    99→	textMuted = lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8") // Muted gray
   100→	textFaint = lipgloss.Color("#64748b") // Faint gray
   101→
   102→	// Special effects
   103→	glow  = lipgloss.Color("#3b82f6") // Blue glow
   104→	pulse = lipgloss.Color("#ec4899") // Pink pulse
   105→)
   106→
   107→var (
   108→	quitKeys   = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("q", "ctrl+c"), key.WithHelp("", "quit"))
   109→	killKeys   = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("k"), key.WithHelp("", "kill process"))
   110→	searchKeys = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("/"), key.WithHelp("", "search"))
   111→	tabKeys    = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("tab"), key.WithHelp("", "switch view"))
   112→)
   113→
   114→func initialModel() model {
   115→	numCores := runtime.NumCPU()
   116→
   117→	// Initialize theme manager
   118→	themeManager := NewThemeManager()
   119→	themeManager.LoadCurrentTheme()
   120→
   121→	// Initialize view management system
   122→	viewRouter := NewViewRouter()
   123→	settingsPage := NewSettingsPageModel(themeManager)
   124→	aiAssistant := NewAIAssistantModel()
   125→
   126→	// Register components with the view manager
   127→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewSettings, settingsPage)
   128→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewAIAssistant, aiAssistant)
   129→
   130→	m := model{
   131→		viewMode:       "overview",
   132→		themeManager:   themeManager,
   133→		viewRouter:     viewRouter,
   134→		settingsPage:   settingsPage,
   135→		aiAssistant:    aiAssistant,
   136→		orbs:           make([]orb, 8),
   137→		lightRays:      make([]lightRay, 12),
   138→		matrixRain:     make([]matrixDrop, 20),
   139→		energyField:    make([]energyNode, 15),
   140→		cpuHistory:     make([][]float64, numCores),
   141→		memHistory:     make([]float64, 60),
   142→		bandwidthIn:    make([]float64, 60),
   143→		bandwidthOut:   make([]float64, 60),
   144→		networkTraffic: make([]float64, 60),
   145→		sortColumn:     "CPU",
   146→		sortReverse:    true,
   147→		selectedRow:    0,
   148→		scrollOffset:   0,
   149→		selectedPanel:  0,
   150→		glowIntensity:  0.5,
   151→		pulsePhase:     0,
   152→	}
   153→
   154→	// Initialize CPU history
   155→	for i := range m.cpuHistory {
   156→		m.cpuHistory[i] = make([]float64, 60)
   157→	}
   158→
   159→	// Initialize elegant floating orbs
   160→	colors := []lipgloss.Color{primary, secondary, accent, success, warning}
   161→	for i := range m.orbs {
   162→		m.orbs[i] = orb{
   163→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   164→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   165→			vx:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.2,
   166→			vy:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.15,
   167→			radius:      rand.Float64()*2 + 1,
   168→			intensity:   rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   169→			color:       colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   170→			pulsePeriod: rand.Float64()*4 + 2,
   171→			pulseOffset: rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   172→		}
   173→	}
   174→
   175→	// Initialize light rays
   176→	for i := range m.lightRays {
   177→		m.lightRays[i] = lightRay{
   178→			x:         rand.Float64() * 120,
   179→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   180→			angle:     rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   181→			length:    rand.Float64()*15 + 5,
   182→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.6 + 0.1,
   183→			color:     colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   184→		}
   185→	}
   186→
   187→	// Initialize matrix rain
   188→	chars := []rune("ﾊﾐﾋｰｳｼﾅﾓﾆｻﾜﾂｵﾘｱﾎﾃﾏｹﾒｴｶｷﾑﾕﾗｾﾈｽﾀﾇﾍ0123456789")
   189→	for i := range m.matrixRain {
   190→		m.matrixRain[i] = matrixDrop{
   191→			x:         float64(rand.Intn(120)),
   192→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   193→			speed:     rand.Float64()*0.3 + 0.1,
   194→			length:    rand.Intn(8) + 3,
   195→			chars:     make([]rune, rand.Intn(8)+3),
   196→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.7 + 0.3,
   197→		}
   198→		for j := range m.matrixRain[i].chars {
   199→			m.matrixRain[i].chars[j] = chars[rand.Intn(len(chars))]
   200→		}
   201→	}
   202→
   203→	// Initialize global colors from theme
   204→	m.updateGlobalColors()
   205→
   206→	// Initialize energy field
   207→	for i := range m.energyField {
   208→		connections := make([]int, 0)
   209→		// Connect to 1-3 random other nodes
   210→		numConnections := rand.Intn(3) + 1
   211→		for j := 0; j < numConnections; j++ {
   212→			target := rand.Intn(len(m.energyField))
   213→			if target != i {
   214→				connections = append(connections, target)
   215→			}
   216→		}
   217→
   218→		m.energyField[i] = energyNode{
   219→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   220→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   221→			connections: connections,
   222→			pulsePhase:  rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   223→			energy:      rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   224→		}
   225→	}
   226→
   227→	return m
   228→}
   229→
   230→func (m model) Init() tea.Cmd {
   231→	return tea.Batch(
   232→		tea.EnterAltScreen,
   233→		tick(),
   234→		fetchProcesses(),
   235→		fetchNetworkData(),
   236→		fetchSystemAlerts(),
   237→	)
   238→}
   239→
   240→func tick() tea.Cmd {
   241→	return tea.Tick(time.Millisecond*50, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
   242→		return tickMsg(t)
   243→	})
   244→}
   245→
   246→func fetchProcesses() tea.Cmd {
   247→	return func() tea.Msg {
   248→		processes, stats := getProcessesAndStats()
   249→		return processData{
   250→			processes:   processes,
   251→			systemStats: stats,
   252→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   253→		}
   254→	}
   255→}
   256→
   257→type networkData struct {
   258→	connections []NetworkConnection
   259→	interfaces  []NetworkInterface
   260→	lastUpdate  time.Time
   261→}
   262→
   263→type alertData struct {
   264→	alerts     []SystemAlert
   265→	lastUpdate time.Time
   266→}
   267→
   268→func fetchNetworkData() tea.Cmd {
   269→	return func() tea.Msg {
   270→		connections := getNetworkConnections()
   271→		interfaces := getNetworkInterfaces()
   272→		return networkData{
   273→			connections: connections,
   274→			interfaces:  interfaces,
   275→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   276→		}
   277→	}
   278→}
   279→
   280→func fetchSystemAlerts() tea.Cmd {
   281→	return func() tea.Msg {
   282→		alerts := getSystemAlerts()
   283→		return alertData{
   284→			alerts:     alerts,
   285→			lastUpdate: time.Now(),
   286→		}
   287→	}
   288→}
   289→
   290→func (m model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
   291→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   292→	case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
   293→		m.width = msg.Width
   294→		m.height = msg.Height
   295→
   296→		// Update component sizes
   297→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   298→			m.settingsPage.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   299→		}
   300→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   301→			m.aiAssistant.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   302→		}
   303→
   304→		return m, nil
   305→
   306→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   307→		if m.showKillDialog {
   308→			switch msg.String() {
   309→			case "y", "Y":
   310→				killProcess(m.killPID)
   311→				m.showKillDialog = false
   312→				return m, fetchProcesses()
   313→			case "n", "N", "esc":
   314→				m.showKillDialog = false
   315→				return m, nil
   316→			}
   317→			return m, nil
   318→		}
   319→
   320→		if m.searchMode {
   321→			switch msg.String() {
   322→			case "esc":
   323→				m.searchMode = false
   324→				m.searchQuery = ""
   325→				m.filteredProcs = m.processes
   326→				return m, nil
   327→			case "enter":
   328→				m.searchMode = false
   329→				return m, nil
   330→			case "backspace":
   331→				if len(m.searchQuery) > 0 {
   332→					m.searchQuery = m.searchQuery[:len(m.searchQuery)-1]
   333→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   334→				}
   335→				return m, nil
   336→			default:
   337→				if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   338→					m.searchQuery += msg.String()
   339→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   340→				}
   341→				return m, nil
   342→			}
   343→		}
   344→
   345→		switch {
   346→		case key.Matches(msg, quitKeys):
   347→			m.quitting = true
   348→			return m, tea.Quit
   349→
   350→		case key.Matches(msg, tabKeys):
   351→			modes := []string{"overview", "processes", "network", "alerts", "settings", "ai"}
   352→			currentIndex := 0
   353→			for i, mode := range modes {
   354→				if mode == m.viewMode {
   355→					currentIndex = i
   356→					break
   357→				}
   358→			}
   359→			newMode := modes[(currentIndex+1)%len(modes)]
   360→			m.viewMode = newMode
   361→
   362→			// Handle component activation/deactivation
   363→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   364→			if newMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil {
   365→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   366→			} else if newMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil {
   367→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   368→			}
   369→
   370→			m.selectedRow = 0
   371→			m.scrollOffset = 0
   372→			return m, nil
   373→
   374→		case msg.String() == "1":
   375→			m.viewMode = "overview"
   376→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   377→			return m, nil
   378→		case msg.String() == "2":
   379→			m.viewMode = "processes"
   380→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   381→			return m, nil
   382→		case msg.String() == "3":
   383→			m.viewMode = "network"
   384→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   385→			return m, nil
   386→		case msg.String() == "4":
   387→			m.viewMode = "alerts"
   388→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   389→			return m, nil
   390→		case msg.String() == "5":
   391→			m.viewMode = "settings"
   392→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   393→			if m.settingsPage != nil {
   394→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   395→			}
   396→			return m, nil
   397→		case msg.String() == "6":
   398→			m.viewMode = "ai"
   399→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   400→			if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   401→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   402→			}
   403→			return m, nil
   404→		case msg.String() == "!":
   405→			m.viewMode = "bash"
   406→			return m, nil
   407→		case msg.String() == "t":
   408→			// Cycle through themes
   409→			return m.cycleTheme()
   410→
   411→		case key.Matches(msg, killKeys):
   412→			if m.viewMode == "processes" && len(m.filteredProcs) > 0 && m.selectedRow < len(m.filteredProcs) {
   413→				m.killPID = m.filteredProcs[m.selectedRow].PID
   414→				m.showKillDialog = true
   415→			}
   416→			return m, nil
   417→
   418→		case key.Matches(msg, searchKeys):
   419→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   420→				m.searchMode = true
   421→				m.searchQuery = ""
   422→			}
   423→			return m, nil
   424→
   425→		case msg.String() == "up", msg.String() == "k":
   426→			if m.selectedRow > 0 {
   427→				m.selectedRow--
   428→				if m.selectedRow < m.scrollOffset {
   429→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow
   430→				}
   431→			}
   432→			return m, nil
   433→
   434→		case msg.String() == "down", msg.String() == "j":
   435→			maxItems := 0
   436→			switch m.viewMode {
   437→			case "processes":
   438→				maxItems = len(m.filteredProcs)
   439→			case "network":
   440→				maxItems = len(m.connections)
   441→			case "alerts":
   442→				maxItems = len(m.alerts)
   443→			}
   444→
   445→			if m.selectedRow < maxItems-1 {
   446→				m.selectedRow++
   447→				visibleRows := m.height - 15
   448→				if m.selectedRow >= m.scrollOffset+visibleRows {
   449→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow - visibleRows + 1
   450→				}
   451→			}
   452→			return m, nil
   453→
   454→		case msg.String() == "c":
   455→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   456→				m.sortColumn = "CPU"
   457→				m.sortProcesses()
   458→			}
   459→			return m, nil
   460→
   461→		case msg.String() == "m":
   462→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   463→				m.sortColumn = "Memory"
   464→				m.sortProcesses()
   465→			}
   466→			return m, nil
   467→
   468→		case msg.String() == "p":
   469→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   470→				m.sortColumn = "PID"
   471→				m.sortProcesses()
   472→			}
   473→			return m, nil
   474→		}
   475→
   476→		// Route messages to active components
   477→		if m.viewMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil && m.settingsPage.IsActive() {
   478→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.settingsPage.Update(msg)
   479→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   480→				m.settingsPage = updatedComponent.(*SettingsPageModel)
   481→			}
   482→			if cmd != nil {
   483→				return m, cmd
   484→			}
   485→		}
   486→
   487→		if m.viewMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil && m.aiAssistant.IsActive() {
   488→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.aiAssistant.Update(msg)
   489→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   490→				m.aiAssistant = updatedComponent.(*AIAssistantModel)
   491→			}
   492→			if cmd != nil {
   493→				return m, cmd
   494→			}
   495→		}
   496→
   497→		return m, nil
   498→
   499→	case tickMsg:
   500→		m.frame++
   501→		m.pulsePhase += 0.05
   502→		m.glowIntensity = 0.3 + 0.2*math.Sin(m.pulsePhase)
   503→
   504→		// Update elegant orbs
   505→		for i := range m.orbs {
   506→			orb := &m.orbs[i]
   507→			orb.x += orb.vx
   508→			orb.y += orb.vy
   509→
   510→			// Gentle bouncing with smooth curves
   511→			if orb.x <= 0 || orb.x >= 120 {
   512→				orb.vx *= -0.8
   513→				orb.x = math.Max(0, math.Min(120, orb.x))
   514→			}
   515→			if orb.y <= 0 || orb.y >= 40 {
   516→				orb.vy *= -0.8
   517→				orb.y = math.Max(0, math.Min(40, orb.y))
   518→			}
   519→
   520→			// Update pulse
   521→			orb.intensity = 0.3 + 0.5*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.02*orb.pulsePeriod+orb.pulseOffset)
   522→		}
   523→
   524→		// Update light rays
   525→		for i := range m.lightRays {
   526→			ray := &m.lightRays[i]
   527→			ray.angle += 0.01
   528→			ray.intensity = 0.2 + 0.4*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.03+float64(i))
   529→		}
   530→
   531→		// Update matrix rain
   532→		for i := range m.matrixRain {
   533→			drop := &m.matrixRain[i]
   534→			drop.y += drop.speed
   535→			if drop.y > 40 {
   536→				drop.y = -float64(drop.length)
   537→				drop.x = float64(rand.Intn(120))
   538→			}
   539→		}
   540→
   541→		// Update energy field
   542→		for i := range m.energyField {
   543→			node := &m.energyField[i]
   544→			node.pulsePhase += 0.02
   545→			node.energy = 0.4 + 0.4*math.Sin(node.pulsePhase)
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		// Fetch new data periodically
   549→		var cmds []tea.Cmd
   550→		if m.frame%40 == 0 { // 2 seconds
   551→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchProcesses())
   552→		}
   553→		if m.frame%50 == 0 { // 2.5 seconds
   554→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchNetworkData())
   555→		}
   556→		if m.frame%80 == 0 { // 4 seconds
   557→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchSystemAlerts())
   558→		}
   559→
   560→		cmds = append(cmds, tick())
   561→		return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   562→
   563→	case processData:
   564→		m.processes = msg.processes
   565→		m.systemStats = msg.systemStats
   566→
   567→		// Update histories smoothly
   568→		for i, usage := range msg.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   569→			if i < len(m.cpuHistory) {
   570→				m.cpuHistory[i] = append(m.cpuHistory[i][1:], usage)
   571→			}
   572→		}
   573→
   574→		memUsagePercent := float64(msg.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(msg.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   575→		m.memHistory = append(m.memHistory[1:], memUsagePercent)
   576→
   577→		m.sortProcesses()
   578→		m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   579→
   580→		if m.selectedRow >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
   581→			m.selectedRow = max(0, len(m.filteredProcs)-1)
   582→		}
   583→
   584→		return m, nil
   585→
   586→	case networkData:
   587→		m.connections = msg.connections
   588→		m.interfaces = msg.interfaces
   589→
   590→		// Update network traffic history
   591→		totalTraffic := 0.0
   592→		for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
   593→			totalTraffic += float64(iface.BytesIn+iface.BytesOut) / 1024 / 1024 // MB
   594→		}
   595→		m.networkTraffic = append(m.networkTraffic[1:], totalTraffic)
   596→
   597→		return m, nil
   598→
   599→	case alertData:
   600→		m.alerts = msg.alerts
   601→		return m, nil
   602→
   603→	case errMsg:
   604→		m.err = msg
   605→		return m, nil
   606→	}
   607→
   608→	return m, nil
   609→}
   610→
   611→func (m model) View() string {
   612→	if m.quitting {
   613→		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
   614→			Foreground(primary).
   615→			Align(lipgloss.Center).
   616→			Render("Disconnecting from the matrix...\n")
   617→	}
   618→
   619→	if m.width == 0 || m.height == 0 {
   620→		return "Initializing elegant interface..."
   621→	}
   622→
   623→	// Create main layout
   624→	header := m.renderHeader()
   625→	tabs := m.renderViewTabs()
   626→	content := m.renderContent()
   627→	controls := m.renderControls()
   628→
   629→	// Add subtle background effects
   630→	bg := m.renderBackgroundEffects()
   631→
   632→	layout := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   633→		header,
   634→		tabs,
   635→		content,
   636→		controls,
   637→	)
   638→
   639→	// Overlay background effects
   640→	return m.overlayEffects(layout, bg)
   641→}

   643→func (m model) renderHeader() string {

   645→
   646→	titleStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   647→		Foreground(primary).
   648→		Bold(true).
   649→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   650→		Width(m.width)
   651→
   652→	// Add subtle glow effect
   653→	glowStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   654→		Foreground(glow).
   655→		Faint(true).
   656→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   657→		Width(m.width)
   658→
   659→	time := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   660→		Foreground(textMuted).
   661→		Align(lipgloss.Right).
   662→		Width(m.width).

   664→
   665→	return lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   666→		glowStyle.Render("═══════════════════════════════════════"),
   667→		titleStyle.Render(title),

   669→		time,
   670→		"",
   671→	)

   674→func (m model) renderViewTabs() string {
   675→	tabs := []struct {
   676→		key   string
   677→		name  string
   678→		icon  string
   679→		color lipgloss.Color
   680→	}{
   681→		{"1", "Overview", "⬢", primary},
   682→		{"2", "Processes", "⚡", secondary},
   683→		{"3", "Network", "◈", accent},
   684→		{"4", "Alerts", "⚠", warning},
   685→		{"5", "Settings", "⚙️", danger},
   686→		{"6", "AI Assistant", "🤖", success},
   687→		{"!", "Bash", "⚡", accent},
   688→	}
   689→
   690→	activeIndex := 0
   691→	switch m.viewMode {
   692→	case "overview":
   693→		activeIndex = 0
   694→	case "processes":
   695→		activeIndex = 1
   696→	case "network":
   697→		activeIndex = 2
   698→	case "alerts":
   699→		activeIndex = 3
   700→	case "settings":
   701→		activeIndex = 4
   702→	case "ai":
   703→		activeIndex = 5
   704→	case "bash":
   705→		activeIndex = 6
   706→	}
   707→
   708→	var tabStrs []string
   709→	for i, tab := range tabs {
   710→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s %s", tab.icon, tab.key, tab.name)
   711→
   712→		if i == activeIndex {
   713→			// Active tab with elegant styling
   714→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   715→				Foreground(bg).
   716→				Background(tab.color).
   717→				Bold(true).
   718→				Padding(0, 2).
   719→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   720→				BorderForeground(tab.color).
   721→				Render(content))
   722→		} else {
   723→			// Inactive tab with subtle styling
   724→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   725→				Foreground(tab.color).
   726→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   727→				BorderForeground(textFaint).
   728→				Padding(0, 2).
   729→				Render(content))
   730→		}
   731→	}
   732→
   733→	return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Center, tabStrs...) + "\n"
   734→}
   735→
   736→func (m model) renderContent() string {
   737→	switch m.viewMode {
   738→	case "overview":
   739→		return m.renderOverview()
   740→	case "processes":
   741→		return m.renderProcesses()
   742→	case "network":
   743→		return m.renderNetwork()
   744→	case "alerts":
   745→		return m.renderAlerts()
   746→	case "bash":
   747→		return m.renderBashTerminal()
   748→	case "settings":
   749→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   750→			return m.settingsPage.View()
   751→		}
   752→		return "Settings not available"
   753→	case "ai":
   754→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   755→			return m.aiAssistant.View()
   756→		}
   757→		return "AI Assistant not available"
   758→	default:
   759→		return m.renderOverview()
   760→	}
   761→}

   791→func (m model) renderSystemPanel() string {
   792→	var s strings.Builder
   793→
   794→	// Title with icon
   795→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   796→		Foreground(primary).
   797→		Bold(true).
   798→		Render("⬢ SYSTEM STATUS")
   799→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   800→
   801→	// CPU information
   802→	if len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage) > 0 {
   803→		avgCPU := 0.0
   804→		for _, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   805→			avgCPU += usage
   806→		}
   807→		avgCPU /= float64(len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage))
   808→
   809→		cpuLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("CPU Usage:")
   810→		cpuBar := m.renderElegantBar(avgCPU, 100, 20, success, danger)
   811→		cpuText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%%", avgCPU))
   812→
   813→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s %s\n\n", cpuLabel, cpuBar, cpuText))
   814→
   815→		// CPU cores
   816→		s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render("Cores:\n"))
   817→		for i, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   818→			if i >= 8 {
   819→				break
   820→			} // Limit display
   821→			coreBar := m.renderMiniBar(usage, 100, 12, success, danger)
   822→			s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("C%d %s %.1f%%\n", i, coreBar, usage))
   823→		}
   824→		s.WriteString("\n")
   825→	}
   826→
   827→	// Memory information
   828→	if m.systemStats.MemTotal > 0 {
   829→		memUsage := float64(m.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(m.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   830→
   831→		memLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Memory Usage:")
   832→		memBar := m.renderElegantBar(memUsage, 100, 20, success, danger)
   833→		memText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%% (%s/%s)",
   834→			memUsage, formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemUsed), formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemTotal)))
   835→
   836→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n%s\n\n", memLabel, memBar, memText))
   837→	}
   838→
   839→	// Load average
   840→	loadText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Load Average:")
   841→	loadValues := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(
   842→		fmt.Sprintf("%.2f %.2f %.2f", m.systemStats.LoadAvg[0], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[1], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[2]))
   843→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n\n", loadText, loadValues))
   844→
   845→	// Uptime
   846→	uptimeText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Uptime:")
   847→	uptimeValue := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(formatDuration(m.systemStats.Uptime))
   848→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s", uptimeText, uptimeValue))
   849→
   850→	return s.String()
   851→}

   853→func (m model) renderNetworkPanel() string {
   854→	var s strings.Builder
   855→
   856→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   857→		Foreground(accent).
   858→		Bold(true).
   859→		Render("◈ NETWORK STATUS")
   860→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   861→
   862→	// Network interfaces
   863→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Interfaces:\n"))
   864→	for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
   865→		if len(iface.Name) == 0 {
   866→			continue
   867→		}
   868→
   869→		ifaceStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   870→			Foreground(textMuted).
   871→			Border(lipgloss.NormalBorder(), false, false, false, true).
   872→			BorderForeground(accent).
   873→			PaddingLeft(1)
   874→
   875→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s\n↑ %s  ↓ %s",
   876→			iface.Name, formatBytes(iface.BytesOut), formatBytes(iface.BytesIn))
   877→
   878→		s.WriteString(ifaceStyle.Render(content) + "\n\n")
   879→	}
   880→
   881→	// Active connections
   882→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Active Connections:\n"))
   883→	connectionCount := min(len(m.connections), 8)
   884→	for i := 0; i < connectionCount; i++ {
   885→		conn := m.connections[i]
   886→
   887→		stateColor := success
   888→		switch conn.State {
   889→		case "ESTABLISHED":
   890→			stateColor = success
   891→		case "LISTEN":
   892→			stateColor = accent
   893→		case "TIME_WAIT":
   894→			stateColor = warning
   895→		default:
   896→			stateColor = textMuted
   897→		}
   898→
   899→		connText := fmt.Sprintf("%-4s %s:%s → %s",
   900→			conn.Protocol, conn.LocalAddr, conn.LocalPort, conn.State)
   901→		if len(connText) > 28 {
   902→			connText = connText[:25] + "..."
   903→		}
   904→
   905→		s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(stateColor).Render(connText) + "\n")
   906→	}
   907→
   908→	// Network activity visualization
   909→	s.WriteString("\n" + lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Activity:") + "\n")
   910→	activityViz := m.renderNetworkActivity()
   911→	s.WriteString(activityViz)
   912→
   913→	return s.String()
   914→}
   915→
   916→func (m model) renderAlertsPanel() string {
   917→	var s strings.Builder
   918→
   919→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   920→		Foreground(warning).
   921→		Bold(true).
   922→		Render("⚠ SYSTEM ALERTS")
   923→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   924→
   925→	if len(m.alerts) == 0 {
   926→		noAlerts := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   927→			Foreground(success).
   928→			Render("✓ All systems nominal")
   929→		s.WriteString(noAlerts)
   930→		return s.String()
   931→	}
   932→
   933→	// Show recent alerts with elegant styling
   934→	maxAlerts := min(len(m.alerts), 10)
   935→	for i := 0; i < maxAlerts; i++ {
   936→		alert := m.alerts[i]
   937→
   938→		var levelColor lipgloss.Color
   939→		var icon string
   940→		switch alert.Level {
   941→		case "ERROR":
   942→			levelColor = danger
   943→			icon = "●"
   944→		case "WARN":
   945→			levelColor = warning
   946→			icon = "◐"
   947→		case "INFO":
   948→			levelColor = accent
   949→			icon = "◯"
   950→		default:
   951→			levelColor = textMuted
   952→			icon = "○"
   953→		}
   954→
   955→		timestamp := alert.Timestamp.Format("15:04")
   956→		message := alert.Message
   957→		if len(message) > 30 {
   958→			message = message[:27] + "..."
   959→		}
   960→
   961→		alertStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   962→			Foreground(levelColor).
   963→			Border(lipgloss.NormalBorder(), false, false, false, true).
   964→			BorderForeground(levelColor).
   965→			PaddingLeft(1)
   966→
   967→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s\n%s", icon, timestamp, message)
   968→		s.WriteString(alertStyle.Render(content) + "\n\n")
   969→	}
   970→
   971→	return s.String()
   972→}
   973→
   974→func (m model) renderProcesses() string {
   975→	var s strings.Builder
   976→
   977→	// Header
   978→	title := fmt.Sprintf("⚡ PROCESS MONITOR (%d processes)", len(m.filteredProcs))
   979→	if m.searchQuery != "" {
   980→		title += fmt.Sprintf(" - Filtered: '%s'", m.searchQuery)
   981→	}
   982→
   983→	headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   984→		Foreground(secondary).
   985→		Bold(true)
   986→	s.WriteString(headerStyle.Render(title) + "\n\n")
   987→
   988→	// Column headers with elegant styling
   989→	headers := []string{"PID", "USER", "CPU%", "MEM%", "STATE", "COMMAND"}
   990→	widths := []int{8, 12, 8, 8, 8, m.width - 50}
   991→
   992→	var headerParts []string
   993→	for i, header := range headers {
   994→		headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   995→			Foreground(primary).
   996→			Bold(true).
   997→			Width(widths[i]).
   998→			Align(lipgloss.Left)
   999→		headerParts = append(headerParts, headerStyle.Render(header))
  1000→	}
  1001→
  1002→	s.WriteString(strings.Join(headerParts, " ") + "\n")
  1003→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1004→		Foreground(textFaint).
  1005→		Render(strings.Repeat("─", m.width-2)) + "\n\n")
  1006→
  1007→	// Process list
  1008→	visibleRows := m.height - 15
  1009→	startIdx := m.scrollOffset
  1010→	endIdx := min(startIdx+visibleRows, len(m.filteredProcs))
  1011→
  1012→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx; i++ {
  1013→		if i >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
  1014→			break
  1015→		}
  1016→
  1017→		proc := m.filteredProcs[i]
  1018→		isSelected := i == m.selectedRow
  1019→
  1020→		// Dynamic colors based on values
  1021→		var cpuColor, memColor, stateColor lipgloss.Color
  1022→
  1023→		if proc.CPU > 80 {
  1024→			cpuColor = danger
  1025→		} else if proc.CPU > 40 {
  1026→			cpuColor = warning
  1027→		} else {
  1028→			cpuColor = success
  1029→		}
  1030→
  1031→		if proc.Memory > 10 {
  1032→			memColor = danger
  1033→		} else if proc.Memory > 5 {
  1034→			memColor = warning
  1035→		} else {
  1036→			memColor = success
  1037→		}
  1038→
  1039→		switch proc.State {
  1040→		case "R", "R+":
  1041→			stateColor = success
  1042→		case "S", "S+":
  1043→			stateColor = accent
  1044→		case "T":
  1045→			stateColor = warning
  1046→		case "Z":
  1047→			stateColor = danger
  1048→		default:
  1049→			stateColor = textMuted
  1050→		}
  1051→
  1052→		// Format fields
  1053→		pidText := fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID)
  1054→		userText := proc.User
  1055→		cpuText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.CPU)
  1056→		memText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.Memory)
  1057→		stateText := proc.State
  1058→
  1059→		command := proc.Command
  1060→		if len(command) > widths[5] {
  1061→			command = command[:widths[5]-3] + "..."
  1062→		}
  1063→
  1064→		// Create row parts
  1065→		parts := []string{
  1066→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[0]).Render(pidText),
  1067→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[1]).Render(userText),
  1068→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[2]).Foreground(cpuColor).Render(cpuText),
  1069→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[3]).Foreground(memColor).Render(memText),
  1070→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[4]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(stateText),
  1071→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render(command),
  1072→		}
  1073→
  1074→		row := strings.Join(parts, " ")
  1075→
  1076→		if isSelected {
  1077→			row = lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1078→				Foreground(bg).
  1079→				Background(primary).
  1080→				Bold(true).
  1081→				Width(m.width - 2).
  1082→				Render(" " + row + " ")
  1083→		}
  1084→
  1085→		s.WriteString(row + "\n")
  1086→	}
  1087→
  1088→	return s.String()
  1089→}

  1091→func (m model) renderNetwork() string {
  1092→	var s strings.Builder
  1093→
  1094→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1095→		Foreground(accent).
  1096→		Bold(true).
  1097→		Render("◈ NETWORK MONITOR")
  1098→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
  1099→
  1100→	// Interfaces section
  1101→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Bold(true).Render("Network Interfaces:") + "\n")
  1102→	for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
  1103→		if len(iface.Name) == 0 {
  1104→			continue
  1105→		}
  1106→
  1107→		ifaceBox := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1108→			Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
  1109→			BorderForeground(accent).
  1110→			Padding(1).
  1111→			Margin(0, 1, 1, 0).
  1112→			Width(30)
  1113→
  1114→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s\n\n↑ Out: %s\n↓ In:  %s\n📦 Packets: %d/%d",
  1115→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(accent).Bold(true).Render(iface.Name),
  1116→			formatBytes(iface.BytesOut),
  1117→			formatBytes(iface.BytesIn),
  1118→			iface.PacketsOut, iface.PacketsIn)
  1119→
  1120→		s.WriteString(ifaceBox.Render(content) + "\n")
  1121→	}
  1122→
  1123→	// Connections section
  1124→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Bold(true).Render("Active Connections:") + "\n\n")
  1125→
  1126→	// Connection headers
  1127→	connHeaders := []string{"PROTO", "LOCAL", "REMOTE", "STATE", "PROCESS"}
  1128→	connWidths := []int{8, 22, 22, 12, m.width - 70}
  1129→
  1130→	var headerParts []string
  1131→	for i, header := range connHeaders {
  1132→		headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1133→			Foreground(accent).
  1134→			Bold(true).
  1135→			Width(connWidths[i])
  1136→		headerParts = append(headerParts, headerStyle.Render(header))
  1137→	}
  1138→
  1139→	s.WriteString(strings.Join(headerParts, " ") + "\n")
  1140→	s.WriteString(strings.Repeat("─", m.width-2) + "\n")
  1141→
  1142→	// Connection list
  1143→	maxConns := min(len(m.connections), m.height-18)
  1144→	for i := 0; i < maxConns; i++ {
  1145→		conn := m.connections[i]
  1146→
  1147→		stateColor := success
  1148→		switch conn.State {
  1149→		case "ESTABLISHED":
  1150→			stateColor = success
  1151→		case "LISTEN":
  1152→			stateColor = accent
  1153→		case "TIME_WAIT":
  1154→			stateColor = warning
  1155→		default:
  1156→			stateColor = textMuted
  1157→		}
  1158→
  1159→		local := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.LocalAddr, conn.LocalPort)
  1160→		remote := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.RemoteAddr, conn.RemotePort)
  1161→
  1162→		if len(local) > connWidths[1] {
  1163→			local = local[:connWidths[1]-3] + "..."
  1164→		}
  1165→		if len(remote) > connWidths[2] {
  1166→			remote = remote[:connWidths[2]-3] + "..."
  1167→		}
  1168→		if len(conn.ProcessName) > connWidths[4] {
  1169→			conn.ProcessName = conn.ProcessName[:connWidths[4]-3] + "..."
  1170→		}
  1171→
  1172→		parts := []string{
  1173→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[0]).Render(conn.Protocol),
  1174→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[1]).Render(local),
  1175→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[2]).Render(remote),
  1176→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[3]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(conn.State),
  1177→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(conn.ProcessName),
  1178→		}
  1179→
  1180→		s.WriteString(strings.Join(parts, " ") + "\n")
  1181→	}
  1182→
  1183→	return s.String()
  1184→}

  1299→// Enhanced visual effects
  1300→func (m model) renderElegantBar(value, max float64, width int, lowColor, highColor lipgloss.Color) string {
  1301→	if max == 0 {
  1302→		return ""
  1303→	}
  1304→
  1305→	ratio := value / max
  1306→	filled := int(ratio * float64(width))
  1307→	if filled > width {
  1308→		filled = width
  1309→	}
  1310→
  1311→	// Create gradient effect
  1312→	var segments []string
  1313→	for i := 0; i < width; i++ {
  1314→		if i < filled {
  1315→			if ratio > 0.7 {
  1316→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(highColor).Render("█"))
  1317→			} else if ratio > 0.4 {
  1318→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(warning).Render("█"))
  1319→			} else {
  1320→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lowColor).Render("█"))
  1321→			}
  1322→		} else {
  1323→			segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textFaint).Render("░"))
  1324→		}
  1325→	}
  1326→
  1327→	return strings.Join(segments, "")
  1328→}
  1329→
  1330→func (m model) renderMiniBar(value, max float64, width int, lowColor, highColor lipgloss.Color) string {
  1331→	if max == 0 {
  1332→		return ""
  1333→	}
  1334→
  1335→	ratio := value / max
  1336→	filled := int(ratio * float64(width))
  1337→	if filled > width {
  1338→		filled = width
  1339→	}
  1340→
  1341→	bar := strings.Repeat("▓", filled) + strings.Repeat("░", width-filled)
  1342→
  1343→	color := lowColor
  1344→	if ratio > 0.7 {
  1345→		color = highColor
  1346→	} else if ratio > 0.4 {
  1347→		color = warning
  1348→	}
  1349→
  1350→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(color).Render(bar)
  1351→}

  1353→func (m model) renderNetworkActivity() string {
  1354→	var lines []string
  1355→
  1356→	// Create a wave pattern for network activity
  1357→	for row := 0; row < 6; row++ {
  1358→		var line strings.Builder
  1359→		for col := 0; col < 25; col++ {
  1360→			char := "·"
  1361→
  1362→			// Create flowing wave pattern
  1363→			waveHeight := 2.0 + 1.5*math.Sin(float64(col)*0.3+float64(m.frame)*0.05)
  1364→			if math.Abs(float64(row)-waveHeight) < 0.8 {
  1365→				char = "~"
  1366→			}
  1367→
  1368→			// Add data flow indicators
  1369→			if (col+m.frame/4)%8 == 0 {
  1370→				char = "◦"
  1371→			}
  1372→
  1373→			line.WriteString(char)
  1374→		}
  1375→
  1376→		color := accent
  1377→		if row == 2 || row == 3 {
  1378→			color = primary
  1379→		}
  1380→
  1381→		lines = append(lines, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(color).Render(line.String()))
  1382→	}
  1383→
  1384→	return strings.Join(lines, "\n")
  1385→}

  1398→// Utility functions
  1399→func formatBytes(bytes uint64) string {
  1400→	const unit = 1024
  1401→	if bytes < unit {
  1402→		return fmt.Sprintf("%d B", bytes)
  1403→	}
  1404→	div, exp := int64(unit), 0
  1405→	for n := bytes / unit; n >= unit; n /= unit {
  1406→		div *= unit
  1407→		exp++
  1408→	}
  1409→	return fmt.Sprintf("%.1f %cB", float64(bytes)/float64(div), "KMGTPE"[exp])
  1410→}
  1411→
  1412→func formatDuration(d time.Duration) string {
  1413→	days := int(d.Hours()) / 24
  1414→	hours := int(d.Hours()) % 24
  1415→	minutes := int(d.Minutes()) % 60
  1416→
  1417→	if days > 0 {
  1418→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dd %dh %dm", days, hours, minutes)
  1419→	}
  1420→	if hours > 0 {
  1421→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dh %dm", hours, minutes)
  1422→	}
  1423→	return fmt.Sprintf("%dm", minutes)
  1424→}

  1430→// Process management functions
  1431→func (m *model) sortProcesses() {
  1432→	if len(m.processes) == 0 {
  1433→		return
  1434→	}
  1435→
  1436→	sort.Slice(m.processes, func(i, j int) bool {
  1437→		var less bool
  1438→		switch m.sortColumn {
  1439→		case "CPU":
  1440→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1441→		case "Memory":
  1442→			less = m.processes[i].Memory < m.processes[j].Memory
  1443→		case "PID":
  1444→			less = m.processes[i].PID < m.processes[j].PID
  1445→		default:
  1446→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1447→		}
  1448→		if m.sortReverse {
  1449→			less = !less
  1450→		}
  1451→		return less
  1452→	})
  1453→}
  1454→
  1455→func filterProcesses(processes []Process, query string) []Process {
  1456→	if query == "" {
  1457→		return processes
  1458→	}
  1459→
  1460→	query = strings.ToLower(query)
  1461→	var filtered []Process
  1462→
  1463→	for _, proc := range processes {
  1464→		if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Name), query) ||
  1465→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Command), query) ||
  1466→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.User), query) ||
  1467→			strings.Contains(fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID), query) {
  1468→			filtered = append(filtered, proc)
  1469→		}
  1470→	}
  1471→
  1472→	return filtered
  1473→}

  1479→// Data fetching functions (enhanced implementations)
  1480→func getProcessesAndStats() ([]Process, SystemStats) {
  1481→	var processes []Process
  1482→	stats := SystemStats{
  1483→		CPUCores: runtime.NumCPU(),
  1484→		CPUUsage: make([]float64, runtime.NumCPU()),
  1485→	}
  1486→
  1487→	// Get CPU usage per core
  1488→	for i := 0; i < runtime.NumCPU(); i++ {
  1489→		stats.CPUUsage[i] = rand.Float64() * 100
  1490→	}
  1491→
  1492→	// Simulate memory stats
  1493→	stats.MemTotal = 8 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 8GB
  1494→	stats.MemUsed = uint64(rand.Float64() * float64(stats.MemTotal) * 0.8)
  1495→	stats.LoadAvg = [3]float64{rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2}
  1496→	stats.Uptime = time.Hour * 24 * time.Duration(rand.Intn(30))
  1497→
  1498→	// Get process list via ps
  1499→	cmd := exec.Command("ps", "axo", "pid,user,pcpu,pmem,state,ppid,etime,command")
  1500→	output, err := cmd.Output()
  1501→	if err != nil {
  1502→		return processes, stats
  1503→	}
  1504→
  1505→	lines := strings.Split(string(output), "\n")
  1506→	for i, line := range lines {
  1507→		if i == 0 || line == "" {
  1508→			continue
  1509→		}
  1510→
  1511→		fields := strings.Fields(line)
  1512→		if len(fields) < 8 {
  1513→			continue
  1514→		}
  1515→
  1516→		pid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[0])
  1517→		cpu, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[2], 64)
  1518→		mem, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[3], 64)
  1519→		ppid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[5])
  1520→
  1521→		command := strings.Join(fields[7:], " ")
  1522→		name := fields[7]
  1523→		if strings.Contains(name, "/") {
  1524→			parts := strings.Split(name, "/")
  1525→			name = parts[len(parts)-1]
  1526→		}
  1527→
  1528→		processes = append(processes, Process{
  1529→			PID:       pid,
  1530→			Name:      name,
  1531→			User:      fields[1],
  1532→			CPU:       cpu,
  1533→			Memory:    mem,
  1534→			State:     fields[4],
  1535→			PPID:      ppid,
  1536→			StartTime: fields[6],
  1537→			Command:   command,
  1538→		})
  1539→	}
  1540→
  1541→	return processes, stats
  1542→}

  1544→func getNetworkConnections() []NetworkConnection {
  1545→	var connections []NetworkConnection
  1546→
  1547→	// Simulate some connections
  1548→	protocols := []string{"TCP", "UDP"}
  1549→	states := []string{"ESTABLISHED", "LISTEN", "TIME_WAIT", "CLOSE_WAIT"}
  1550→
  1551→	for i := 0; i < 15; i++ {
  1552→		conn := NetworkConnection{
  1553→			Protocol:    protocols[rand.Intn(len(protocols))],
  1554→			LocalAddr:   fmt.Sprintf("192.168.1.%d", rand.Intn(254)+1),

  1680→// cycleTheme cycles through available themes
  1681→func (m model) cycleTheme() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
  1682→	themes := m.themeManager.GetThemeNames()
  1683→	currentTheme := m.themeManager.GetCurrentTheme().Name
  1684→
  1685→	// Find current theme index
  1686→	currentIndex := 0
  1687→	for i, theme := range themes {
  1688→		if theme == currentTheme {
  1689→			currentIndex = i
  1690→			break
  1691→		}
  1692→	}
  1693→
  1694→	// Get next theme
  1695→	nextIndex := (currentIndex + 1) % len(themes)
  1696→	nextTheme := themes[nextIndex]
  1697→
  1698→	// Apply the theme
  1699→	m.themeManager.ApplyTheme(nextTheme)
  1700→
  1701→	// Update global colors
  1702→	m.updateGlobalColors()
  1703→
  1704→	return m, nil
  1705→}

   250→	ParticleCount   int     `yaml:"particle_count"`
   251→}
   252→
   253→// AdvancedUISettings holds advanced UI and performance settings
   254→type AdvancedUISettings struct {
   255→	AnimationSpeed     string        `yaml:"animation_speed"` // "Off", "Slow", "Normal", "Fast"
   256→	RefreshRate        time.Duration `yaml:"refresh_rate"`
   257→	EnableTransparency bool          `yaml:"enable_transparency"`

   260→	PerformanceMode    bool          `yaml:"performance_mode"`
   261→	DebugMode          bool          `yaml:"debug_mode"`
   262→	MemoryUsageLimitMB int           `yaml:"memory_usage_limit_mb"`
   263→}
   264→
   265→// Profile holds a named configuration profile
   266→type Profile struct {
   267→	Name   string `yaml:"name"`
   268→	Config Config `yaml:"config"` // A profile contains a full config snapshot
   269→}
   270→
   271→// RefreshRateConfig holds refresh rate settings for different components
   272→type RefreshRateConfig struct {
   273→	SystemStats time.Duration `yaml:"system_stats"`

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
	"runtime"
	"sort"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
)

// SystemMonitorModel implements the system monitoring functionality as a modular component
type SystemMonitorModel struct {
	// Component state
	active bool
	width  int
	height int

	// System data
	processes   []Process
	systemStats SystemStats
	connections []NetworkConnection
	interfaces  []NetworkInterface
	alerts      []SystemAlert

	// Alert management
	alertManager *AlertManager

	// Historical data management
	historyManager *HistoryManager

	// UI state
	selectedRow       int
	sortColumn        string
	sortReverse       bool
	searchMode        bool
	searchQuery       string
	filteredProcs     []Process
	scrollOffset      int
	alertScrollOffset int

	// Dialog state
	showKillDialog bool
	killPID        int

	// Visual effects (maintaining cyberpunk aesthetic)
	frame          int
	pulsePhase     float64
	glowIntensity  float64
	orbs           []orb
	lightRays      []lightRay
	matrixRain     []matrixDrop
	energyField    []energyNode
	cpuHistory     [][]float64
	memHistory     []float64
	bandwidthIn    []float64
	bandwidthOut   []float64
	networkTraffic []float64
}

// Visual effect types (from original code)
type orb struct {
	x, y        float64
	vx, vy      float64
	radius      float64
	intensity   float64
	color       lipgloss.Color
	pulsePeriod float64
	pulseOffset float64
}

type lightRay struct {
	x, y      float64
	angle     float64
	length    float64
	intensity float64
	color     lipgloss.Color
}

type matrixDrop struct {
	x, y      float64
	speed     float64
	length    int
	chars     []rune
	intensity float64
}

type energyNode struct {
	x, y        float64
	connections []int // indices of connected nodes
	pulsePhase  float64
	energy      float64
}

// Enhanced Process struct with detailed information
type Process struct {
	PID       int
	Name      string
	User      string
	CPU       float64
	Memory    float64
	State     string
	PPID      int
	StartTime string
	Command   string
	// Enhanced fields for detailed process information
	Environment map[string]string
	OpenFiles   []string
	WorkingDir  string
	Priority    int
	Nice        int
	Threads     int
	MemoryRSS   uint64 // Resident Set Size in bytes
	MemoryVSZ   uint64 // Virtual Size in bytes
	Runtime     time.Duration
}

type SystemStats struct {
	CPUCores  int
	CPUUsage  []float64
	MemTotal  uint64
	MemUsed   uint64
	SwapTotal uint64
	SwapUsed  uint64
	LoadAvg   [3]float64
	Uptime    time.Duration
}

type NetworkConnection struct {
	Protocol    string
	LocalAddr   string
	LocalPort   string
	RemoteAddr  string
	RemotePort  string
	State       string
	PID         int
	ProcessName string
}

type NetworkInterface struct {
	Name       string
	BytesIn    uint64
	BytesOut   uint64
	PacketsIn  uint64
	PacketsOut uint64
	Speed      uint64
}

// Enhanced SystemAlert with more detailed information
type SystemAlert struct {
	ID          string
	Type        AlertType
	Level       AlertLevel
	Message     string
	Description string
	Timestamp   time.Time
	Source      string
	Value       float64
	Threshold   float64
	Unit        string
	Resolved    bool
	ResolvedAt  *time.Time
	Actions     []string
}

// AlertType represents different types of system alerts
type AlertType string

const (
	AlertTypeCPU         AlertType = "CPU"
	AlertTypeMemory      AlertType = "MEMORY"
	AlertTypeDisk        AlertType = "DISK"
	AlertTypeNetwork     AlertType = "NETWORK"
	AlertTypeProcess     AlertType = "PROCESS"
	AlertTypeSystem      AlertType = "SYSTEM"
	AlertTypeSecurity    AlertType = "SECURITY"
	AlertTypePerformance AlertType = "PERFORMANCE"
)

// AlertLevel represents the severity of alerts
type AlertLevel string

const (
	AlertLevelInfo     AlertLevel = "INFO"
	AlertLevelWarning  AlertLevel = "WARNING"
	AlertLevelError    AlertLevel = "ERROR"
	AlertLevelCritical AlertLevel = "CRITICAL"
)

// AlertThresholds holds configurable threshold values
type AlertThresholds struct {
	CPU struct {
		Warning  float64 `yaml:"warning"`

file.content:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strings"
	"time"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
)

// SettingsPageModel implements a comprehensive settings interface
type SettingsPageModel struct {
	// Component state
	active bool
	width  int
	height int

	// Configuration reference
	config        *Config
	configManager *ConfigManager

	// Settings navigation
	currentSection SettingsSection
	selectedItem   int
	scrollOffset   int
	sections       []SettingsSection

	// Edit state
	editMode      bool
	editingItem   string
	editValue     string
	editCursorPos int

	// Theme manager reference
	themeManager *ThemeManager

	// Visual effects
	frame      int
	pulsePhase float64
}

// SettingsSection represents a category of settings
type SettingsSection int

const (
	SectionGeneral SettingsSection = iota
	SectionThemes
	SectionHotkeys
	SectionAdvanced
	SectionProfiles
	SectionAbout
)

// String returns the string representation of SettingsSection
func (s SettingsSection) String() string {
	switch s {
	case SectionGeneral:
		return "General"
	case SectionThemes:
		return "Themes"
	case SectionHotkeys:
		return "Hotkeys"
	case SectionAdvanced:
		return "Advanced"
	case SectionProfiles:
		return "Profiles"
	case SectionAbout:
		return "About"
	default:
		return "Unknown"
	}
}

// SettingsItem represents a configurable setting
type SettingsItem struct {
	Name        string
	Description string
	Type        SettingsItemType
	Value       interface{}
	Options     []string // For dropdown/selection items
	Min         float64  // For numeric items
	Max         float64  // For numeric items
	Step        float64  // For numeric items
	Action      func()   // For action buttons
	Section     string   // Config section for updating
	Key         string   // Config key for updating
}

// SettingsItemType represents the type of setting
type SettingsItemType int

const (
	ItemTypeString SettingsItemType = iota
	ItemTypeNumber
	ItemTypeBool
	ItemTypeSelection
	ItemTypeAction
	ItemTypeColor
	ItemTypeHotkey

**Project Manager Agent:**

I need to coordinate a fully automated development team to ensure this terminal multitool application is completed to the highest possible standard.

**Current Project Status:**
- Go-based terminal application using Bubble Tea TUI framework
- Multiple components: system monitor, port scanner, package manager, AI assistant, settings
- Main issues identified: settings menu incomplete, AI assistant tab completely wrong
- Application builds successfully but has functional gaps

**Project Context:**
- Location: /Users/pcstyle/my-games/amp/
- Language: Go with Bubble Tea TUI framework
- Architecture: Component-based with modular design
- Current files: ~20 Go files with various components implemented

**Objectives:**

2. Identify all incomplete/broken functionality
3. Create optimal development workflow
4. Coordinate specialized agents for maximum quality
5. Ensure everything is done as best as it can be

- Fix the incomplete settings menu implementation
- Completely redesign/fix the AI assistant tab
- Ensure all components work seamlessly together

- Follow Go best practices and TUI design patterns

Please analyze the current state, create a comprehensive development plan, and coordinate the appropriate specialized agents to achieve the highest possible quality result. Focus on practical, implementable solutions that will make this a truly polished terminal multitool.

     9→
    10→// ViewType represents the different tool views available in the multitool
    11→type ViewType int
    12→
    13→const (
    14→	ViewOverview ViewType = iota
    15→	ViewSystemMonitor
    16→	ViewPortScanner
    17→	ViewPackageManager
    18→	ViewContainerMgmt
    19→	ViewAIAssistant
    20→	ViewBashTerminal
    21→	ViewSettings
    22→)
    23→
    24→// String returns the string representation of ViewType
    25→func (v ViewType) String() string {
    26→	switch v {
    27→	case ViewOverview:
    28→		return "overview"
    29→	case ViewSystemMonitor:
    30→		return "system"
    31→	case ViewPortScanner:
    32→		return "scanner"
    33→	case ViewPackageManager:
    34→		return "packages"
    35→	case ViewContainerMgmt:
    36→		return "containers"
    37→	case ViewAIAssistant:
    38→		return "ai"
    39→	case ViewBashTerminal:
    40→		return "bash"
    41→	case ViewSettings:
    42→		return "settings"
    43→	default:
    44→		return "unknown"
    45→	}
    46→}
    47→
    48→// ToolComponent defines the interface that all tool components must implement
    49→type ToolComponent interface {
    50→	// Init initializes the component and returns initial commands
    51→	Init() tea.Cmd
    52→
    53→	// Update handles messages and returns updated model and commands
    54→	Update(msg tea.Msg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd)
    55→
    56→	// View renders the component's interface
    57→	View() string
    58→
    59→	// SetSize updates the component's dimensions
    60→	SetSize(width, height int)
    61→
    62→	// GetViewType returns the component's view type
    63→	GetViewType() ViewType
    64→
    65→	// IsActive returns whether the component is currently active
    66→	IsActive() bool
    67→
    68→	// SetActive sets the component's active state
    69→	SetActive(active bool)
    70→}
    71→
    72→// Global message types for inter-component communication
    73→type (
    74→	// tickMsg represents a tick message for animations and updates
    75→	tickMsg time.Time
    76→	// ViewSwitchMsg is sent when switching between different tool views
    77→	ViewSwitchMsg struct {
    78→		View     ViewType
    79→		Previous ViewType
    80→	}
    81→
    82→	// ConfigUpdateMsg is sent when configuration changes
    83→	ConfigUpdateMsg struct {
    84→		Config *Config
    85→	}
    86→
    87→	// NotificationMsg is sent to display notifications to the user
    88→	NotificationMsg struct {
    89→		Message string
    90→		Level   NotificationLevel
    91→		Source  string
    92→		Time    time.Time
    93→	}
    94→
    95→	// StatusUpdateMsg is sent to update the status bar
    96→	StatusUpdateMsg struct {
    97→		Status string
    98→		Color  lipgloss.Color
    99→	}
   100→
   101→	// ErrorMsg wraps errors for consistent error handling
   102→	ErrorMsg struct {
   103→		Err    error
   104→		Source string
   105→		Level  ErrorLevel
   106→	}
   107→
   108→	// DataUpdateMsg is sent when shared data is updated
   109→	DataUpdateMsg struct {
   110→		Type string
   111→		Data interface{}
   112→	}
   113→
   114→	// SaveConfigMsg is a message to trigger saving the configuration.
   115→	SaveConfigMsg struct{}
   116→)
   117→
   118→// NotificationLevel represents the severity of notifications
   119→type NotificationLevel int
   120→
   121→const (
   122→	NotificationInfo NotificationLevel = iota
   123→	NotificationWarning
   124→	NotificationError
   125→	NotificationSuccess
   126→)
   127→
   128→// String returns the string representation of NotificationLevel

   142→}
   143→

   153→

    92→			Description: "Open-source code generation and assistance with community-driven AI models",
    93→			Icon:        "🔓",
    94→			Color:       lipgloss.Color("#10b981"),
    95→			Available:   checkCommandAvailable("opencode"),
    96→		},
    97→		{
    98→			Name:        "Aider",
    99→			Command:     "aider",
   100→			Description: "AI pair programming assistant that can edit your code files directly",
   101→			Icon:        "🤖",
   102→			Color:       lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"),
   103→			Available:   checkCommandAvailable("aider"),
   104→		},
   105→		{
   106→			Name:        "Shell GPT",
   107→			Command:     "sgpt",
   108→			Description: "ChatGPT integration for shell commands, code explanations, and general assistance",
   109→			Icon:        "💬",
   110→			Color:       lipgloss.Color("#ec4899"),
   111→			Available:   checkCommandAvailable("sgpt"),
   112→		},
   113→	}
   114→
   115→	// Set default agent to the first available one
   116→	defaultAgent := "gemini" // Default to gemini since it's available
   117→	for _, agent := range agents {
   118→		if agent.Available {
   119→			defaultAgent = agent.Command
   120→			break
   121→		}
   122→	}
   123→
   124→	return &AIAssistantModel{
   125→		active:            false,
   126→		currentAgent:      defaultAgent,
   127→		availableAgents:   agents,
   128→		chatHistory:       make([]AIMessage, 0),
   129→		input:             "",
   130→		cursorPos:         0,
   131→		scrollOffset:      0,
   132→		isProcessing:      false,
   133→		showAgentSelector: false,
   134→		selectedAgentIdx:  0,
   135→		showChatHistory:   true,
   136→		maxHistorySize:    100,
   137→		frame:             0,
   138→		pulsePhase:        0,
   139→		glowIntensity:     0.5,
   140→		autoScroll:        true,
   141→		timestamps:        true,
   142→	}
   143→}
   144→
   145→// Init initializes the AI assistant component
   146→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) Init() tea.Cmd {
   147→	return tea.Batch(
   148→		tea.Tick(50*time.Millisecond, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
   149→			return tickMsg(t)
   150→		}),
   151→	)
   152→}
   153→
   154→// Update handles messages for the AI assistant
   155→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   156→	if !ai.active {
   157→		return ai, nil
   158→	}
   159→
   160→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   161→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   162→		return ai.handleKeyPress(msg)
   163→
   164→	case tickMsg:
   165→		ai.frame++
   166→		ai.pulsePhase += 0.1
   167→		ai.glowIntensity = 0.3 + 0.4*float64(math.Sin(ai.pulsePhase))
   168→		return ai, nil
   169→
   170→	case aiResponseMsg:
   171→		ai.isProcessing = false
   172→		if msg.error != nil {
   173→			ai.addMessage("assistant", fmt.Sprintf("Error: %v", msg.error), msg.agent)
   174→		} else {
   175→			ai.addMessage("assistant", msg.response, msg.agent)
   176→		}
   177→		if ai.autoScroll {
   178→			ai.scrollToBottom()
   179→		}
   180→		return ai, nil
   181→
   182→	case aiProcessingMsg:
   183→		ai.isProcessing = msg.processing
   184→		return ai, nil
   185→	}
   186→
   187→	return ai, nil
   188→}
   189→
   190→// handleKeyPress handles keyboard input
   191→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) handleKeyPress(msg tea.KeyMsg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   192→	switch {
   193→	case msg.String() == "tab":
   194→		ai.showAgentSelector = !ai.showAgentSelector
   195→		return ai, nil
   196→
   197→	case msg.String() == "ctrl+h":
   198→		ai.showChatHistory = !ai.showChatHistory
   199→		return ai, nil
   200→
   201→	case msg.String() == "ctrl+c":
   202→		if ai.isProcessing {
   203→			ai.isProcessing = false
   204→			ai.addMessage("system", "Processing cancelled", "system")
   205→		}
   206→		return ai, nil
   207→
   208→	case msg.String() == "ctrl+l":
   209→		ai.chatHistory = make([]AIMessage, 0)
   210→		return ai, nil
   211→
   212→	case ai.showAgentSelector:
   213→		return ai.handleAgentSelection(msg)
   214→
   215→	default:
   216→		return ai.handleChatInput(msg)
   217→	}
   218→}
   219→
   220→// handleAgentSelection handles agent selection interface
   221→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) handleAgentSelection(msg tea.KeyMsg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   222→	switch msg.String() {
   223→	case "up", "k":
   224→		if ai.selectedAgentIdx > 0 {
   225→			ai.selectedAgentIdx--
   226→		}
   227→	case "down", "j":
   228→		if ai.selectedAgentIdx < len(ai.availableAgents)-1 {
   229→			ai.selectedAgentIdx++
   230→		}
   231→	case "enter":
   232→		if ai.selectedAgentIdx < len(ai.availableAgents) {
   233→			ai.currentAgent = ai.availableAgents[ai.selectedAgentIdx].Command
   234→			ai.showAgentSelector = false
   235→			ai.addMessage("system", fmt.Sprintf("Switched to %s", ai.availableAgents[ai.selectedAgentIdx].Name), "system")
   236→		}
   237→	case "esc":
   238→		ai.showAgentSelector = false
   239→	}
   240→	return ai, nil
   241→}
   242→
   243→// handleChatInput handles chat input
   244→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) handleChatInput(msg tea.KeyMsg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   245→	switch msg.String() {
   246→	case "enter":
   247→		if ai.input != "" {
   248→			return ai.sendMessage()
   249→		}
   250→	case "backspace":
   251→		if ai.cursorPos > 0 {
   252→			ai.input = ai.input[:ai.cursorPos-1] + ai.input[ai.cursorPos:]
   253→			ai.cursorPos--
   254→		}
   255→	case "left":
   256→		if ai.cursorPos > 0 {
   257→			ai.cursorPos--
   258→		}
   259→	case "right":
   260→		if ai.cursorPos < len(ai.input) {
   261→			ai.cursorPos++
   262→		}
   263→	case "home", "ctrl+a":
   264→		ai.cursorPos = 0
   265→	case "end", "ctrl+e":
   266→		ai.cursorPos = len(ai.input)
   267→	case "up":
   268→		ai.scrollUp()
   269→	case "down":
   270→		ai.scrollDown()
   271→	default:
   272→		if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   273→			ai.input = ai.input[:ai.cursorPos] + msg.String() + ai.input[ai.cursorPos:]
   274→			ai.cursorPos++
   275→		}
   276→	}
   277→	return ai, nil
   278→}
   279→
   280→// sendMessage sends a message to the AI
   281→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) sendMessage() (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   282→	message := strings.TrimSpace(ai.input)
   283→	if message == "" {
   284→		return ai, nil
   285→	}
   286→
   287→	// Add user message to history
   288→	ai.addMessage("user", message, ai.currentAgent)
   289→
   290→	// Clear input
   291→	ai.input = ""
   292→	ai.cursorPos = 0
   293→
   294→	// Set processing state
   295→	ai.isProcessing = true
   296→
   297→	if ai.autoScroll {
   298→		ai.scrollToBottom()
   299→	}
   300→
   301→	// Send to AI agent
   302→	return ai, ai.processAIRequest(message)
   303→}
   304→
   305→// processAIRequest processes the AI request
   306→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) processAIRequest(message string) tea.Cmd {
   307→	return func() tea.Msg {
   308→		// Find the current agent
   309→		var agent *AIAgent
   310→		for _, a := range ai.availableAgents {
   311→			if a.Command == ai.currentAgent {
   312→				agent = &a
   313→				break
   314→			}
   315→		}
   316→
   317→		if agent == nil || !agent.Available {
   318→			return aiResponseMsg{
   319→				response: "The selected AI agent is not available. Please check your installation or select a different agent.",
   320→				agent:    ai.currentAgent,
   321→				error:    fmt.Errorf("agent not available"),
   322→			}
   323→		}
   324→
   325→		// Construct command based on agent type
   326→		var cmd *exec.Cmd
   327→		switch agent.Command {
   328→		case "claude-code":
   329→			// Claude Code: Try claude command if available
   330→			cmd = exec.Command("claude", message)
   331→		case "gemini":
   332→			// Gemini CLI: Use -p flag for prompt
   333→			cmd = exec.Command("gemini", "-p", message)
   334→		case "gh copilot":
   335→			// GitHub Copilot CLI: Use suggest command for code suggestions
   336→			cmd = exec.Command("gh", "copilot", "suggest", message)
   337→		case "opencode":
   338→			cmd = exec.Command("opencode", message)
   339→		case "aider":
   340→			// Aider: Use --message flag for non-interactive mode
   341→			cmd = exec.Command("aider", "--message", message)
   342→		case "sgpt":
   343→			// Shell GPT: Direct message input
   344→			cmd = exec.Command("sgpt", message)
   345→		default:
   346→			return aiResponseMsg{
   347→				response: "",
   348→				agent:    agent.Command,
   349→				error:    fmt.Errorf("unknown agent command: %s", agent.Command),
   350→			}
   351→		}
   352→
   353→		// Set working directory
   354→		if wd, err := os.Getwd(); err == nil {
   355→			cmd.Dir = wd
   356→		}
   357→
   358→		// Execute command
   359→		output, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
   360→		return aiResponseMsg{
   361→			response: string(output),
   362→			agent:    agent.Command,
   363→			error:    err,
   364→		}
   365→	}
   366→}
   367→
   368→// View renders the AI assistant interface
   369→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) View() string {
   370→	if !ai.active {
   371→		return ""
   372→	}
   373→
   374→	var sections []string
   375→
   376→	// Header
   377→	sections = append(sections, ai.renderHeader())
   378→
   379→	// Agent selector or chat interface
   380→	if ai.showAgentSelector {
   381→		sections = append(sections, ai.renderAgentSelector())
   382→	} else {
   383→		// Chat history
   384→		if ai.showChatHistory {
   385→			sections = append(sections, ai.renderChatHistory())
   386→		}
   387→
   388→		// Input area
   389→		sections = append(sections, ai.renderInputArea())
   390→	}
   391→
   392→	// Help footer
   393→	sections = append(sections, ai.renderHelp())
   394→
   395→	return lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, sections...)
   396→}
   397→
   398→// renderHeader renders the header section
   399→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderHeader() string {
   400→	currentAgentName := "Unknown"
   401→	currentAgentIcon := "🤖"
   402→	currentAgentColor := lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")
   403→
   404→	for _, agent := range ai.availableAgents {
   405→		if agent.Command == ai.currentAgent {
   406→			currentAgentName = agent.Name
   407→			currentAgentIcon = agent.Icon
   408→			currentAgentColor = agent.Color
   409→			break
   410→		}
   411→	}
   412→
   413→	titleStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   414→		Foreground(currentAgentColor).
   415→		Bold(true).
   416→		Padding(0, 1)
   417→
   418→	statusStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   419→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8")).
   420→		Italic(true)
   421→
   422→	processingIndicator := ""
   423→	if ai.isProcessing {
   424→		dots := strings.Repeat(".", (ai.frame/10)%4)
   425→		processingIndicator = statusStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" (processing%s)", dots))
   426→	}
   427→
   428→	title := titleStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf("%s AI Assistant - %s", currentAgentIcon, currentAgentName))
   429→
   430→	headerBox := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   431→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   432→		BorderForeground(currentAgentColor).
   433→		Padding(1, 2).
   434→		Width(ai.width - 4)
   435→
   436→	return headerBox.Render(title + processingIndicator)
   437→}
   438→
   439→// renderAgentSelector renders the agent selection interface
   440→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderAgentSelector() string {
   441→	var items []string
   442→
   443→	for i, agent := range ai.availableAgents {
   444→		style := lipgloss.NewStyle().Padding(0, 2)
   445→
   446→		if i == ai.selectedAgentIdx {
   447→			style = style.Background(agent.Color).Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#000000"))
   448→		} else if !agent.Available {
   449→			style = style.Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280"))
   450→		} else {
   451→			style = style.Foreground(agent.Color)
   452→		}
   453→
   454→		status := "✓"
   455→		if !agent.Available {
   456→			status = "✗"
   457→		}
   458→
   459→		item := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s %s - %s", status, agent.Icon, agent.Name, agent.Description)
   460→		items = append(items, style.Render(item))
   461→	}
   462→
   463→	selectorBox := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   464→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   465→		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   466→		Padding(1, 2).
   467→		Width(ai.width - 4).
   468→		Height(ai.height - 8)
   469→
   470→	content := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, items...)
   471→	return selectorBox.Render(content)
   472→}
   473→
   474→// renderChatHistory renders the chat history
   475→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderChatHistory() string {
   476→	if len(ai.chatHistory) == 0 {
   477→		emptyStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   478→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   479→			Italic(true).
   480→			Align(lipgloss.Center).
   481→			Padding(2)
   482→
   483→		return emptyStyle.Render("No conversation yet. Type a message to start chatting with your AI assistant!")
   484→	}
   485→
   486→	var messages []string
   487→	visibleHeight := ai.height - 12 // Account for header, input, and help
   488→
   489→	startIdx := ai.scrollOffset
   490→	endIdx := len(ai.chatHistory)
   491→
   492→	if endIdx-startIdx > visibleHeight {
   493→		endIdx = startIdx + visibleHeight
   494→	}
   495→
   496→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx && i < len(ai.chatHistory); i++ {
   497→		msg := ai.chatHistory[i]
   498→		messages = append(messages, ai.renderMessage(msg))
   499→	}
   500→
   501→	chatBox := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   502→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   503→		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color("#374151")).
   504→		Padding(1, 2).
   505→		Width(ai.width - 4).
   506→		Height(visibleHeight)
   507→
   508→	content := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, messages...)
   509→	return chatBox.Render(content)
   510→}
   511→
   512→// renderMessage renders a single chat message
   513→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderMessage(msg AIMessage) string {
   514→	var style lipgloss.Style
   515→	var prefix string
   516→
   517→	switch msg.Role {
   518→	case "user":
   519→		style = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#3b82f6"))
   520→		prefix = "You: "
   521→	case "assistant":
   522→		style = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#10b981"))
   523→		prefix = "AI: "
   524→	case "system":
   525→		style = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).Italic(true)
   526→		prefix = "System: "
   527→	}
   528→
   529→	timestamp := ""
   530→	if ai.timestamps {
   531→		timestamp = lipgloss.NewStyle().
   532→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   533→			Render(fmt.Sprintf("[%s] ", msg.Timestamp.Format("15:04:05")))
   534→	}
   535→
   536→	content := style.Render(prefix + msg.Content)
   537→	return timestamp + content
   538→}
   539→
   540→// renderInputArea renders the input area
   541→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderInputArea() string {
   542→	cursor := ""
   543→	if ai.cursorPos == len(ai.input) {
   544→		cursor = "│"
   545→	}
   546→
   547→	displayInput := ai.input[:ai.cursorPos] + cursor + ai.input[ai.cursorPos:]
   548→
   549→	inputStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   550→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   551→		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color("#6366f1")).
   552→		Padding(0, 2).
   553→		Width(ai.width - 4)
   554→
   555→	placeholder := ""
   556→	if ai.input == "" && !ai.isProcessing {
   557→		placeholder = lipgloss.NewStyle().
   558→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   559→			Italic(true).
   560→			Render("Type your message here...")
   561→	}
   562→
   563→	content := displayInput + placeholder
   564→	if ai.isProcessing {
   565→		content = lipgloss.NewStyle().
   566→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   567→			Italic(true).
   568→			Render("Processing your request...")
   569→	}
   570→
   571→	return inputStyle.Render(content)
   572→}
   573→
   574→// renderHelp renders the help footer
   575→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) renderHelp() string {
   576→	helpStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   577→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6b7280")).
   578→		Padding(0, 1)
   579→
   580→	help := "Tab: Select Agent • Ctrl+H: Toggle History • Ctrl+L: Clear • Ctrl+C: Cancel • ↑↓: Scroll • Enter: Send"
   581→	return helpStyle.Render(help)
   582→}
   583→
   584→// Helper methods
   585→
   586→// addMessage adds a message to the chat history
   587→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) addMessage(role, content, agent string) {
   588→	msg := AIMessage{
   589→		Role:      role,
   590→		Content:   content,
   591→		Timestamp: time.Now(),
   592→		Agent:     agent,
   593→	}
   594→
   595→	ai.chatHistory = append(ai.chatHistory, msg)
   596→
   597→	// Limit history size
   598→	if len(ai.chatHistory) > ai.maxHistorySize {
   599→		ai.chatHistory = ai.chatHistory[len(ai.chatHistory)-ai.maxHistorySize:]
   600→	}
   601→}
   602→
   603→// scrollUp scrolls the chat history up
   604→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) scrollUp() {
   605→	if ai.scrollOffset > 0 {
   606→		ai.scrollOffset--
   607→	}
   608→}
   609→
   610→// scrollDown scrolls the chat history down
   611→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) scrollDown() {
   612→	maxScroll := len(ai.chatHistory) - (ai.height - 12)
   613→	if maxScroll < 0 {
   614→		maxScroll = 0
   615→	}
   616→	if ai.scrollOffset < maxScroll {
   617→		ai.scrollOffset++
   618→	}
   619→}
   620→
   621→// scrollToBottom scrolls to the bottom of chat history
   622→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) scrollToBottom() {
   623→	maxScroll := len(ai.chatHistory) - (ai.height - 12)
   624→	if maxScroll < 0 {
   625→		maxScroll = 0
   626→	}
   627→	ai.scrollOffset = maxScroll
   628→}
   629→
   630→// Component interface implementation
   631→
   632→// SetSize sets the component size
   633→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) SetSize(width, height int) {
   634→	ai.width = width
   635→	ai.height = height
   636→}
   637→
   638→// GetViewType returns the view type
   639→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) GetViewType() ViewType {
   640→	return ViewAIAssistant
   641→}
   642→
   643→// IsActive returns whether the component is active
   644→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) IsActive() bool {
   645→	return ai.active
   646→}
   647→
   648→// SetActive sets the active state
   649→func (ai *AIAssistantModel) SetActive(active bool) {
   650→	ai.active = active
   651→	if active {
   652→		// Add welcome message if this is the first time
   653→		if len(ai.chatHistory) == 0 {
   654→			ai.addMessage("system", "Welcome to the AI Assistant! Select an agent with Tab and start chatting.", "system")
   655→		}
   656→	}
   657→}
