   114→func initialModel() model {
   115→	numCores := runtime.NumCPU()
   116→
   117→	// Initialize theme manager
   118→	themeManager := NewThemeManager()
   119→	themeManager.LoadCurrentTheme()
   120→
   121→	// Initialize view management system
   122→	viewRouter := NewViewRouter()
   123→	settingsPage := NewSettingsPageModel(themeManager)
   124→	aiAssistant := NewAIAssistantModel()
   125→
   126→	// Register components with the view manager
   127→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewSettings, settingsPage)
   128→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewAIAssistant, aiAssistant)
   129→
   130→	m := model{
   131→		viewMode:       "overview",
   132→		themeManager:   themeManager,
   133→		viewRouter:     viewRouter,
   134→		settingsPage:   settingsPage,
   135→		aiAssistant:    aiAssistant,
   136→		orbs:           make([]orb, 8),
   137→		lightRays:      make([]lightRay, 12),
   138→		matrixRain:     make([]matrixDrop, 20),
   139→		energyField:    make([]energyNode, 15),
   140→		cpuHistory:     make([][]float64, numCores),
   141→		memHistory:     make([]float64, 60),
   142→		bandwidthIn:    make([]float64, 60),
   143→		bandwidthOut:   make([]float64, 60),
   144→		networkTraffic: make([]float64, 60),
   145→		sortColumn:     "CPU",
   146→		sortReverse:    true,
   147→		selectedRow:    0,
   148→		scrollOffset:   0,
   149→		selectedPanel:  0,
   150→		glowIntensity:  0.5,
   151→		pulsePhase:     0,
   152→	}
   153→
   154→	// Initialize CPU history
   155→	for i := range m.cpuHistory {
   156→		m.cpuHistory[i] = make([]float64, 60)
   157→	}
   158→
   159→	// Initialize elegant floating orbs
   160→	colors := []lipgloss.Color{primary, secondary, accent, success, warning}
   161→	for i := range m.orbs {
   162→		m.orbs[i] = orb{
   163→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   164→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   165→			vx:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.2,
   166→			vy:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.15,
   167→			radius:      rand.Float64()*2 + 1,
   168→			intensity:   rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   169→			color:       colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   170→			pulsePeriod: rand.Float64()*4 + 2,
   171→			pulseOffset: rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   172→		}
   173→	}
   174→
   175→	// Initialize light rays
   176→	for i := range m.lightRays {
   177→		m.lightRays[i] = lightRay{
   178→			x:         rand.Float64() * 120,
   179→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   180→			angle:     rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   181→			length:    rand.Float64()*15 + 5,
   182→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.6 + 0.1,
   183→			color:     colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   184→		}
   185→	}
   186→
   187→	// Initialize matrix rain
   188→	chars := []rune("ﾊﾐﾋｰｳｼﾅﾓﾆｻﾜﾂｵﾘｱﾎﾃﾏｹﾒｴｶｷﾑﾕﾗｾﾈｽﾀﾇﾍ0123456789")
   189→	for i := range m.matrixRain {
   190→		m.matrixRain[i] = matrixDrop{
   191→			x:         float64(rand.Intn(120)),
   192→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   193→			speed:     rand.Float64()*0.3 + 0.1,
   194→			length:    rand.Intn(8) + 3,
   195→			chars:     make([]rune, rand.Intn(8)+3),
   196→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.7 + 0.3,
   197→		}
   198→		for j := range m.matrixRain[i].chars {
   199→			m.matrixRain[i].chars[j] = chars[rand.Intn(len(chars))]
   200→		}
   201→	}
   202→
   203→	// Initialize global colors from theme
   204→	m.updateGlobalColors()
   205→
   206→	// Initialize energy field
   207→	for i := range m.energyField {
   208→		connections := make([]int, 0)
   209→		// Connect to 1-3 random other nodes
   210→		numConnections := rand.Intn(3) + 1
   211→		for j := 0; j < numConnections; j++ {
   212→			target := rand.Intn(len(m.energyField))
   213→			if target != i {
   214→				connections = append(connections, target)
   215→			}
   216→		}
   217→
   218→		m.energyField[i] = energyNode{
   219→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   220→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   221→			connections: connections,
   222→			pulsePhase:  rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   223→			energy:      rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   224→		}
   225→	}
   226→
   227→	return m
   228→}
   229→
   230→func (m model) Init() tea.Cmd {
   231→	return tea.Batch(
   232→		tea.EnterAltScreen,
   233→		tick(),
   234→		fetchProcesses(),
   235→		fetchNetworkData(),
   236→		fetchSystemAlerts(),
   237→	)
   238→}
   239→
   240→func tick() tea.Cmd {
   241→	return tea.Tick(time.Millisecond*50, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
   242→		return tickMsg(t)
   243→	})
   244→}
   245→
   246→func fetchProcesses() tea.Cmd {
   247→	return func() tea.Msg {
   248→		processes, stats := getProcessesAndStats()
   249→		return processData{
   250→			processes:   processes,
   251→			systemStats: stats,
   252→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   253→		}
   254→	}
   255→}
   256→
   257→type networkData struct {
   258→	connections []NetworkConnection
   259→	interfaces  []NetworkInterface
   260→	lastUpdate  time.Time
   261→}
   262→
   263→type alertData struct {
   264→	alerts     []SystemAlert
   265→	lastUpdate time.Time
   266→}
   267→
   268→func fetchNetworkData() tea.Cmd {
   269→	return func() tea.Msg {
   270→		connections := getNetworkConnections()
   271→		interfaces := getNetworkInterfaces()
   272→		return networkData{
   273→			connections: connections,
   274→			interfaces:  interfaces,
   275→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   276→		}
   277→	}
   278→}
   279→
   280→func fetchSystemAlerts() tea.Cmd {
   281→	return func() tea.Msg {
   282→		alerts := getSystemAlerts()
   283→		return alertData{
   284→			alerts:     alerts,
   285→			lastUpdate: time.Now(),
   286→		}
   287→	}
   288→}
   289→
   290→func (m model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
   291→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   292→	case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
   293→		m.width = msg.Width
   294→		m.height = msg.Height
   295→
   296→		// Update component sizes
   297→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   298→			m.settingsPage.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   299→		}
   300→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   301→			m.aiAssistant.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   302→		}
   303→
   304→		return m, nil
   305→
   306→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   307→		if m.showKillDialog {
   308→			switch msg.String() {
   309→			case "y", "Y":
   310→				killProcess(m.killPID)
   311→				m.showKillDialog = false
   312→				return m, fetchProcesses()
   313→			case "n", "N", "esc":
   314→				m.showKillDialog = false
   315→				return m, nil
   316→			}
   317→			return m, nil
   318→		}
   319→
   320→		if m.searchMode {
   321→			switch msg.String() {
   322→			case "esc":
   323→				m.searchMode = false
   324→				m.searchQuery = ""
   325→				m.filteredProcs = m.processes
   326→				return m, nil
   327→			case "enter":
   328→				m.searchMode = false
   329→				return m, nil
   330→			case "backspace":
   331→				if len(m.searchQuery) > 0 {
   332→					m.searchQuery = m.searchQuery[:len(m.searchQuery)-1]
   333→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   334→				}
   335→				return m, nil
   336→			default:
   337→				if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   338→					m.searchQuery += msg.String()
   339→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   340→				}
   341→				return m, nil
   342→			}
   343→		}
   344→
   345→		switch {
   346→		case key.Matches(msg, quitKeys):
   347→			m.quitting = true
   348→			return m, tea.Quit
   349→
   350→		case key.Matches(msg, tabKeys):
   351→			modes := []string{"overview", "processes", "network", "alerts", "settings", "ai"}
   352→			currentIndex := 0
   353→			for i, mode := range modes {
   354→				if mode == m.viewMode {
   355→					currentIndex = i
   356→					break
   357→				}
   358→			}
   359→			newMode := modes[(currentIndex+1)%len(modes)]
   360→			m.viewMode = newMode
   361→
   362→			// Handle component activation/deactivation
   363→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   364→			if newMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil {
   365→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   366→			} else if newMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil {
   367→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   368→			}
   369→
   370→			m.selectedRow = 0
   371→			m.scrollOffset = 0
   372→			return m, nil
   373→
   374→		case msg.String() == "1":
   375→			m.viewMode = "overview"
   376→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   377→			return m, nil
   378→		case msg.String() == "2":
   379→			m.viewMode = "processes"
   380→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   381→			return m, nil
   382→		case msg.String() == "3":
   383→			m.viewMode = "network"
   384→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   385→			return m, nil
   386→		case msg.String() == "4":
   387→			m.viewMode = "alerts"
   388→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   389→			return m, nil
   390→		case msg.String() == "5":
   391→			m.viewMode = "settings"
   392→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   393→			if m.settingsPage != nil {
   394→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   395→			}
   396→			return m, nil
   397→		case msg.String() == "6":
   398→			m.viewMode = "ai"
   399→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   400→			if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   401→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   402→			}
   403→			return m, nil
   404→		case msg.String() == "!":
   405→			m.viewMode = "bash"
   406→			return m, nil
   407→		case msg.String() == "t":
   408→			// Cycle through themes
   409→			return m.cycleTheme()
   410→
   411→		case key.Matches(msg, killKeys):
   412→			if m.viewMode == "processes" && len(m.filteredProcs) > 0 && m.selectedRow < len(m.filteredProcs) {
   413→				m.killPID = m.filteredProcs[m.selectedRow].PID
   414→				m.showKillDialog = true
   415→			}
   416→			return m, nil
   417→
   418→		case key.Matches(msg, searchKeys):
   419→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   420→				m.searchMode = true
   421→				m.searchQuery = ""
   422→			}
   423→			return m, nil
   424→
   425→		case msg.String() == "up", msg.String() == "k":
   426→			if m.selectedRow > 0 {
   427→				m.selectedRow--
   428→				if m.selectedRow < m.scrollOffset {
   429→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow
   430→				}
   431→			}
   432→			return m, nil
   433→
   434→		case msg.String() == "down", msg.String() == "j":
   435→			maxItems := 0
   436→			switch m.viewMode {
   437→			case "processes":
   438→				maxItems = len(m.filteredProcs)
   439→			case "network":
   440→				maxItems = len(m.connections)
   441→			case "alerts":
   442→				maxItems = len(m.alerts)
   443→			}
   444→
   445→			if m.selectedRow < maxItems-1 {
   446→				m.selectedRow++
   447→				visibleRows := m.height - 15
   448→				if m.selectedRow >= m.scrollOffset+visibleRows {
   449→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow - visibleRows + 1
   450→				}
   451→			}
   452→			return m, nil
   453→
   454→		case msg.String() == "c":
   455→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   456→				m.sortColumn = "CPU"
   457→				m.sortProcesses()
   458→			}
   459→			return m, nil
   460→
   461→		case msg.String() == "m":
   462→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   463→				m.sortColumn = "Memory"
   464→				m.sortProcesses()
   465→			}
   466→			return m, nil
   467→
   468→		case msg.String() == "p":
   469→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   470→				m.sortColumn = "PID"
   471→				m.sortProcesses()
   472→			}
   473→			return m, nil
   474→		}
   475→
   476→		// Route messages to active components
   477→		if m.viewMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil && m.settingsPage.IsActive() {
   478→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.settingsPage.Update(msg)
   479→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   480→				m.settingsPage = updatedComponent.(*SettingsPageModel)
   481→			}
   482→			if cmd != nil {
   483→				return m, cmd
   484→			}
   485→		}
   486→
   487→		if m.viewMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil && m.aiAssistant.IsActive() {
   488→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.aiAssistant.Update(msg)
   489→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   490→				m.aiAssistant = updatedComponent.(*AIAssistantModel)
   491→			}
   492→			if cmd != nil {
   493→				return m, cmd
   494→			}
   495→		}
   496→
   497→		return m, nil
   498→
   499→	case tickMsg:
   500→		m.frame++
   501→		m.pulsePhase += 0.05
   502→		m.glowIntensity = 0.3 + 0.2*math.Sin(m.pulsePhase)
   503→
   504→		// Update elegant orbs
   505→		for i := range m.orbs {
   506→			orb := &m.orbs[i]
   507→			orb.x += orb.vx
   508→			orb.y += orb.vy
   509→
   510→			// Gentle bouncing with smooth curves
   511→			if orb.x <= 0 || orb.x >= 120 {
   512→				orb.vx *= -0.8
   513→				orb.x = math.Max(0, math.Min(120, orb.x))
   514→			}
   515→			if orb.y <= 0 || orb.y >= 40 {
   516→				orb.vy *= -0.8
   517→				orb.y = math.Max(0, math.Min(40, orb.y))
   518→			}
   519→
   520→			// Update pulse
   521→			orb.intensity = 0.3 + 0.5*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.02*orb.pulsePeriod+orb.pulseOffset)
   522→		}
   523→
   524→		// Update light rays
   525→		for i := range m.lightRays {
   526→			ray := &m.lightRays[i]
   527→			ray.angle += 0.01
   528→			ray.intensity = 0.2 + 0.4*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.03+float64(i))
   529→		}
   530→
   531→		// Update matrix rain
   532→		for i := range m.matrixRain {
   533→			drop := &m.matrixRain[i]
   534→			drop.y += drop.speed
   535→			if drop.y > 40 {
   536→				drop.y = -float64(drop.length)
   537→				drop.x = float64(rand.Intn(120))
   538→			}
   539→		}
   540→
   541→		// Update energy field
   542→		for i := range m.energyField {
   543→			node := &m.energyField[i]
   544→			node.pulsePhase += 0.02
   545→			node.energy = 0.4 + 0.4*math.Sin(node.pulsePhase)
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		// Fetch new data periodically
   549→		var cmds []tea.Cmd
   550→		if m.frame%40 == 0 { // 2 seconds
   551→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchProcesses())
   552→		}
   553→		if m.frame%50 == 0 { // 2.5 seconds
   554→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchNetworkData())
   555→		}
   556→		if m.frame%80 == 0 { // 4 seconds
   557→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchSystemAlerts())
   558→		}
   559→
   560→		cmds = append(cmds, tick())
   561→		return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   562→
   563→	case processData:
   564→		m.processes = msg.processes
   565→		m.systemStats = msg.systemStats
   566→
   567→		// Update histories smoothly
   568→		for i, usage := range msg.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   569→			if i < len(m.cpuHistory) {
   570→				m.cpuHistory[i] = append(m.cpuHistory[i][1:], usage)
   571→			}
   572→		}
   573→
   574→		memUsagePercent := float64(msg.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(msg.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   575→		m.memHistory = append(m.memHistory[1:], memUsagePercent)
   576→
   577→		m.sortProcesses()
   578→		m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   579→
   580→		if m.selectedRow >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
   581→			m.selectedRow = max(0, len(m.filteredProcs)-1)
   582→		}
   583→
   584→		return m, nil
   585→
   586→	case networkData:
   587→		m.connections = msg.connections
   588→		m.interfaces = msg.interfaces
   589→
   590→		// Update network traffic history
   591→		totalTraffic := 0.0
   592→		for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
   593→			totalTraffic += float64(iface.BytesIn+iface.BytesOut) / 1024 / 1024 // MB
   594→		}
   595→		m.networkTraffic = append(m.networkTraffic[1:], totalTraffic)
   596→
   597→		return m, nil
   598→
   599→	case alertData:
   600→		m.alerts = msg.alerts
   601→		return m, nil
   602→
   603→	case errMsg:
   604→		m.err = msg
   605→		return m, nil
   606→	}
   607→
   608→	return m, nil
   609→}
   610→
   611→func (m model) View() string {
   612→	if m.quitting {
   613→		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
   614→			Foreground(primary).
   615→			Align(lipgloss.Center).
   616→			Render("Disconnecting from the matrix...\n")
   617→	}
   618→
   619→	if m.width == 0 || m.height == 0 {
   620→		return "Initializing elegant interface..."
   621→	}
   622→
   623→	// Create main layout
   624→	header := m.renderHeader()
   625→	tabs := m.renderViewTabs()
   626→	content := m.renderContent()
   627→	controls := m.renderControls()
   628→
   629→	// Add subtle background effects
   630→	bg := m.renderBackgroundEffects()
   631→
   632→	layout := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   633→		header,
   634→		tabs,
   635→		content,
   636→		controls,
   637→	)
   638→
   639→	// Overlay background effects
   640→	return m.overlayEffects(layout, bg)
   641→}
   642→
   643→func (m model) renderHeader() string {
   644→	title := "⟨ QUANTUM COMMAND CENTER ⟩"
   645→
   646→	titleStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   647→		Foreground(primary).
   648→		Bold(true).
   649→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   650→		Width(m.width)
   651→
   652→	// Add subtle glow effect
   653→	glowStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   654→		Foreground(glow).
   655→		Faint(true).
   656→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   657→		Width(m.width)
   658→
   659→	time := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   660→		Foreground(textMuted).
   661→		Align(lipgloss.Right).
   662→		Width(m.width).
   663→		Render(fmt.Sprintf("◉ %s", time.Now().Format("15:04:05")))
   664→
   665→	return lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   666→		glowStyle.Render("═══════════════════════════════════════"),
   667→		titleStyle.Render(title),
   668→		glowStyle.Render("═══════════════════════════════════════"),
   669→		time,
   670→		"",
   671→	)
   672→}
   673→
   674→func (m model) renderViewTabs() string {
   675→	tabs := []struct {
   676→		key   string
   677→		name  string
   678→		icon  string
   679→		color lipgloss.Color
   680→	}{
   681→		{"1", "Overview", "⬢", primary},
   682→		{"2", "Processes", "⚡", secondary},
   683→		{"3", "Network", "◈", accent},
   684→		{"4", "Alerts", "⚠", warning},
   685→		{"5", "Settings", "⚙️", danger},
   686→		{"6", "AI Assistant", "🤖", success},
   687→		{"!", "Bash", "⚡", accent},
   688→	}
   689→
   690→	activeIndex := 0
   691→	switch m.viewMode {
   692→	case "overview":
   693→		activeIndex = 0
   694→	case "processes":
   695→		activeIndex = 1
   696→	case "network":
   697→		activeIndex = 2
   698→	case "alerts":
   699→		activeIndex = 3
   700→	case "settings":
   701→		activeIndex = 4
   702→	case "ai":
   703→		activeIndex = 5
   704→	case "bash":
   705→		activeIndex = 6
   706→	}
   707→
   708→	var tabStrs []string
   709→	for i, tab := range tabs {
   710→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s %s", tab.icon, tab.key, tab.name)
   711→
   712→		if i == activeIndex {
   713→			// Active tab with elegant styling
   714→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   715→				Foreground(bg).
   716→				Background(tab.color).
   717→				Bold(true).
   718→				Padding(0, 2).
   719→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   720→				BorderForeground(tab.color).
   721→				Render(content))
   722→		} else {
   723→			// Inactive tab with subtle styling
   724→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   725→				Foreground(tab.color).
   726→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   727→				BorderForeground(textFaint).
   728→				Padding(0, 2).
   729→				Render(content))
   730→		}
   731→	}
   732→
   733→	return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Center, tabStrs...) + "\n"
   734→}
   735→
   736→func (m model) renderContent() string {
   737→	switch m.viewMode {
   738→	case "overview":
   739→		return m.renderOverview()
   740→	case "processes":
   741→		return m.renderProcesses()
   742→	case "network":
   743→		return m.renderNetwork()
   744→	case "alerts":
   745→		return m.renderAlerts()
   746→	case "bash":
   747→		return m.renderBashTerminal()
   748→	case "settings":
   749→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   750→			return m.settingsPage.View()
   751→		}
   752→		return "Settings not available"
   753→	case "ai":
   754→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   755→			return m.aiAssistant.View()
   756→		}
   757→		return "AI Assistant not available"
   758→	default:
   759→		return m.renderOverview()
   760→	}
   761→}
   762→
   763→func (m model) renderOverview() string {
   764→	leftPanel := m.renderSystemPanel()
   765→	centerPanel := m.renderNetworkPanel()
   766→	rightPanel := m.renderAlertsPanel()
   767→
   768→	panelStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   769→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   770→		Padding(1, 2).
   771→		Height(m.height - 12)
   772→
   773→	leftStyled := panelStyle.Copy().
   774→		BorderForeground(primary).
   775→		Width((m.width / 3) - 2).
   776→		Render(leftPanel)
   777→
   778→	centerStyled := panelStyle.Copy().
   779→		BorderForeground(accent).
   780→		Width((m.width / 3) - 2).
   781→		Render(centerPanel)
   782→
   783→	rightStyled := panelStyle.Copy().
   784→		BorderForeground(warning).
   785→		Width((m.width / 3) - 2).
   786→		Render(rightPanel)
   787→
   788→	return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, leftStyled, centerStyled, rightStyled)
   789→}

   791→func (m model) renderSystemPanel() string {
   792→	var s strings.Builder
   793→
   794→	// Title with icon
   795→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   796→		Foreground(primary).
   797→		Bold(true).
   798→		Render("⬢ SYSTEM STATUS")
   799→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   800→
   801→	// CPU information
   802→	if len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage) > 0 {
   803→		avgCPU := 0.0
   804→		for _, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   805→			avgCPU += usage
   806→		}
   807→		avgCPU /= float64(len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage))
   808→
   809→		cpuLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("CPU Usage:")
   810→		cpuBar := m.renderElegantBar(avgCPU, 100, 20, success, danger)
   811→		cpuText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%%", avgCPU))
   812→
   813→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s %s\n\n", cpuLabel, cpuBar, cpuText))
   814→
   815→		// CPU cores
   816→		s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render("Cores:\n"))
   817→		for i, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   818→			if i >= 8 {
   819→				break
   820→			} // Limit display
   821→			coreBar := m.renderMiniBar(usage, 100, 12, success, danger)
   822→			s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("C%d %s %.1f%%\n", i, coreBar, usage))
   823→		}
   824→		s.WriteString("\n")
   825→	}
   826→
   827→	// Memory information
   828→	if m.systemStats.MemTotal > 0 {
   829→		memUsage := float64(m.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(m.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   830→
   831→		memLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Memory Usage:")
   832→		memBar := m.renderElegantBar(memUsage, 100, 20, success, danger)
   833→		memText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%% (%s/%s)",
   834→			memUsage, formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemUsed), formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemTotal)))
   835→
   836→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n%s\n\n", memLabel, memBar, memText))
   837→	}
   838→
   839→	// Load average
   840→	loadText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Load Average:")
   841→	loadValues := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(
   842→		fmt.Sprintf("%.2f %.2f %.2f", m.systemStats.LoadAvg[0], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[1], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[2]))
   843→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n\n", loadText, loadValues))
   844→
   845→	// Uptime
   846→	uptimeText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Uptime:")
   847→	uptimeValue := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(formatDuration(m.systemStats.Uptime))
   848→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s", uptimeText, uptimeValue))
   849→
   850→	return s.String()
   851→}

   974→func (m model) renderProcesses() string {
   975→	var s strings.Builder
   976→
   977→	// Header
   978→	title := fmt.Sprintf("⚡ PROCESS MONITOR (%d processes)", len(m.filteredProcs))
   979→	if m.searchQuery != "" {
   980→		title += fmt.Sprintf(" - Filtered: '%s'", m.searchQuery)
   981→	}
   982→
   983→	headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   984→		Foreground(secondary).
   985→		Bold(true)
   986→	s.WriteString(headerStyle.Render(title) + "\n\n")
   987→
   988→	// Column headers with elegant styling
   989→	headers := []string{"PID", "USER", "CPU%", "MEM%", "STATE", "COMMAND"}
   990→	widths := []int{8, 12, 8, 8, 8, m.width - 50}
   991→
   992→	var headerParts []string
   993→	for i, header := range headers {
   994→		headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   995→			Foreground(primary).
   996→			Bold(true).
   997→			Width(widths[i]).
   998→			Align(lipgloss.Left)
   999→		headerParts = append(headerParts, headerStyle.Render(header))
  1000→	}
  1001→
  1002→	s.WriteString(strings.Join(headerParts, " ") + "\n")
  1003→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1004→		Foreground(textFaint).
  1005→		Render(strings.Repeat("─", m.width-2)) + "\n\n")
  1006→
  1007→	// Process list
  1008→	visibleRows := m.height - 15
  1009→	startIdx := m.scrollOffset
  1010→	endIdx := min(startIdx+visibleRows, len(m.filteredProcs))
  1011→
  1012→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx; i++ {
  1013→		if i >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
  1014→			break
  1015→		}
  1016→
  1017→		proc := m.filteredProcs[i]
  1018→		isSelected := i == m.selectedRow
  1019→
  1020→		// Dynamic colors based on values
  1021→		var cpuColor, memColor, stateColor lipgloss.Color
  1022→
  1023→		if proc.CPU > 80 {
  1024→			cpuColor = danger
  1025→		} else if proc.CPU > 40 {
  1026→			cpuColor = warning
  1027→		} else {
  1028→			cpuColor = success
  1029→		}
  1030→
  1031→		if proc.Memory > 10 {
  1032→			memColor = danger
  1033→		} else if proc.Memory > 5 {
  1034→			memColor = warning
  1035→		} else {
  1036→			memColor = success
  1037→		}
  1038→
  1039→		switch proc.State {
  1040→		case "R", "R+":
  1041→			stateColor = success
  1042→		case "S", "S+":
  1043→			stateColor = accent
  1044→		case "T":
  1045→			stateColor = warning
  1046→		case "Z":
  1047→			stateColor = danger
  1048→		default:
  1049→			stateColor = textMuted
  1050→		}
  1051→
  1052→		// Format fields
  1053→		pidText := fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID)
  1054→		userText := proc.User
  1055→		cpuText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.CPU)
  1056→		memText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.Memory)
  1057→		stateText := proc.State
  1058→
  1059→		command := proc.Command
  1060→		if len(command) > widths[5] {
  1061→			command = command[:widths[5]-3] + "..."
  1062→		}
  1063→
  1064→		// Create row parts
  1065→		parts := []string{
  1066→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[0]).Render(pidText),
  1067→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[1]).Render(userText),
  1068→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[2]).Foreground(cpuColor).Render(cpuText),
  1069→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[3]).Foreground(memColor).Render(memText),
  1070→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[4]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(stateText),
  1071→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render(command),
  1072→		}
  1073→
  1074→		row := strings.Join(parts, " ")
  1075→
  1076→		if isSelected {
  1077→			row = lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1078→				Foreground(bg).
  1079→				Background(primary).
  1080→				Bold(true).
  1081→				Width(m.width - 2).
  1082→				Render(" " + row + " ")
  1083→		}
  1084→
  1085→		s.WriteString(row + "\n")
  1086→	}
  1087→
  1088→	return s.String()
  1089→}

  1155→		default:

  1158→
  1159→		local := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.LocalAddr, conn.LocalPort)
  1160→		remote := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.RemoteAddr, conn.RemotePort)
  1161→
  1162→		if len(local) > connWidths[1] {
  1163→			local = local[:connWidths[1]-3] + "..."

  1165→		if len(remote) > connWidths[2] {

  1168→		if len(conn.ProcessName) > connWidths[4] {

  1171→
  1172→		parts := []string{

  1174→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[1]).Render(local),
  1175→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[2]).Render(remote),
  1176→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[3]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(conn.State),
  1177→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(conn.ProcessName),
  1178→		}
  1179→
  1180→		s.WriteString(strings.Join(parts, " ") + "\n")
  1181→	}
  1182→
  1183→	return s.String()

  1263→func (m model) renderControls() string {

  1281→	default:

  1287→
  1288→	controls = append(controls, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(danger).Render("q: quit"))

  1290→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().

  1299→// Enhanced visual effects
  1300→func (m model) renderElegantBar(value, max float64, width int, lowColor, highColor lipgloss.Color) string {
  1301→	if max == 0 {
  1302→		return ""
  1303→	}
  1304→
  1305→	ratio := value / max
  1306→	filled := int(ratio * float64(width))
  1307→	if filled > width {
  1308→		filled = width
  1309→	}
  1310→
  1311→	// Create gradient effect
  1312→	var segments []string
  1313→	for i := 0; i < width; i++ {
  1314→		if i < filled {
  1315→			if ratio > 0.7 {
  1316→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(highColor).Render("█"))
  1317→			} else if ratio > 0.4 {
  1318→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(warning).Render("█"))
  1319→			} else {
  1320→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lowColor).Render("█"))
  1321→			}
  1322→		} else {
  1323→			segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textFaint).Render("░"))
  1324→		}
  1325→	}
  1326→
  1327→	return strings.Join(segments, "")
  1328→}

  1330→func (m model) renderMiniBar(value, max float64, width int, lowColor, highColor lipgloss.Color) string {
  1331→	if max == 0 {
  1332→		return ""
  1333→	}
  1334→
  1335→	ratio := value / max
  1336→	filled := int(ratio * float64(width))
  1337→	if filled > width {
  1338→		filled = width
  1339→	}
  1340→
  1341→	bar := strings.Repeat("▓", filled) + strings.Repeat("░", width-filled)
  1342→
  1343→	color := lowColor
  1344→	if ratio > 0.7 {
  1345→		color = highColor
  1346→	} else if ratio > 0.4 {
  1347→		color = warning
  1348→	}
  1349→
  1350→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(color).Render(bar)
  1351→}

  1353→func (m model) renderNetworkActivity() string {
  1354→	var lines []string

  1356→	// Create a wave pattern for network activity
  1357→	for row := 0; row < 6; row++ {

  1360→			char := "·"
  1361→

  1363→			waveHeight := 2.0 + 1.5*math.Sin(float64(col)*0.3+float64(m.frame)*0.05)

  1365→				char = "~"
  1366→			}
  1367→
  1368→			// Add data flow indicators

  1370→				char = "◦"
  1371→			}
  1372→
  1373→			line.WriteString(char)
  1374→		}
  1375→
  1376→		color := accent
  1377→		if row == 2 || row == 3 {
  1378→			color = primary
  1379→		}
  1380→
  1381→		lines = append(lines, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(color).Render(line.String()))
  1382→	}
  1383→
  1384→	return strings.Join(lines, "\n")

  1398→// Utility functions
  1399→func formatBytes(bytes uint64) string {
  1400→	const unit = 1024
  1401→	if bytes < unit {
  1402→		return fmt.Sprintf("%d B", bytes)
  1403→	}
  1404→	div, exp := int64(unit), 0
  1405→	for n := bytes / unit; n >= unit; n /= unit {
  1406→		div *= unit
  1407→		exp++
  1408→	}
  1409→	return fmt.Sprintf("%.1f %cB", float64(bytes)/float64(div), "KMGTPE"[exp])
  1410→}
  1411→
  1412→func formatDuration(d time.Duration) string {
  1413→	days := int(d.Hours()) / 24
  1414→	hours := int(d.Hours()) % 24
  1415→	minutes := int(d.Minutes()) % 60
  1416→
  1417→	if days > 0 {
  1418→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dd %dh %dm", days, hours, minutes)
  1419→	}
  1420→	if hours > 0 {
  1421→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dh %dm", hours, minutes)
  1422→	}
  1423→	return fmt.Sprintf("%dm", minutes)
  1424→}

  1430→// Process management functions
  1431→func (m *model) sortProcesses() {
  1432→	if len(m.processes) == 0 {
  1433→		return
  1434→	}
  1435→
  1436→	sort.Slice(m.processes, func(i, j int) bool {
  1437→		var less bool
  1438→		switch m.sortColumn {
  1439→		case "CPU":
  1440→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1441→		case "Memory":
  1442→			less = m.processes[i].Memory < m.processes[j].Memory
  1443→		case "PID":
  1444→			less = m.processes[i].PID < m.processes[j].PID
  1445→		default:
  1446→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1447→		}
  1448→		if m.sortReverse {
  1449→			less = !less
  1450→		}
  1451→		return less
  1452→	})
  1453→}
  1454→
  1455→func filterProcesses(processes []Process, query string) []Process {
  1456→	if query == "" {
  1457→		return processes
  1458→	}
  1459→
  1460→	query = strings.ToLower(query)
  1461→	var filtered []Process
  1462→
  1463→	for _, proc := range processes {
  1464→		if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Name), query) ||
  1465→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Command), query) ||
  1466→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.User), query) ||
  1467→			strings.Contains(fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID), query) {
  1468→			filtered = append(filtered, proc)
  1469→		}
  1470→	}
  1471→
  1472→	return filtered
  1473→}

  1479→// Data fetching functions (enhanced implementations)
  1480→func getProcessesAndStats() ([]Process, SystemStats) {
  1481→	var processes []Process
  1482→	stats := SystemStats{
  1483→		CPUCores: runtime.NumCPU(),
  1484→		CPUUsage: make([]float64, runtime.NumCPU()),
  1485→	}
  1486→
  1487→	// Get CPU usage per core
  1488→	for i := 0; i < runtime.NumCPU(); i++ {
  1489→		stats.CPUUsage[i] = rand.Float64() * 100
  1490→	}
  1491→
  1492→	// Simulate memory stats
  1493→	stats.MemTotal = 8 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 8GB
  1494→	stats.MemUsed = uint64(rand.Float64() * float64(stats.MemTotal) * 0.8)
  1495→	stats.LoadAvg = [3]float64{rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2}
  1496→	stats.Uptime = time.Hour * 24 * time.Duration(rand.Intn(30))
  1497→
  1498→	// Get process list via ps
  1499→	cmd := exec.Command("ps", "axo", "pid,user,pcpu,pmem,state,ppid,etime,command")
  1500→	output, err := cmd.Output()
  1501→	if err != nil {
  1502→		return processes, stats
  1503→	}
  1504→
  1505→	lines := strings.Split(string(output), "\n")
  1506→	for i, line := range lines {
  1507→		if i == 0 || line == "" {
  1508→			continue
  1509→		}
  1510→
  1511→		fields := strings.Fields(line)
  1512→		if len(fields) < 8 {
  1513→			continue
  1514→		}
  1515→
  1516→		pid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[0])
  1517→		cpu, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[2], 64)
  1518→		mem, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[3], 64)
  1519→		ppid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[5])
  1520→
  1521→		command := strings.Join(fields[7:], " ")
  1522→		name := fields[7]
  1523→		if strings.Contains(name, "/") {
  1524→			parts := strings.Split(name, "/")
  1525→			name = parts[len(parts)-1]
  1526→		}
  1527→
  1528→		processes = append(processes, Process{
  1529→			PID:       pid,
  1530→			Name:      name,
  1531→			User:      fields[1],
  1532→			CPU:       cpu,
  1533→			Memory:    mem,
  1534→			State:     fields[4],
  1535→			PPID:      ppid,
  1536→			StartTime: fields[6],
  1537→			Command:   command,
  1538→		})
  1539→	}
  1540→
  1541→	return processes, stats
  1542→}

  1680→// cycleTheme cycles through available themes
  1681→func (m model) cycleTheme() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
  1682→	themes := m.themeManager.GetThemeNames()
  1683→	currentTheme := m.themeManager.GetCurrentTheme().Name
  1684→
  1685→	// Find current theme index
  1686→	currentIndex := 0
  1687→	for i, theme := range themes {
  1688→		if theme == currentTheme {
  1689→			currentIndex = i
  1690→			break
  1691→		}
  1692→	}
  1693→
  1694→	// Get next theme
  1695→	nextIndex := (currentIndex + 1) % len(themes)
  1696→	nextTheme := themes[nextIndex]
  1697→
  1698→	// Apply the theme
  1699→	m.themeManager.ApplyTheme(nextTheme)
  1700→
  1701→	// Update global colors
  1702→	m.updateGlobalColors()
  1703→
  1704→	return m, nil
  1705→}

   135→// Update handles messages for the settings page
   136→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   137→	var cmds []tea.Cmd
   138→
   139→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   140→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   141→		if !sp.active {
   142→			return sp, nil
   143→		}
   144→
   145→		if cmd := sp.handleKeyMsg(msg); cmd != nil {
   146→			cmds = append(cmds, cmd)
   147→		}
   148→
   149→	case ConfigUpdateMsg:
   150→		sp.config = msg.Config
   151→
   152→	case tickMsg:
   153→		sp.updateVisualEffects()
   154→		cmds = append(cmds, sp.tickCmd())
   155→	}
   156→
   157→	return sp, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   158→}

   190→// Key handling
   191→
   192→// handleKeyMsg processes key messages for the settings page
   193→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) handleKeyMsg(msg tea.KeyMsg) tea.Cmd {
   194→	if sp.editMode {
   195→		return sp.handleEditMode(msg)
   196→	}
   197→
   198→	switch msg.String() {
   199→	case "left", "h":
   200→		// Navigate to previous section
   201→		if sp.currentSection > 0 {
   202→			sp.currentSection--
   203→			sp.selectedItem = 0
   204→			sp.scrollOffset = 0
   205→		}
   206→		return nil
   207→
   208→	case "right", "l":
   209→		// Navigate to next section
   210→		if int(sp.currentSection) < len(sp.sections)-1 {
   211→			sp.currentSection++
   212→			sp.selectedItem = 0
   213→			sp.scrollOffset = 0
   214→		}
   215→		return nil
   216→
   217→	case "up", "k":
   218→		// Navigate up in current section
   219→		if sp.selectedItem > 0 {
   220→			sp.selectedItem--
   221→			if sp.selectedItem < sp.scrollOffset {
   222→				sp.scrollOffset = sp.selectedItem
   223→			}
   224→		}
   225→		return nil
   226→
   227→	case "down", "j":
   228→		// Navigate down in current section
   229→		items := sp.getSectionItems(sp.currentSection)
   230→		if sp.selectedItem < len(items)-1 {
   231→			sp.selectedItem++
   232→			visibleItems := sp.height - 10
   233→			if sp.selectedItem >= sp.scrollOffset+visibleItems {
   234→				sp.scrollOffset = sp.selectedItem - visibleItems + 1
   235→			}
   236→		}
   237→		return nil
   238→
   239→	case "enter", " ":
   240→		// Activate/edit selected item
   241→		return sp.activateSelectedItem()
   242→
   243→	case "esc":
   244→		// Exit edit mode or go back
   245→		if sp.editMode {
   246→			sp.editMode = false
   247→			return nil
   248→		}
   249→		// Could implement going back to main interface here
   250→		return nil
   251→
   252→	case "r":
   253→		// Reset current section to defaults
   254→		return sp.resetSectionToDefaults()
   255→
   256→	case "s":
   257→		// Save settings
   258→		return sp.saveSettings()
   259→
   260→	default:
   261→		// Handle section hotkeys
   262→		switch msg.String() {
   263→		case "1":
   264→			sp.currentSection = SectionGeneral
   265→		case "2":
   266→			sp.currentSection = SectionThemes
   267→		case "3":
   268→			sp.currentSection = SectionHotkeys
   269→		case "4":
   270→			sp.currentSection = SectionAdvanced
   271→		case "5":
   272→			sp.currentSection = SectionProfiles
   273→		case "6":
   274→			sp.currentSection = SectionAbout
   275→		}
   276→		sp.selectedItem = 0
   277→		sp.scrollOffset = 0
   278→		return nil
   279→	}
   280→}
   281→
   282→// handleEditMode handles key input while editing a setting
   283→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) handleEditMode(msg tea.KeyMsg) tea.Cmd {
   284→	switch msg.String() {
   285→	case "esc":
   286→		sp.editMode = false
   287→		return nil
   288→
   289→	case "enter":
   290→		// Save the edited value
   291→		cmd := sp.saveEditedValue()
   292→		sp.editMode = false
   293→		return cmd
   294→
   295→	case "left":
   296→		if sp.editCursorPos > 0 {
   297→			sp.editCursorPos--
   298→		}
   299→		return nil
   300→
   301→	case "right":
   302→		if sp.editCursorPos < len(sp.editValue) {
   303→			sp.editCursorPos++
   304→		}
   305→		return nil
   306→
   307→	case "backspace":
   308→		if sp.editCursorPos > 0 {
   309→			sp.editValue = sp.editValue[:sp.editCursorPos-1] + sp.editValue[sp.editCursorPos:]
   310→			sp.editCursorPos--
   311→		}
   312→		return nil
   313→
   314→	case "delete":
   315→		if sp.editCursorPos < len(sp.editValue) {
   316→			sp.editValue = sp.editValue[:sp.editCursorPos] + sp.editValue[sp.editCursorPos+1:]
   317→		}
   318→		return nil
   319→
   320→	case "home", "ctrl+a":
   321→		sp.editCursorPos = 0
   322→		return nil
   323→
   324→	case "end", "ctrl+e":
   325→		sp.editCursorPos = len(sp.editValue)
   326→		return nil
   327→
   328→	default:
   329→		// Regular character input
   330→		if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   331→			char := msg.String()
   332→			sp.editValue = sp.editValue[:sp.editCursorPos] + char + sp.editValue[sp.editCursorPos:]
   333→			sp.editCursorPos++
   334→		}
   335→		return nil
   336→	}
   337→}

   352→	case SectionProfiles:
   353→		return sp.getProfileItems()
   354→	case SectionAbout:
   355→		return sp.getAboutItems()
   356→	default:
   357→		return []SettingsItem{}
   358→	}
   359→}

   864→// activateSelectedItem activates the currently selected setting item
   865→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) activateSelectedItem() tea.Cmd {
   866→	items := sp.getSectionItems(sp.currentSection)
   867→	if sp.selectedItem >= len(items) {
   868→		return nil
   869→	}
   870→
   871→	item := items[sp.selectedItem]
   872→
   873→	switch item.Type {
   874→	case ItemTypeString, ItemTypeNumber, ItemTypeHotkey:
   875→		// Enter edit mode
   876→		sp.editMode = true
   877→		sp.editingItem = item.Name
   878→		sp.editValue = fmt.Sprintf("%v", item.Value)
   879→		sp.editCursorPos = len(sp.editValue)
   880→
   881→	case ItemTypeBool:
   882→		// Toggle boolean value
   883→		if sp.configManager != nil && item.Section != "" && item.Key != "" {
   884→			currentValue, _ := item.Value.(bool)
   885→			return tea.Cmd(func() tea.Msg {
   886→				err := sp.configManager.UpdateSetting(sp.config, item.Section, item.Key, !currentValue)
   887→				if err == nil && sp.config.General.AutoSave {
   888→					sp.configManager.SaveConfig(sp.config)
   889→				}
   890→				return ConfigUpdateMsg{Config: sp.config}
   891→			})
   892→		}
   893→
   894→	case ItemTypeSelection:
   895→		// Cycle through options
   896→		if len(item.Options) > 0 {
   897→			currentIndex := 0
   898→			currentValue := fmt.Sprintf("%v", item.Value)
   899→			for i, option := range item.Options {
   900→				if option == currentValue {
   901→					currentIndex = i
   902→					break
   903→				}
   904→			}
   905→			nextIndex := (currentIndex + 1) % len(item.Options)
   906→			newValue := item.Options[nextIndex]
   907→
   908→			if sp.configManager != nil && item.Section != "" && item.Key != "" {
   909→				return tea.Cmd(func() tea.Msg {
   910→					err := sp.configManager.UpdateSetting(sp.config, item.Section, item.Key, newValue)
   911→					if err == nil && sp.config.General.AutoSave {
   912→						sp.configManager.SaveConfig(sp.config)
   913→					}
   914→					return ConfigUpdateMsg{Config: sp.config}
   915→				})
   916→			}
   917→		}
   918→
   919→	case ItemTypeAction:
   920→		// Execute action
   921→		if item.Action != nil {
   922→			item.Action()
   923→		}
   924→
   925→	case ItemTypeColor:
   926→		// TODO: Implement color picker
   927→		break
   928→	}
   929→
   930→	return nil
   931→}
   932→
   933→// saveEditedValue saves the currently edited value
   934→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) saveEditedValue() tea.Cmd {
   935→	items := sp.getSectionItems(sp.currentSection)
   936→	if sp.selectedItem >= len(items) {
   937→		return nil
   938→	}
   939→
   940→	item := items[sp.selectedItem]
   941→	if sp.configManager == nil || item.Section == "" || item.Key == "" {
   942→		return nil
   943→	}
   944→
   945→	// Parse the edited value based on the item type
   946→	var value interface{}
   947→
   948→	switch item.Type {
   949→	case ItemTypeString, ItemTypeHotkey:
   950→		value = sp.editValue
   951→	case ItemTypeNumber:
   952→		if val, parseErr := time.ParseDuration(sp.editValue + "ms"); parseErr == nil {
   953→			// Handle duration values
   954→			value = val
   955→		} else {
   956→			var val float64
   957→			if floatVal, parseErr := fmt.Sscanf(sp.editValue, "%f", &val); parseErr == nil && floatVal == 1 {
   958→				// Handle numeric values
   959→				if item.Key == "particle_count" || item.Key == "memory_usage_limit_mb" {
   960→					value = int(val)
   961→				} else {
   962→					value = val
   963→				}
   964→			} else {
   965→				return nil // Invalid format
   966→			}
   967→		}
   968→	default:
   969→		return nil
   970→	}
   971→
   972→	// Update the configuration
   973→	return tea.Cmd(func() tea.Msg {
   974→		err := sp.configManager.UpdateSetting(sp.config, item.Section, item.Key, value)
   975→		if err == nil && sp.config.General.AutoSave {
   976→			sp.configManager.SaveConfig(sp.config)
   977→		}
   978→		return ConfigUpdateMsg{Config: sp.config}
   979→	})
   980→}

   982→// resetSectionToDefaults resets the current section to default values
   983→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) resetSectionToDefaults() tea.Cmd {

   988→	return tea.Cmd(func() tea.Msg {

   991→		// Reset current section based on which section is active

  1003→
  1004→		if sp.config.General.AutoSave {

  1157→// renderSettingsItem renders a single settings item
  1158→func (sp *SettingsPageModel) renderSettingsItem(item SettingsItem, selected bool) string {
  1159→	var s strings.Builder
  1160→
  1161→	// Selection indicator
  1162→	indicator := "  "
  1163→	if selected {
  1164→		indicator = "► "
  1165→	}
  1166→
  1167→	// Item name and value
  1168→	nameStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1169→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0")).
  1170→		Bold(selected)
  1171→
  1172→	valueStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1173→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8"))
  1174→
  1175→	if selected {
  1176→		nameStyle = nameStyle.Background(lipgloss.Color("#1e1e3f"))
  1177→		valueStyle = valueStyle.Background(lipgloss.Color("#1e1e3f"))
  1178→	}
  1179→
  1180→	// Format value based on type
  1181→	var valueStr string
  1182→	switch item.Type {
  1183→	case ItemTypeBool:
  1184→		if val, ok := item.Value.(bool); ok && val {
  1185→			valueStr = "✅ Enabled"
  1186→		} else {
  1187→			valueStr = "❌ Disabled"
  1188→		}
  1189→	case ItemTypeAction:
  1190→		valueStr = "Press Enter"
  1191→	default:
  1192→		valueStr = fmt.Sprintf("%v", item.Value)
  1193→	}
  1194→
  1195→	// Edit mode indicator
  1196→	if sp.editMode && sp.editingItem == item.Name {
  1197→		// Show edit cursor
  1198→		displayValue := sp.editValue
  1199→		if sp.editCursorPos < len(displayValue) {
  1200→			displayValue = displayValue[:sp.editCursorPos] + "█" + displayValue[sp.editCursorPos+1:]
  1201→		} else {
  1202→			displayValue += "█"
  1203→		}
  1204→		valueStr = displayValue
  1205→		valueStyle = valueStyle.Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
  1206→	}
  1207→
  1208→	itemLine := fmt.Sprintf("%s%-30s %s", indicator, item.Name, valueStr)
  1209→	s.WriteString(nameStyle.Width(sp.width - 2).Render(itemLine))
  1210→
  1211→	// Description (if selected)
  1212→	if selected && item.Description != "" {
  1213→		descStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1214→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#64748b")).
  1215→			Italic(true)
  1216→		s.WriteString("\n  " + descStyle.Render(item.Description))
  1217→	}
  1218→
  1219→	return s.String()
  1220→}

    12→// ThemeManager handles theme loading, switching, and management

    99→// NewThemeManager creates a new theme manager
   100→func NewThemeManager() *ThemeManager {
   101→	// Get config directory
   102→	configDir, err := os.UserConfigDir()
   103→	if err != nil {
   104→		configDir = "."
   105→	}
   106→	configDir = filepath.Join(configDir, "quantum-terminal")
   107→
   108→	// Create config directory if it doesn't exist
   109→	os.MkdirAll(configDir, 0755)
   110→
   111→	tm := &ThemeManager{
   112→		themes:       make(map[string]*Theme),
   113→		currentTheme: "quantum",
   114→		configDir:    configDir,
   115→	}
   116→
   117→	// Load built-in themes
   118→	tm.loadBuiltinThemes()
   119→
   120→	// Load user themes
   121→	tm.loadUserThemes()
   122→
   123→	return tm
   124→}

   832→
   833→// loadUserThemes loads themes from the user config directory
   834→func (tm *ThemeManager) loadUserThemes() {
   835→	themesDir := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes")
   836→
   837→	// Create themes directory if it doesn't exist
   838→	if err := os.MkdirAll(themesDir, 0755); err != nil {
   839→		return
   840→	}
   841→
   842→	// Read theme files
   843→	entries, err := os.ReadDir(themesDir)
   844→	if err != nil {
   845→		return
   846→	}
   847→
   848→	for _, entry := range entries {
   849→		if !entry.IsDir() && filepath.Ext(entry.Name()) == ".json" {
   850→			themePath := filepath.Join(themesDir, entry.Name())
   851→			if theme, err := tm.loadThemeFromFile(themePath); err == nil {
   852→				tm.themes[theme.Name] = theme
   853→			}
   854→		}
   855→	}
   856→}
   857→
   858→// loadThemeFromFile loads a theme from a JSON file
   859→func (tm *ThemeManager) loadThemeFromFile(filename string) (*Theme, error) {
   860→	data, err := os.ReadFile(filename)
   861→	if err != nil {
   862→		return nil, err
   863→	}
   864→
   865→	var theme Theme
   866→	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &theme); err != nil {
   867→		return nil, err
   868→	}
   869→
   870→	return &theme, nil
   871→}
   872→
   873→// SaveTheme saves a theme to the user config directory
   874→func (tm *ThemeManager) SaveTheme(theme *Theme) error {
   875→	themesDir := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes")
   876→	if err := os.MkdirAll(themesDir, 0755); err != nil {
   877→		return err
   878→	}
   879→
   880→	filename := filepath.Join(themesDir, theme.Name+".json")
   881→	data, err := json.MarshalIndent(theme, "", "  ")
   882→	if err != nil {
   883→		return err
   884→	}
   885→
   886→	return os.WriteFile(filename, data, 0644)
   887→}
   888→
   889→// GetTheme returns a theme by name
   890→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetTheme(name string) (*Theme, bool) {
   891→	theme, exists := tm.themes[name]
   892→	return theme, exists
   893→}
   894→
   895→// GetCurrentTheme returns the currently active theme
   896→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetCurrentTheme() *Theme {
   897→	if theme, exists := tm.themes[tm.currentTheme]; exists {
   898→		return theme
   899→	}
   900→	// Fallback to quantum theme
   901→	return tm.themes["quantum"]
   902→}
   903→
   904→// SetCurrentTheme sets the current theme
   905→func (tm *ThemeManager) SetCurrentTheme(name string) bool {
   906→	if _, exists := tm.themes[name]; exists {
   907→		tm.currentTheme = name
   908→		return true
   909→	}
   910→	return false
   911→}
   912→
   913→// GetThemeNames returns all available theme names
   914→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetThemeNames() []string {
   915→	var names []string
   916→	for name := range tm.themes {
   917→		names = append(names, name)
   918→	}
   919→	return names
   920→}
   921→
   922→// GetThemeList returns all available themes
   923→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetThemeList() []*Theme {
   924→	var themes []*Theme
   925→	for _, theme := range tm.themes {
   926→		themes = append(themes, theme)
   927→	}
   928→	return themes
   929→}
   930→
   931→// CreateCustomTheme creates a new custom theme based on an existing theme
   932→func (tm *ThemeManager) CreateCustomTheme(baseName, newName, description string) (*Theme, error) {
   933→	baseTheme, exists := tm.themes[baseName]
   934→	if !exists {
   935→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("base theme '%s' not found", baseName)
   936→	}
   937→
   938→	// Create a copy of the base theme
   939→	newTheme := *baseTheme
   940→	newTheme.Name = newName
   941→	newTheme.Description = description
   942→	newTheme.Author = "Custom"
   943→	newTheme.Version = "1.0.0"
   944→
   945→	tm.themes[newName] = &newTheme
   946→	return &newTheme, nil
   947→}
   948→
   949→// DeleteTheme removes a user theme (built-in themes cannot be deleted)
   950→func (tm *ThemeManager) DeleteTheme(name string) error {
   951→	// Check if it's a built-in theme
   952→	builtinThemes := []string{"quantum", "cyberpunk", "matrix", "neon", "classic"}
   953→	for _, builtin := range builtinThemes {
   954→		if name == builtin {
   955→			return fmt.Errorf("cannot delete built-in theme '%s'", name)
   956→		}
   957→	}
   958→
   959→	// Remove from memory
   960→	delete(tm.themes, name)
   961→
   962→	// Remove file
   963→	filename := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes", name+".json")
   964→	if err := os.Remove(filename); err != nil && !os.IsNotExist(err) {
   965→		return err
   966→	}
   967→
   968→	// If it was the current theme, switch to quantum
   969→	if tm.currentTheme == name {
   970→		tm.currentTheme = "quantum"
   971→	}
   972→
   973→	return nil
   974→}
   975→
   976→// ExportTheme exports a theme to a JSON file
   977→func (tm *ThemeManager) ExportTheme(name, filename string) error {
   978→	theme, exists := tm.themes[name]
   979→	if !exists {
   980→		return fmt.Errorf("theme '%s' not found", name)
   981→	}
   982→
   983→	data, err := json.MarshalIndent(theme, "", "  ")
   984→	if err != nil {
   985→		return err
   986→	}
   987→
   988→	return os.WriteFile(filename, data, 0644)
   989→}
   990→
   991→// ImportTheme imports a theme from a JSON file
   992→func (tm *ThemeManager) ImportTheme(filename string) error {
   993→	theme, err := tm.loadThemeFromFile(filename)
   994→	if err != nil {
   995→		return err
   996→	}
   997→
   998→	tm.themes[theme.Name] = theme
   999→	return tm.SaveTheme(theme)
  1000→}
  1001→
  1002→// ApplyTheme applies a theme to the current application state
  1003→func (tm *ThemeManager) ApplyTheme(name string) error {
  1004→	if !tm.SetCurrentTheme(name) {
  1005→		return fmt.Errorf("theme '%s' not found", name)
  1006→	}
  1007→
  1008→	// Save current theme preference
  1009→	return tm.saveCurrentTheme()
  1010→}
  1011→
  1012→// saveCurrentTheme saves the current theme preference to config
  1013→func (tm *ThemeManager) saveCurrentTheme() error {
  1014→	configFile := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "current_theme")
  1015→	return os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte(tm.currentTheme), 0644)
  1016→}
  1017→
  1018→// LoadCurrentTheme loads the saved theme preference
  1019→func (tm *ThemeManager) LoadCurrentTheme() {
  1020→	configFile := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "current_theme")
  1021→	if data, err := os.ReadFile(configFile); err == nil {
  1022→		themeName := string(data)
  1023→		if _, exists := tm.themes[themeName]; exists {
  1024→			tm.currentTheme = themeName
  1025→		}
  1026→	}
  1027→}
  1028→
  1029→// GetLipglossColors converts theme colors to lipgloss colors for easy use
  1030→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetLipglossColors() map[string]lipgloss.Color {
  1031→	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
  1032→	return map[string]lipgloss.Color{
  1033→		"primary":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Primary),
  1034→		"secondary":          lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Secondary),
  1035→		"accent":             lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Accent),
  1036→		"success":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Success),
  1037→		"warning":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Warning),
  1038→		"danger":             lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Danger),
  1039→		"background":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Background),
  1040→		"background_light":   lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.BackgroundLight),
  1041→		"background_dark":    lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.BackgroundDark),
  1042→		"text":               lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Text),
  1043→		"text_muted":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.TextMuted),
  1044→		"text_faint":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.TextFaint),
  1045→		"glow":               lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Glow),
  1046→		"pulse":              lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Pulse),
  1047→		"terminal_bg":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Background),
  1048→		"terminal_fg":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Foreground),
  1049→		"terminal_cursor":    lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Cursor),
  1050→		"terminal_selection": lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Selection),
  1051→		"ai_user":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.User),
  1052→		"ai_assistant":       lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.Assistant),
  1053→		"ai_system":          lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.System),
  1054→		"ai_error":           lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.Error),
  1055→		"system_cpu":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.CPU),
  1056→		"system_memory":      lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Memory),
  1057→		"system_network":     lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Network),
  1058→		"system_disk":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Disk),
  1059→	}
  1060→}
  1061→
  1062→// GetBorderStyle returns the appropriate lipgloss border style for the theme
  1063→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetBorderStyle() lipgloss.Border {
  1064→	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
  1065→	switch theme.Styles.BorderStyle {
  1066→	case "rounded":
  1067→		return lipgloss.RoundedBorder()
  1068→	case "thick":
  1069→		return lipgloss.ThickBorder()
  1070→	case "double":
  1071→		return lipgloss.DoubleBorder()
  1072→	default:
  1073→		return lipgloss.NormalBorder()
  1074→	}
  1075→}
  1076→
  1077→// IsEffectEnabled checks if a visual effect is enabled in the current theme
  1078→func (tm *ThemeManager) IsEffectEnabled(effect string) bool {
  1079→	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
  1080→	switch effect {
  1081→	case "orbs":
  1082→		return theme.Effects.EnableOrbs
  1083→	case "light_rays":
  1084→		return theme.Effects.EnableLightRays
  1085→	case "matrix":
  1086→		return theme.Effects.EnableMatrix
  1087→	case "energy":
  1088→		return theme.Effects.EnableEnergy
  1089→	default:
  1090→		return false
  1091→	}
  1092→}
  1093→
  1094→// GetEffectSettings returns effect settings for the current theme
  1095→func (tm *ThemeManager) GetEffectSettings() ThemeEffects {
  1096→	return tm.GetCurrentTheme().Effects
  1097→}

package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
)

// ThemeManager handles theme loading, switching, and management
type ThemeManager struct {
	themes       map[string]*Theme
	currentTheme string
	configDir    string
}

// Theme represents a complete color theme for the application
type Theme struct {
	Name        string            `json:"name"`
	Description string            `json:"description"`
	Author      string            `json:"author"`
	Version     string            `json:"version"`
	Colors      ThemeColors       `json:"colors"`
	Styles      ThemeStyles       `json:"styles"`
	Effects     ThemeEffects      `json:"effects"`
	Custom      map[string]string `json:"custom,omitempty"`
}

// ThemeColors defines all the colors used in the theme
type ThemeColors struct {
	// Primary colors
	Primary   string `json:"primary"`
	Secondary string `json:"secondary"`
	Accent    string `json:"accent"`
	Success   string `json:"success"`
	Warning   string `json:"warning"`
	Danger    string `json:"danger"`

	// Background colors
	Background      string `json:"background"`
	BackgroundLight string `json:"background_light"`
	BackgroundDark  string `json:"background_dark"`

	// Text colors
	Text      string `json:"text"`
	TextMuted string `json:"text_muted"`
	TextFaint string `json:"text_faint"`

	// Special effects
	Glow  string `json:"glow"`
	Pulse string `json:"pulse"`

	// Component-specific colors
	Terminal struct {
		Background string `json:"background"`
		Foreground string `json:"foreground"`
		Cursor     string `json:"cursor"`
		Selection  string `json:"selection"`
	} `json:"terminal"`

	AI struct {
		User      string `json:"user"`
		Assistant string `json:"assistant"`
		System    string `json:"system"`
		Error     string `json:"error"`
	} `json:"ai"`

	System struct {
		CPU     string `json:"cpu"`
		Memory  string `json:"memory"`
		Network string `json:"network"`
		Disk    string `json:"disk"`
	} `json:"system"`
}

// ThemeStyles defines styling preferences
type ThemeStyles struct {
	BorderStyle     string `json:"border_style"`     // "rounded", "normal", "thick", "double"
	ProgressStyle   string `json:"progress_style"`   // "blocks", "gradient", "simple"
	AnimationSpeed  string `json:"animation_speed"`  // "slow", "normal", "fast"
	Transparency    bool   `json:"transparency"`     // Enable transparency effects
	ShadowEffects   bool   `json:"shadow_effects"`   // Enable shadow effects
	GradientEffects bool   `json:"gradient_effects"` // Enable gradient effects
}

// ThemeEffects defines visual effects settings
type ThemeEffects struct {
	EnableOrbs      bool    `json:"enable_orbs"`
	EnableLightRays bool    `json:"enable_light_rays"`
	EnableMatrix    bool    `json:"enable_matrix"`
	EnableEnergy    bool    `json:"enable_energy"`
	GlowIntensity   float64 `json:"glow_intensity"`
	PulseSpeed      float64 `json:"pulse_speed"`
	ParticleCount   int     `json:"particle_count"`
}

// NewThemeManager creates a new theme manager
func NewThemeManager() *ThemeManager {
	// Get config directory
	configDir, err := os.UserConfigDir()
	if err != nil {
		configDir = "."
	}
	configDir = filepath.Join(configDir, "quantum-terminal")

	// Create config directory if it doesn't exist
	os.MkdirAll(configDir, 0755)

	tm := &ThemeManager{
		themes:       make(map[string]*Theme),
		currentTheme: "quantum",
		configDir:    configDir,
	}

	// Load built-in themes
	tm.loadBuiltinThemes()

	// Load user themes
	tm.loadUserThemes()

	return tm
}

// loadUserThemes loads themes from the user config directory
func (tm *ThemeManager) loadUserThemes() {
	themesDir := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes")

	// Create themes directory if it doesn't exist
	if err := os.MkdirAll(themesDir, 0755); err != nil {
		return
	}

	// Read theme files
	entries, err := os.ReadDir(themesDir)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}

	for _, entry := range entries {
		if !entry.IsDir() && filepath.Ext(entry.Name()) == ".json" {
			themePath := filepath.Join(themesDir, entry.Name())
			if theme, err := tm.loadThemeFromFile(themePath); err == nil {
				tm.themes[theme.Name] = theme
			}
		}
	}
}

// loadThemeFromFile loads a theme from a JSON file
func (tm *ThemeManager) loadThemeFromFile(filename string) (*Theme, error) {
	data, err := os.ReadFile(filename)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	var theme Theme
	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &theme); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	return &theme, nil
}

// SaveTheme saves a theme to the user config directory
func (tm *ThemeManager) SaveTheme(theme *Theme) error {
	themesDir := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes")
	if err := os.MkdirAll(themesDir, 0755); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	filename := filepath.Join(themesDir, theme.Name+".json")
	data, err := json.MarshalIndent(theme, "", "  ")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	return os.WriteFile(filename, data, 0644)
}

// GetTheme returns a theme by name
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetTheme(name string) (*Theme, bool) {
	theme, exists := tm.themes[name]
	return theme, exists
}

// GetCurrentTheme returns the currently active theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetCurrentTheme() *Theme {
	if theme, exists := tm.themes[tm.currentTheme]; exists {
		return theme
	}
	// Fallback to quantum theme
	return tm.themes["quantum"]
}

// SetCurrentTheme sets the current theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) SetCurrentTheme(name string) bool {
	if _, exists := tm.themes[name]; exists {
		tm.currentTheme = name
		return true
	}
	return false
}

// GetThemeNames returns all available theme names
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetThemeNames() []string {
	var names []string
	for name := range tm.themes {
		names = append(names, name)
	}
	return names
}

// GetThemeList returns all available themes
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetThemeList() []*Theme {
	var themes []*Theme
	for _, theme := range tm.themes {
		themes = append(themes, theme)
	}
	return themes
}

// CreateCustomTheme creates a new custom theme based on an existing theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) CreateCustomTheme(baseName, newName, description string) (*Theme, error) {
	baseTheme, exists := tm.themes[baseName]
	if !exists {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("base theme '%s' not found", baseName)
	}

	// Create a copy of the base theme
	newTheme := *baseTheme
	newTheme.Name = newName
	newTheme.Description = description
	newTheme.Author = "Custom"
	newTheme.Version = "1.0.0"

	tm.themes[newName] = &newTheme
	return &newTheme, nil
}

// DeleteTheme removes a user theme (built-in themes cannot be deleted)
func (tm *ThemeManager) DeleteTheme(name string) error {
	// Check if it's a built-in theme
	builtinThemes := []string{"quantum", "cyberpunk", "matrix", "neon", "classic"}
	for _, builtin := range builtinThemes {
		if name == builtin {
			return fmt.Errorf("cannot delete built-in theme '%s'", name)
		}
	}

	// Remove from memory
	delete(tm.themes, name)

	// Remove file
	filename := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "themes", name+".json")
	if err := os.Remove(filename); err != nil && !os.IsNotExist(err) {
		return err
	}

	// If it was the current theme, switch to quantum
	if tm.currentTheme == name {
		tm.currentTheme = "quantum"
	}

	return nil
}

// ExportTheme exports a theme to a JSON file
func (tm *ThemeManager) ExportTheme(name, filename string) error {
	theme, exists := tm.themes[name]
	if !exists {
		return fmt.Errorf("theme '%s' not found", name)
	}

	data, err := json.MarshalIndent(theme, "", "  ")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	return os.WriteFile(filename, data, 0644)
}

// ImportTheme imports a theme from a JSON file
func (tm *ThemeManager) ImportTheme(filename string) error {
	theme, err := tm.loadThemeFromFile(filename)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	tm.themes[theme.Name] = theme
	return tm.SaveTheme(theme)
}

// ApplyTheme applies a theme to the current application state
func (tm *ThemeManager) ApplyTheme(name string) error {
	if !tm.SetCurrentTheme(name) {
		return fmt.Errorf("theme '%s' not found", name)
	}

	// Save current theme preference
	return tm.saveCurrentTheme()
}

// saveCurrentTheme saves the current theme preference to config
func (tm *ThemeManager) saveCurrentTheme() error {
	configFile := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "current_theme")
	return os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte(tm.currentTheme), 0644)
}

// LoadCurrentTheme loads the saved theme preference
func (tm *ThemeManager) LoadCurrentTheme() {
	configFile := filepath.Join(tm.configDir, "current_theme")
	if data, err := os.ReadFile(configFile); err == nil {
		themeName := string(data)
		if _, exists := tm.themes[themeName]; exists {
			tm.currentTheme = themeName
		}
	}
}

// GetLipglossColors converts theme colors to lipgloss colors for easy use
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetLipglossColors() map[string]lipgloss.Color {
	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
	return map[string]lipgloss.Color{
		"primary":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Primary),
		"secondary":          lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Secondary),
		"accent":             lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Accent),
		"success":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Success),
		"warning":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Warning),
		"danger":             lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Danger),
		"background":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Background),
		"background_light":   lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.BackgroundLight),
		"background_dark":    lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.BackgroundDark),
		"text":               lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Text),
		"text_muted":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.TextMuted),
		"text_faint":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.TextFaint),
		"glow":               lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Glow),
		"pulse":              lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Pulse),
		"terminal_bg":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Background),
		"terminal_fg":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Foreground),
		"terminal_cursor":    lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Cursor),
		"terminal_selection": lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.Terminal.Selection),
		"ai_user":            lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.User),
		"ai_assistant":       lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.Assistant),
		"ai_system":          lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.System),
		"ai_error":           lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.AI.Error),
		"system_cpu":         lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.CPU),
		"system_memory":      lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Memory),
		"system_network":     lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Network),
		"system_disk":        lipgloss.Color(theme.Colors.System.Disk),
	}
}

// GetBorderStyle returns the appropriate lipgloss border style for the theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetBorderStyle() lipgloss.Border {
	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
	switch theme.Styles.BorderStyle {
	case "rounded":
		return lipgloss.RoundedBorder()
	case "thick":
		return lipgloss.ThickBorder()
	case "double":
		return lipgloss.DoubleBorder()
	default:
		return lipgloss.NormalBorder()
	}
}

// IsEffectEnabled checks if a visual effect is enabled in the current theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) IsEffectEnabled(effect string) bool {
	theme := tm.GetCurrentTheme()
	switch effect {
	case "orbs":
		return theme.Effects.EnableOrbs
	case "light_rays":
		return theme.Effects.EnableLightRays
	case "matrix":
		return theme.Effects.EnableMatrix
	case "energy":
		return theme.Effects.EnableEnergy
	default:
		return false
	}
}

// GetEffectSettings returns effect settings for the current theme
func (tm *ThemeManager) GetEffectSettings() ThemeEffects {
	return tm.GetCurrentTheme().Effects
}

   109→// NewBashTerminalModel creates a new bash terminal component

   201→// checkCommandAvailable checks if a command is available in PATH
   202→func checkCommandAvailable(command string) bool {
   203→	parts := strings.Fields(command)
   204→	if len(parts) == 0 {
   205→		return false
   206→	}
   207→	_, err := exec.LookPath(parts[0])

   211→// generatePrompt creates a shell prompt string
   212→func generatePrompt(dir string) string {
   213→	// Get just the directory name for a cleaner prompt
   214→	dirName := filepath.Base(dir)

   216→		dirName = dir
   217→	}
   218→	return fmt.Sprintf("quantum:%s$ ", dirName)

   221→// ToolComponent interface implementation
   222→
   223→// Init initializes the bash terminal component
   224→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) Init() tea.Cmd {
   225→	return tea.Batch(
   226→		bt.tickCmd(),
   227→	)
   228→}
   229→
   230→// Update handles messages for the bash terminal
   231→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (ToolComponent, tea.Cmd) {
   232→	var cmds []tea.Cmd
   233→
   234→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   235→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   236→		if !bt.active {
   237→			return bt, nil
   238→		}
   239→
   240→		if cmd := bt.handleKeyMsg(msg); cmd != nil {
   241→			cmds = append(cmds, cmd)
   242→		}
   243→
   244→	case cmdOutputMsg:
   245→		bt.addOutput(msg.output, OutputResult, lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
   246→
   247→	case cmdCompleteMsg:
   248→		bt.isExecuting = false
   249→		if msg.error != nil {
   250→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Command failed: %v", msg.error), OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   251→		} else {
   252→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Command completed (exit code: %d)", msg.exitCode), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#10b981"))
   253→		}
   254→
   255→	case cmdStartMsg:
   256→		bt.isExecuting = true
   257→		bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Executing: %s", msg.command), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
   258→
   259→	case tickMsg:
   260→		bt.updateVisualEffects()
   261→		cmds = append(cmds, bt.tickCmd())
   262→	}
   263→
   264→	return bt, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   265→}

   267→// View renders the bash terminal interface
