   300→
   301→// Key handling
   302→
   303→// handleKeyMsg processes key messages for the terminal
   304→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleKeyMsg(msg tea.KeyMsg) tea.Cmd {
   305→	switch msg.String() {
   306→	case "!":
   307→		// Toggle AI panel
   308→		bt.showAIPanel = !bt.showAIPanel
   309→		return nil
   310→
   311→	case "ctrl+c":
   312→		// Interrupt running command
   313→		if bt.isExecuting && bt.runningCmd != nil {
   314→			bt.runningCmd.Process.Signal(syscall.SIGINT)
   315→			bt.isExecuting = false
   316→			bt.addOutput("^C", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
   317→		}
   318→		return nil
   319→
   320→	case "ctrl+l":
   321→		// Clear terminal
   322→		bt.output = []OutputLine{}
   323→		bt.scrollOffset = 0
   324→		return nil
   325→
   326→	case "enter":
   327→		if bt.showAIPanel && bt.aiInput != "" {
   328→			return bt.handleAIInput()
   329→		}
   330→		return bt.handleCommandInput()
   331→
   332→	case "up":
   333→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   334→			// Handle AI panel navigation
   335→			return nil
   336→		}
   337→		return bt.handleHistoryUp()
   338→
   339→	case "down":
   340→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   341→			// Handle AI panel navigation
   342→			return nil
   343→		}
   344→		return bt.handleHistoryDown()
   345→
   346→	case "left":
   347→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   348→			if bt.aiCursorPos > 0 {
   349→				bt.aiCursorPos--
   350→			}
   351→		} else {
   352→			if bt.cursorPos > 0 {
   353→				bt.cursorPos--
   354→			}
   355→		}
   356→		return nil
   357→
   358→	case "right":
   359→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   360→			if bt.aiCursorPos < len(bt.aiInput) {
   361→				bt.aiCursorPos++
   362→			}
   363→		} else {
   364→			if bt.cursorPos < len(bt.input) {
   365→				bt.cursorPos++
   366→			}
   367→		}
   368→		return nil
   369→
   370→	case "backspace":
   371→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   372→			if bt.aiCursorPos > 0 {
   373→				bt.aiInput = bt.aiInput[:bt.aiCursorPos-1] + bt.aiInput[bt.aiCursorPos:]
   374→				bt.aiCursorPos--
   375→			}
   376→		} else {
   377→			if bt.cursorPos > 0 {
   378→				bt.input = bt.input[:bt.cursorPos-1] + bt.input[bt.cursorPos:]
   379→				bt.cursorPos--
   380→			}
   381→		}
   382→		return nil
   383→
   384→	case "delete":
   385→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   386→			if bt.aiCursorPos < len(bt.aiInput) {
   387→				bt.aiInput = bt.aiInput[:bt.aiCursorPos] + bt.aiInput[bt.aiCursorPos+1:]
   388→			}
   389→		} else {
   390→			if bt.cursorPos < len(bt.input) {
   391→				bt.input = bt.input[:bt.cursorPos] + bt.input[bt.cursorPos+1:]
   392→			}
   393→		}
   394→		return nil
   395→
   396→	case "home", "ctrl+a":
   397→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   398→			bt.aiCursorPos = 0
   399→		} else {
   400→			bt.cursorPos = 0
   401→		}
   402→		return nil
   403→
   404→	case "end", "ctrl+e":
   405→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   406→			bt.aiCursorPos = len(bt.aiInput)
   407→		} else {
   408→			bt.cursorPos = len(bt.input)
   409→		}
   410→		return nil
   411→
   412→	case "page_up":
   413→		bt.scrollUp()
   414→		return nil
   415→
   416→	case "page_down":
   417→		bt.scrollDown()
   418→		return nil
   419→
   420→	case "tab":
   421→		// Tab completion
   422→		if !bt.showAIPanel {
   423→			return bt.handleTabCompletion()
   424→		}
   425→		return nil
   426→
   427→	default:
   428→		// Regular character input
   429→		if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   430→			char := msg.String()
   431→			if bt.showAIPanel {
   432→				bt.aiInput = bt.aiInput[:bt.aiCursorPos] + char + bt.aiInput[bt.aiCursorPos:]
   433→				bt.aiCursorPos++
   434→			} else {
   435→				bt.input = bt.input[:bt.cursorPos] + char + bt.input[bt.cursorPos:]
   436→				bt.cursorPos++
   437→			}
   438→		}
   439→		return nil
   440→	}
   441→}
   442→
   443→// Command execution
   444→
   445→// handleCommandInput processes command input and execution
   446→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleCommandInput() tea.Cmd {
   447→	if bt.input == "" {
   448→		bt.addOutput(bt.prompt, OutputCommand, lipgloss.Color("#6366f1"))
   449→		return nil
   450→	}
   451→
   452→	command := strings.TrimSpace(bt.input)
   453→
   454→	// Add to history
   455→	bt.history = append(bt.history, command)
   456→	if len(bt.history) > 100 {
   457→		bt.history = bt.history[1:]
   458→	}
   459→	bt.historyPos = -1
   460→
   461→	// Display command
   462→	bt.addOutput(bt.prompt+command, OutputCommand, lipgloss.Color("#6366f1"))
   463→
   464→	// Handle built-in commands
   465→	if cmd := bt.handleBuiltinCommand(command); cmd != nil {
   466→		bt.input = ""
   467→		bt.cursorPos = 0
   468→		return cmd
   469→	}
   470→
   471→	// Execute external command
   472→	bt.input = ""
   473→	bt.cursorPos = 0
   474→	return bt.executeCommand(command)
   475→}
   476→
   477→// handleBuiltinCommand handles built-in terminal commands
   478→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleBuiltinCommand(command string) tea.Cmd {
   479→	parts := strings.Fields(command)
   480→	if len(parts) == 0 {
   481→		return nil
   482→	}
   483→
   484→	switch parts[0] {
   485→	case "help":
   486→		bt.showHelp()
   487→		return nil
   488→
   489→	case "clear", "cls":
   490→		bt.output = []OutputLine{}
   491→		bt.scrollOffset = 0
   492→		return nil
   493→
   494→	case "cd":
   495→		return bt.changeDirectory(parts)
   496→
   497→	case "pwd":
   498→		bt.addOutput(bt.currentDir, OutputResult, lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
   499→		return nil
   500→
   501→	case "history":
   502→		bt.showHistory()
   503→		return nil
   504→
   505→	case "ai":
   506→		return bt.handleAICommand(parts[1:])
   507→
   508→	case "theme":
   509→		return bt.handleThemeCommand(parts[1:])
   510→
   511→	case "exit", "quit":
   512→		// This would typically quit the application
   513→		bt.addOutput("Use 'q' or Ctrl+C to quit the application", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
   514→		return nil
   515→
   516→	default:
   517→		return nil // Not a built-in command
   518→	}
   519→}
   520→
   521→// executeCommand executes an external command
   522→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) executeCommand(command string) tea.Cmd {
   523→	return func() tea.Msg {
   524→		// Parse command and arguments
   525→		parts := strings.Fields(command)
   526→		if len(parts) == 0 {
   527→			return cmdCompleteMsg{exitCode: 1, error: fmt.Errorf("empty command")}
   528→		}
   529→
   530→		// Create command
   531→		cmd := exec.Command(parts[0], parts[1:]...)
   532→		cmd.Dir = bt.currentDir
   533→
   534→		// Set up pipes
   535→		stdout, err := cmd.StdoutPipe()
   536→		if err != nil {
   537→			return cmdCompleteMsg{exitCode: 1, error: err}
   538→		}
   539→		stderr, err := cmd.StderrPipe()
   540→		if err != nil {
   541→			return cmdCompleteMsg{exitCode: 1, error: err}
   542→		}
   543→
   544→		// Start command
   545→		if err := cmd.Start(); err != nil {
   546→			return cmdCompleteMsg{exitCode: 1, error: err}
   547→		}
   548→
   549→		bt.runningCmd = cmd
   550→
   551→		// Read output in goroutines
   552→		go bt.readCommandOutput(stdout, false)
   553→		go bt.readCommandOutput(stderr, true)
   554→
   555→		// Wait for completion
   556→		err = cmd.Wait()
   557→		exitCode := 0
   558→		if err != nil {
   559→			if exitError, ok := err.(*exec.ExitError); ok {
   560→				exitCode = exitError.ExitCode()
   561→			} else {
   562→				exitCode = 1
   563→			}
   564→		}
   565→
   566→		return cmdCompleteMsg{exitCode: exitCode, error: err}
   567→	}
   568→}
   569→
   570→// readCommandOutput reads output from command stdout/stderr
   571→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) readCommandOutput(pipe io.ReadCloser, isError bool) {
   572→	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(pipe)
   573→	for scanner.Scan() {
   574→		line := scanner.Text()
   575→		color := lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0")
   576→		outputType := OutputResult
   577→		if isError {
   578→			color = lipgloss.Color("#ef4444")
   579→			outputType = OutputError
   580→		}
   581→		bt.addOutput(line, outputType, color)
   582→	}
   583→}
   584→
   585→// AI Assistant functionality
   586→
   587→// handleAIInput processes AI assistant input
   588→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleAIInput() tea.Cmd {
   589→	if bt.aiInput == "" {
   590→		return nil
   591→	}
   592→
   593→	input := strings.TrimSpace(bt.aiInput)
   594→
   595→	// Add user message to AI history
   596→	bt.aiHistory = append(bt.aiHistory, AIMessage{
   597→		Role:      "user",
   598→		Content:   input,
   599→		Timestamp: time.Now(),
   600→		Agent:     bt.selectedAgent,
   601→	})
   602→
   603→	// Clear input
   604→	bt.aiInput = ""
   605→	bt.aiCursorPos = 0
   606→
   607→	// Find selected agent
   608→	var agent *AIAgent
   609→	for _, a := range bt.availableAgents {
   610→		if a.Command == bt.selectedAgent {
   611→			agent = &a
   612→			break
   613→		}
   614→	}
   615→
   616→	if agent == nil || !agent.Available {
   617→		bt.aiHistory = append(bt.aiHistory, AIMessage{
   618→			Role:      "assistant",
   619→			Content:   "Sorry, the selected AI agent is not available.",
   620→			Timestamp: time.Now(),
   621→			Agent:     bt.selectedAgent,
   622→		})
   623→		return nil
   624→	}
   625→
   626→	// Execute AI command
   627→	return bt.executeAICommand(agent, input)
   628→}
   629→
   630→// executeAICommand executes an AI assistant command
   631→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) executeAICommand(agent *AIAgent, input string) tea.Cmd {
   632→	return func() tea.Msg {
   633→		// Construct AI command
   634→		var cmdParts []string
   635→		switch agent.Command {
   636→		case "claude-code":
   637→			cmdParts = []string{"claude-code", input}
   638→		case "opencode":
   639→			cmdParts = []string{"opencode", input}
   640→		case "gemini":
   641→			cmdParts = []string{"gemini", input}
   642→		case "gh copilot":
   643→			cmdParts = []string{"gh", "copilot", "suggest", input}
   644→		case "aider":
   645→			cmdParts = []string{"aider", "--message", input}
   646→		case "sgpt":
   647→			cmdParts = []string{"sgpt", input}
   648→		default:
   649→			return nil
   650→		}
   651→
   652→		// Execute command
   653→		cmd := exec.Command(cmdParts[0], cmdParts[1:]...)
   654→		cmd.Dir = bt.currentDir
   655→
   656→		output, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
   657→		if err != nil {
   658→			bt.aiHistory = append(bt.aiHistory, AIMessage{
   659→				Role:      "assistant",
   660→				Content:   fmt.Sprintf("Error: %v\n%s", err, string(output)),
   661→				Timestamp: time.Now(),
   662→				Agent:     agent.Command,
   663→			})
   664→		} else {
   665→			bt.aiHistory = append(bt.aiHistory, AIMessage{
   666→				Role:      "assistant",
   667→				Content:   string(output),
   668→				Timestamp: time.Now(),
   669→				Agent:     agent.Command,
   670→			})
   671→		}
   672→
   673→		return nil
   674→	}
   675→}
   676→
   677→// handleAICommand handles the 'ai' built-in command
   678→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleAICommand(args []string) tea.Cmd {
   679→	if len(args) == 0 {
   680→		bt.addOutput("Available AI agents:", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   681→		for _, agent := range bt.availableAgents {
   682→			status := "❌ Not available"
   683→			if agent.Available {
   684→				status = "✅ Available"
   685→			}
   686→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("  %s %s - %s %s", agent.Icon, agent.Name, agent.Description, status), OutputInfo, agent.Color)
   687→		}
   688→		return nil
   689→	}
   690→
   691→	switch args[0] {
   692→	case "select":
   693→		if len(args) > 1 {
   694→			for _, agent := range bt.availableAgents {
   695→				if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(agent.Name), strings.ToLower(args[1])) ||
   696→					strings.Contains(agent.Command, args[1]) {
   697→					bt.selectedAgent = agent.Command
   698→					bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Selected AI agent: %s %s", agent.Icon, agent.Name), OutputInfo, agent.Color)
   699→					return nil
   700→				}
   701→			}
   702→			bt.addOutput("AI agent not found", OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   703→		} else {
   704→			bt.addOutput("Usage: ai select <agent_name>", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
   705→		}
   706→
   707→	case "panel":
   708→		bt.showAIPanel = !bt.showAIPanel
   709→		status := "hidden"
   710→		if bt.showAIPanel {
   711→			status = "shown"
   712→		}
   713→		bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("AI panel %s", status), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6"))
   714→
   715→	default:
   716→		bt.addOutput("AI commands: select <agent>, panel", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   717→	}
   718→
   719→	return nil
   720→}
   721→
   722→// Built-in command handlers
   723→
   724→// showHelp displays help information
   725→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) showHelp() {
   726→	help := []string{
   727→		"Quantum Terminal - Built-in Commands:",
   728→		"",
   729→		"Navigation:",
   730→		"  cd <dir>     - Change directory",
   731→		"  pwd          - Print working directory",
   732→		"  ls           - List directory contents (external)",
   733→		"",
   734→		"Terminal:",
   735→		"  clear/cls    - Clear terminal",
   736→		"  history      - Show command history",
   737→		"  help         - Show this help",
   738→		"",
   739→		"AI Assistant:",
   740→		"  ai           - Show available AI agents",
   741→		"  ai select    - Select AI agent",
   742→		"  ai panel     - Toggle AI panel",
   743→		"  !            - Toggle AI panel (hotkey)",
   744→		"",
   745→		"Theme:",
   746→		"  theme list   - Show available themes",
   747→		"  theme set    - Set theme",
   748→		"",
   749→		"Keyboard Shortcuts:",

   752→		"  Tab          - Auto-complete",
   753→		"  ↑/↓          - Command history",
   754→		"  Page Up/Down - Scroll output",
   755→		"",

   757→	}
   758→
   759→	for _, line := range help {

   764→		bt.addOutput(line, OutputInfo, color)
   765→	}

   767→
   768→// changeDirectory handles the cd command
   769→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) changeDirectory(parts []string) tea.Cmd {
   770→	var targetDir string
   771→	if len(parts) == 1 {
   772→		// cd with no arguments goes to home
   773→		home, err := os.UserHomeDir()
   774→		if err != nil {
   775→			bt.addOutput("Error getting home directory", OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   776→			return nil
   777→		}
   778→		targetDir = home
   779→	} else {
   780→		targetDir = parts[1]
   781→	}
   782→
   783→	// Handle relative paths
   784→	if !filepath.IsAbs(targetDir) {
   785→		targetDir = filepath.Join(bt.currentDir, targetDir)
   786→	}
   787→
   788→	// Clean the path
   789→	targetDir = filepath.Clean(targetDir)
   790→
   791→	// Check if directory exists
   792→	if info, err := os.Stat(targetDir); err != nil {
   793→		bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("cd: %s: No such file or directory", parts[1]), OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   794→		return nil
   795→	} else if !info.IsDir() {
   796→		bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("cd: %s: Not a directory", parts[1]), OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   797→		return nil
   798→	}
   799→
   800→	// Change directory
   801→	bt.currentDir = targetDir
   802→	bt.prompt = generatePrompt(bt.currentDir)
   803→	bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Changed directory to: %s", bt.currentDir), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#10b981"))
   804→
   805→	return nil
   806→}
   807→
   808→// showHistory displays command history
   809→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) showHistory() {
   810→	bt.addOutput("Command History:", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   811→	for i, cmd := range bt.history {
   812→		bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("%3d  %s", i+1, cmd), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
   813→	}
   814→}
   815→
   816→// handleThemeCommand handles theme-related commands
   817→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleThemeCommand(args []string) tea.Cmd {
   818→	if len(args) == 0 {
   819→		bt.addOutput("Theme commands: list, set <theme>", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   820→		return nil
   821→	}
   822→
   823→	switch args[0] {
   824→	case "list":
   825→		themes := []string{"quantum", "cyberpunk", "matrix", "neon", "classic"}
   826→		bt.addOutput("Available themes:", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   827→		for _, theme := range themes {
   828→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("  %s", theme), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
   829→		}
   830→
   831→	case "set":
   832→		if len(args) > 1 {
   833→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("Theme set to: %s", args[1]), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#10b981"))
   834→			// TODO: Implement theme switching
   835→		} else {
   836→			bt.addOutput("Usage: theme set <theme_name>", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b"))
   837→		}
   838→
   839→	default:
   840→		bt.addOutput("Unknown theme command", OutputError, lipgloss.Color("#ef4444"))
   841→	}
   842→
   843→	return nil
   844→}
   845→
   846→// History navigation
   847→
   848→// handleHistoryUp navigates up in command history
   849→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleHistoryUp() tea.Cmd {
   850→	if len(bt.history) == 0 {
   851→		return nil
   852→	}
   853→
   854→	if bt.historyPos == -1 {
   855→		bt.historyPos = len(bt.history) - 1
   856→	} else if bt.historyPos > 0 {
   857→		bt.historyPos--
   858→	}
   859→
   860→	bt.input = bt.history[bt.historyPos]
   861→	bt.cursorPos = len(bt.input)
   862→	return nil
   863→}
   864→
   865→// handleHistoryDown navigates down in command history
   866→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleHistoryDown() tea.Cmd {
   867→	if len(bt.history) == 0 || bt.historyPos == -1 {
   868→		return nil
   869→	}
   870→
   871→	if bt.historyPos < len(bt.history)-1 {
   872→		bt.historyPos++
   873→		bt.input = bt.history[bt.historyPos]
   874→		bt.cursorPos = len(bt.input)
   875→	} else {
   876→		bt.historyPos = -1
   877→		bt.input = ""
   878→		bt.cursorPos = 0
   879→	}
   880→
   881→	return nil
   882→}
   883→
   884→// Tab completion
   885→
   886→// handleTabCompletion handles tab completion for commands and files
   887→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) handleTabCompletion() tea.Cmd {
   888→	if bt.input == "" {
   889→		return nil
   890→	}
   891→
   892→	// Simple file completion for now
   893→	parts := strings.Fields(bt.input)
   894→	if len(parts) == 0 {
   895→		return nil
   896→	}
   897→
   898→	lastPart := parts[len(parts)-1]
   899→
   900→	// Get directory to search in
   901→	searchDir := bt.currentDir
   902→	if strings.Contains(lastPart, "/") {
   903→		searchDir = filepath.Dir(filepath.Join(bt.currentDir, lastPart))
   904→		lastPart = filepath.Base(lastPart)
   905→	}
   906→
   907→	// Find matching files
   908→	entries, err := os.ReadDir(searchDir)
   909→	if err != nil {
   910→		return nil
   911→	}
   912→
   913→	var matches []string
   914→	for _, entry := range entries {
   915→		if strings.HasPrefix(entry.Name(), lastPart) {
   916→			matches = append(matches, entry.Name())
   917→		}
   918→	}
   919→
   920→	if len(matches) == 1 {
   921→		// Complete the match
   922→		newInput := strings.Join(parts[:len(parts)-1], " ")
   923→		if len(newInput) > 0 {
   924→			newInput += " "
   925→		}
   926→		newInput += matches[0]
   927→		bt.input = newInput
   928→		bt.cursorPos = len(bt.input)
   929→	} else if len(matches) > 1 {
   930→		// Show matches
   931→		bt.addOutput("Possible completions:", OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
   932→		for _, match := range matches {
   933→			bt.addOutput(fmt.Sprintf("  %s", match), OutputInfo, lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
   934→		}
   935→	}
   936→
   937→	return nil
   938→}
   939→
   940→// Output management
   941→
   942→// addOutput adds a line to the terminal output
   943→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) addOutput(text string, outputType OutputType, color lipgloss.Color) {
   944→	// Split long lines
   945→	maxWidth := bt.width - 4
   946→	if maxWidth < 40 {
   947→		maxWidth = 40
   948→	}
   949→
   950→	lines := bt.wrapText(text, maxWidth)
   951→	for _, line := range lines {
   952→		bt.output = append(bt.output, OutputLine{
   953→			Text:      line,
   954→			Timestamp: time.Now(),
   955→			Type:      outputType,
   956→			Color:     color,
   957→		})
   958→	}
   959→
   960→	// Limit output size
   961→	if len(bt.output) > bt.maxOutputSize {
   962→		bt.output = bt.output[len(bt.output)-bt.maxOutputSize:]
   963→	}
   964→
   965→	// Auto-scroll to bottom
   966→	bt.scrollToBottom()
   967→}
   968→
   969→// wrapText wraps text to fit within the specified width
   970→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) wrapText(text string, width int) []string {
   971→	if len(text) <= width {
   972→		return []string{text}
   973→	}
   974→
   975→	var lines []string
   976→	for len(text) > width {
   977→		// Find the last space before the width limit
   978→		breakPoint := width
   979→		for i := width - 1; i >= 0; i-- {
   980→			if text[i] == ' ' {
   981→				breakPoint = i
   982→				break
   983→			}
   984→		}
   985→
   986→		lines = append(lines, text[:breakPoint])
   987→		text = strings.TrimSpace(text[breakPoint:])
   988→	}
   989→
   990→	if len(text) > 0 {
   991→		lines = append(lines, text)
   992→	}
   993→
   994→	return lines
   995→}
   996→
   997→// Scrolling
   998→
   999→// scrollUp scrolls the output up
  1000→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) scrollUp() {
  1001→	if bt.scrollOffset > 0 {
  1002→		bt.scrollOffset--
  1003→	}
  1004→}
  1005→
  1006→// scrollDown scrolls the output down
  1007→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) scrollDown() {
  1008→	maxScroll := len(bt.output) - (bt.height - 5)
  1009→	if maxScroll < 0 {
  1010→		maxScroll = 0
  1011→	}
  1012→	if bt.scrollOffset < maxScroll {
  1013→		bt.scrollOffset++
  1014→	}
  1015→}
  1016→
  1017→// scrollToBottom scrolls to the bottom of the output
  1018→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) scrollToBottom() {
  1019→	maxScroll := len(bt.output) - (bt.height - 5)
  1020→	if maxScroll < 0 {
  1021→		maxScroll = 0
  1022→	}
  1023→	bt.scrollOffset = maxScroll
  1024→}
  1025→
  1026→// Visual effects
  1027→
  1028→// updateVisualEffects updates the visual effects state
  1029→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) updateVisualEffects() {
  1030→	bt.frame++
  1031→	bt.pulsePhase += 0.05
  1032→	bt.glowIntensity = 0.3 + 0.2*math.Sin(bt.pulsePhase)
  1033→}
  1034→
  1035→// tickCmd returns a command for visual effects timing
  1036→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) tickCmd() tea.Cmd {
  1037→	return tea.Tick(time.Millisecond*50, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
  1038→		return tickMsg(t)
  1039→	})
  1040→}
  1041→
  1042→// Rendering
  1043→
  1044→// renderTerminalOnly renders the terminal without the AI panel
  1045→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderTerminalOnly() string {
  1046→	var s strings.Builder
  1047→
  1048→	// Header
  1049→	header := bt.renderHeader()
  1050→	s.WriteString(header + "\n")
  1051→
  1052→	// Output area
  1053→	output := bt.renderOutput()
  1054→	s.WriteString(output)
  1055→
  1056→	// Input line
  1057→	input := bt.renderInputLine()
  1058→	s.WriteString(input)
  1059→
  1060→	// Status bar
  1061→	status := bt.renderStatusBar()
  1062→	s.WriteString(status)
  1063→
  1064→	return s.String()
  1065→}
  1066→
  1067→// renderWithAIPanel renders the terminal with the AI assistant panel
  1068→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderWithAIPanel() string {
  1069→	terminalWidth := bt.width - bt.aiPanelWidth - 3
  1070→	if terminalWidth < 40 {
  1071→		terminalWidth = 40
  1072→		bt.aiPanelWidth = bt.width - 43
  1073→	}
  1074→
  1075→	// Render terminal content
  1076→	terminalContent := bt.renderTerminalContent(terminalWidth)
  1077→
  1078→	// Render AI panel
  1079→	aiPanel := bt.renderAIPanel()
  1080→
  1081→	// Join horizontally
  1082→	return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, terminalContent, "│", aiPanel)
  1083→}
  1084→
  1085→// renderHeader renders the terminal header
  1086→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderHeader() string {
  1087→	title := "⚡ QUANTUM BASH TERMINAL"
  1088→	if bt.showAIPanel {
  1089→		title += " + AI ASSISTANT"
  1090→	}
  1091→
  1092→	titleStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1093→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6366f1")).
  1094→		Bold(true).
  1095→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
  1096→		Width(bt.width)
  1097→
  1098→	timeStr := time.Now().Format("15:04:05")
  1099→	timeStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1100→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8")).
  1101→		Align(lipgloss.Right).
  1102→		Width(bt.width)
  1103→
  1104→	return titleStyle.Render(title) + "\n" + timeStyle.Render("◉ "+timeStr)
  1105→}
  1106→
  1107→// renderOutput renders the terminal output area
  1108→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderOutput() string {
  1109→	var s strings.Builder
  1110→
  1111→	outputHeight := bt.height - 6 // Leave space for header, input, status
  1112→	if outputHeight < 5 {
  1113→		outputHeight = 5
  1114→	}
  1115→
  1116→	startIdx := bt.scrollOffset
  1117→	endIdx := startIdx + outputHeight
  1118→	if endIdx > len(bt.output) {
  1119→		endIdx = len(bt.output)
  1120→	}
  1121→
  1122→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx; i++ {
  1123→		line := bt.output[i]
  1124→
  1125→		// Add timestamp for important messages
  1126→		prefix := ""
  1127→		if line.Type == OutputError || line.Type == OutputAI {
  1128→			prefix = line.Timestamp.Format("15:04 ")
  1129→		}
  1130→
  1131→		styledLine := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1132→			Foreground(line.Color).
  1133→			Render(prefix + line.Text)
  1134→
  1135→		s.WriteString(styledLine + "\n")
  1136→	}
  1137→
  1138→	// Fill remaining space
  1139→	for i := endIdx - startIdx; i < outputHeight; i++ {
  1140→		s.WriteString("\n")
  1141→	}
  1142→
  1143→	return s.String()
  1144→}
  1145→
  1146→// renderInputLine renders the command input line
  1147→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderInputLine() string {
  1148→	var s strings.Builder
  1149→
  1150→	// Separator line
  1151→	separator := strings.Repeat("─", bt.width)
  1152→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#64748b")).Render(separator) + "\n")
  1153→
  1154→	// Input line
  1155→	promptStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1156→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#6366f1")).
  1157→		Bold(true)
  1158→
  1159→	inputStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1160→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))
  1161→
  1162→	// Add cursor
  1163→	displayInput := bt.input
  1164→	if bt.cursorPos < len(displayInput) {
  1165→		displayInput = displayInput[:bt.cursorPos] + "█" + displayInput[bt.cursorPos+1:]
  1166→	} else {
  1167→		displayInput += "█"
  1168→	}
  1169→
  1170→	s.WriteString(promptStyle.Render(bt.prompt) + inputStyle.Render(displayInput))
  1171→
  1172→	return s.String()
  1173→}
  1174→
  1175→// renderStatusBar renders the status bar
  1176→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderStatusBar() string {
  1177→	var statusParts []string
  1178→
  1179→	// Execution status
  1180→	if bt.isExecuting {
  1181→		statusParts = append(statusParts,
  1182→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b")).Render("⚡ Executing"))
  1183→	}
  1184→
  1185→	// AI panel status
  1186→	if bt.showAIPanel {
  1187→		statusParts = append(statusParts,
  1188→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6")).Render("🤖 AI Panel"))
  1189→	}
  1190→
  1191→	// Directory
  1192→	statusParts = append(statusParts,
  1193→		lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4")).Render("📁 "+filepath.Base(bt.currentDir)))
  1194→
  1195→	// Commands count
  1196→	statusParts = append(statusParts,
  1197→		lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#10b981")).Render(fmt.Sprintf("📜 %d", len(bt.history))))
  1198→
  1199→	status := strings.Join(statusParts, " • ")
  1200→
  1201→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1202→		Background(lipgloss.Color("#1e1e3f")).
  1203→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0")).
  1204→		Width(bt.width).
  1205→		Padding(0, 1).
  1206→		Render(status)
  1207→}
  1208→
  1209→// renderTerminalContent renders terminal content with specified width
  1210→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderTerminalContent(width int) string {
  1211→	// Temporarily adjust width
  1212→	originalWidth := bt.width
  1213→	bt.width = width
  1214→
  1215→	content := bt.renderTerminalOnly()
  1216→
  1217→	// Restore original width
  1218→	bt.width = originalWidth
  1219→
  1220→	return content
  1221→}
  1222→
  1223→// renderAIPanel renders the AI assistant panel
  1224→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderAIPanel() string {
  1225→	var s strings.Builder
  1226→
  1227→	// Panel header
  1228→	header := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1229→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6")).
  1230→		Bold(true).
  1231→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
  1232→		Width(bt.aiPanelWidth).
  1233→		Render("🤖 AI ASSISTANT")
  1234→	s.WriteString(header + "\n")
  1235→
  1236→	// Agent selector
  1237→	agentInfo := bt.renderAgentSelector()
  1238→	s.WriteString(agentInfo + "\n")
  1239→
  1240→	// Chat history
  1241→	chatHeight := bt.height - 8 // Leave space for header, agent, input
  1242→	if chatHeight < 5 {
  1243→		chatHeight = 5
  1244→	}
  1245→
  1246→	chat := bt.renderAIChat(chatHeight)
  1247→	s.WriteString(chat)
  1248→
  1249→	// AI input line
  1250→	aiInput := bt.renderAIInputLine()
  1251→	s.WriteString(aiInput)

  1253→	return s.String()

  1255→
  1256→// renderAgentSelector renders the AI agent selector
  1257→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderAgentSelector() string {
  1258→	var selectedAgent *AIAgent
  1259→	for _, agent := range bt.availableAgents {
  1260→		if agent.Command == bt.selectedAgent {
  1261→			selectedAgent = &agent
  1262→			break
  1263→		}
  1264→	}
  1265→
  1266→	if selectedAgent == nil {
  1267→		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1268→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#ef4444")).
  1269→			Width(bt.aiPanelWidth).
  1270→			Render("No agent selected")
  1271→	}
  1272→
  1273→	status := "❌ Unavailable"
  1274→	if selectedAgent.Available {
  1275→		status = "✅ Available"
  1276→	}
  1277→
  1278→	return lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1279→		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
  1280→		BorderForeground(selectedAgent.Color).
  1281→		Padding(0, 1).
  1282→		Width(bt.aiPanelWidth - 2).
  1283→		Render(fmt.Sprintf("%s %s\n%s\n%s",
  1284→			selectedAgent.Icon, selectedAgent.Name,
  1285→			selectedAgent.Description, status))
  1286→}
  1287→
  1288→// renderAIChat renders the AI chat history
  1289→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderAIChat(height int) string {
  1290→	var s strings.Builder
  1291→
  1292→	// Chat separator
  1293→	separator := strings.Repeat("─", bt.aiPanelWidth)
  1294→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#64748b")).Render(separator) + "\n")
  1295→
  1296→	if len(bt.aiHistory) == 0 {
  1297→		// No chat history
  1298→		placeholder := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1299→			Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8")).
  1300→			Align(lipgloss.Center).
  1301→			Width(bt.aiPanelWidth).
  1302→			Height(height - 2).
  1303→			Render("No conversation yet.\nType a message below to start.")
  1304→		s.WriteString(placeholder)
  1305→	} else {
  1306→		// Show recent messages
  1307→		startIdx := len(bt.aiHistory) - height + 2
  1308→		if startIdx < 0 {
  1309→			startIdx = 0
  1310→		}
  1311→
  1312→		for i := startIdx; i < len(bt.aiHistory) && i < startIdx+height-2; i++ {
  1313→			msg := bt.aiHistory[i]
  1314→
  1315→			var style lipgloss.Style
  1316→			var prefix string
  1317→
  1318→			if msg.Role == "user" {
  1319→				style = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4"))
  1320→				prefix = "👤 You: "
  1321→			} else {
  1322→				style = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#10b981"))
  1323→				prefix = "🤖 AI: "
  1324→			}
  1325→
  1326→			// Wrap message content
  1327→			maxWidth := bt.aiPanelWidth - len(prefix) - 2
  1328→			if maxWidth < 20 {
  1329→				maxWidth = 20
  1330→			}
  1331→			wrappedLines := bt.wrapText(msg.Content, maxWidth)
  1332→
  1333→			for j, line := range wrappedLines {
  1334→				if j == 0 {
  1335→					s.WriteString(style.Render(prefix+line) + "\n")
  1336→				} else {
  1337→					s.WriteString(style.Render(strings.Repeat(" ", len(prefix))+line) + "\n")
  1338→				}
  1339→			}
  1340→		}
  1341→	}
  1342→
  1343→	return s.String()
  1344→}
  1345→
  1346→// renderAIInputLine renders the AI input line
  1347→func (bt *BashTerminalModel) renderAIInputLine() string {
  1348→	var s strings.Builder
  1349→
  1350→	// Separator
  1351→	separator := strings.Repeat("─", bt.aiPanelWidth)
  1352→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#64748b")).Render(separator) + "\n")
  1353→
  1354→	// Input prompt
  1355→	promptStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1356→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6")).
  1357→		Bold(true)
  1358→
  1359→	inputStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1360→		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0"))

  1362→	// Add cursor

  1366→	} else {
  1367→		displayInput += "█"
  1368→	}
  1369→
  1370→	s.WriteString(promptStyle.Render("AI> ") + inputStyle.Render(displayInput))
  1371→
  1372→	return s.String()
  1373→}

file.content:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
	"runtime"
	"sort"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
)

// SystemMonitorModel implements the system monitoring functionality as a modular component
type SystemMonitorModel struct {
	// Component state
	active bool
	width  int
	height int

	// System data
	processes   []Process
	systemStats SystemStats
	connections []NetworkConnection
	interfaces  []NetworkInterface
	alerts      []SystemAlert

	// Alert management
	alertManager *AlertManager

	// Historical data management
	historyManager *HistoryManager

	// UI state
	selectedRow       int
	sortColumn        string
	sortReverse       bool
	searchMode        bool
	searchQuery       string
	filteredProcs     []Process
	scrollOffset      int
	alertScrollOffset int

	// Dialog state
	showKillDialog bool
	killPID        int

	// Visual effects (maintaining cyberpunk aesthetic)
	frame          int
	pulsePhase     float64
	glowIntensity  float64
	orbs           []orb
	lightRays      []lightRay
	matrixRain     []matrixDrop
	energyField    []energyNode
	cpuHistory     [][]float64
	memHistory     []float64
	bandwidthIn    []float64
	bandwidthOut   []float64
	networkTraffic []float64
}

// Visual effect types (from original code)
type orb struct {
	x, y        float64
	vx, vy      float64
	radius      float64
	intensity   float64
	color       lipgloss.Color
	pulsePeriod float64
	pulseOffset float64
}

type lightRay struct {
	x, y      float64
	angle     float64
	length    float64
	intensity float64
	color     lipgloss.Color
}

type matrixDrop struct {
	x, y      float64
	speed     float64
	length    int
	chars     []rune
	intensity float64
}

type energyNode struct {
	x, y        float64
	connections []int // indices of connected nodes
	pulsePhase  float64
	energy      float64
}

1. **Initial Context**: The conversation began with system information showing this is a Go project on the feature/multitui-20250831 branch. The user had a Go-based terminal multitool application that wasn't working properly.

3. **My Initial Approach**: I created a systematic todo list and began debugging by examining the code structure and testing compilation. I successfully built the application with `go build -o bin/app .` and created test harnesses to verify component initialization.

4. **Key Discovery**: The application actually builds and runs successfully, but has functional gaps in specific components, particularly the settings menu and AI assistant.

5. **User Feedback**: The user provided critical specific feedback: "the settings menu isnt finished and the ai agent tab is completply wrong" - this gave me the exact direction needed to focus my efforts.

7. **Agent Auto Command**: The user ran `/agent:auto "make sure everything is done as best as it can"` to coordinate a comprehensive fix using specialized agents.

8. **Technical Analysis**: I conducted detailed analysis identifying:
   - Settings page has multiple TODO items and incomplete implementations

package main

import (
	"bufio"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"math"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
	"github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss"
)

// BashTerminalModel implements a bash terminal interface with AI assistant integration
type BashTerminalModel struct {
	// Component state
	active bool
	width  int
	height int

	// Terminal state
	currentDir    string
	prompt        string
	input         string
	cursorPos     int
	history       []string
	historyPos    int
	output        []OutputLine
	scrollOffset  int
	maxOutputSize int

	// Command execution
	runningCmd  *exec.Cmd
	cmdOutput   chan string
	cmdDone     chan bool
	isExecuting bool

	// AI Assistant panel state
	showAIPanel     bool
	aiPanelWidth    int
	aiInput         string
	aiCursorPos     int
	aiHistory       []AIMessage
	selectedAgent   string
	availableAgents []AIAgent

	// Visual effects
	frame         int
	pulsePhase    float64
	glowIntensity float64
}

// OutputLine represents a line of terminal output with styling
type OutputLine struct {
	Text      string
	Timestamp time.Time
	Type      OutputType
	Color     lipgloss.Color
}

// OutputType represents different types of terminal output
type OutputType int

const (
	OutputCommand OutputType = iota
	OutputResult
	OutputError
	OutputInfo
	OutputAI
)

// AIMessage represents a message in the AI chat
type AIMessage struct {
	Role      string // "user", "assistant", "system"
	Content   string
	Timestamp time.Time
	Agent     string
}

// AIAgent represents an available AI assistant
type AIAgent struct {
	Name        string
	Command     string
	Description string
	Icon        string
	Color       lipgloss.Color
	Available   bool
}

// Terminal command execution messages
type (
	cmdOutputMsg struct {
		output string
	}
	cmdCompleteMsg struct {

    88→	primary   = lipgloss.Color("#6366f1") // Indigo
    89→	secondary = lipgloss.Color("#8b5cf6") // Violet
    90→	accent    = lipgloss.Color("#06b6d4") // Cyan
    91→	success   = lipgloss.Color("#10b981") // Emerald
    92→	warning   = lipgloss.Color("#f59e0b") // Amber
    93→	danger    = lipgloss.Color("#ef4444") // Red
    94→
    95→	// Background and text
    96→	bg        = lipgloss.Color("#0f0f23") // Deep space blue
    97→	bgLight   = lipgloss.Color("#1e1e3f") // Lighter background
    98→	text      = lipgloss.Color("#e2e8f0") // Light gray
    99→	textMuted = lipgloss.Color("#94a3b8") // Muted gray
   100→	textFaint = lipgloss.Color("#64748b") // Faint gray
   101→
   102→	// Special effects
   103→	glow  = lipgloss.Color("#3b82f6") // Blue glow
   104→	pulse = lipgloss.Color("#ec4899") // Pink pulse
   105→)
   106→
   107→var (
   108→	quitKeys   = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("q", "ctrl+c"), key.WithHelp("", "quit"))
   109→	killKeys   = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("k"), key.WithHelp("", "kill process"))
   110→	searchKeys = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("/"), key.WithHelp("", "search"))
   111→	tabKeys    = key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("tab"), key.WithHelp("", "switch view"))
   112→)
   113→
   114→func initialModel() model {
   115→	numCores := runtime.NumCPU()
   116→
   117→	// Initialize theme manager
   118→	themeManager := NewThemeManager()
   119→	themeManager.LoadCurrentTheme()
   120→
   121→	// Initialize view management system
   122→	viewRouter := NewViewRouter()
   123→	settingsPage := NewSettingsPageModel(themeManager)
   124→	aiAssistant := NewAIAssistantModel()
   125→
   126→	// Register components with the view manager
   127→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewSettings, settingsPage)
   128→	viewRouter.GetViewManager().RegisterComponent(ViewAIAssistant, aiAssistant)
   129→
   130→	m := model{
   131→		viewMode:       "overview",
   132→		themeManager:   themeManager,
   133→		viewRouter:     viewRouter,
   134→		settingsPage:   settingsPage,
   135→		aiAssistant:    aiAssistant,
   136→		orbs:           make([]orb, 8),
   137→		lightRays:      make([]lightRay, 12),
   138→		matrixRain:     make([]matrixDrop, 20),
   139→		energyField:    make([]energyNode, 15),
   140→		cpuHistory:     make([][]float64, numCores),
   141→		memHistory:     make([]float64, 60),
   142→		bandwidthIn:    make([]float64, 60),
   143→		bandwidthOut:   make([]float64, 60),
   144→		networkTraffic: make([]float64, 60),
   145→		sortColumn:     "CPU",
   146→		sortReverse:    true,
   147→		selectedRow:    0,
   148→		scrollOffset:   0,
   149→		selectedPanel:  0,
   150→		glowIntensity:  0.5,
   151→		pulsePhase:     0,
   152→	}
   153→
   154→	// Initialize CPU history
   155→	for i := range m.cpuHistory {
   156→		m.cpuHistory[i] = make([]float64, 60)
   157→	}
   158→
   159→	// Initialize elegant floating orbs
   160→	colors := []lipgloss.Color{primary, secondary, accent, success, warning}
   161→	for i := range m.orbs {
   162→		m.orbs[i] = orb{
   163→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   164→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   165→			vx:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.2,
   166→			vy:          (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.15,
   167→			radius:      rand.Float64()*2 + 1,
   168→			intensity:   rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   169→			color:       colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   170→			pulsePeriod: rand.Float64()*4 + 2,
   171→			pulseOffset: rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   172→		}
   173→	}
   174→
   175→	// Initialize light rays
   176→	for i := range m.lightRays {
   177→		m.lightRays[i] = lightRay{
   178→			x:         rand.Float64() * 120,
   179→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   180→			angle:     rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   181→			length:    rand.Float64()*15 + 5,
   182→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.6 + 0.1,
   183→			color:     colors[rand.Intn(len(colors))],
   184→		}
   185→	}
   186→
   187→	// Initialize matrix rain
   188→	chars := []rune("ﾊﾐﾋｰｳｼﾅﾓﾆｻﾜﾂｵﾘｱﾎﾃﾏｹﾒｴｶｷﾑﾕﾗｾﾈｽﾀﾇﾍ0123456789")
   189→	for i := range m.matrixRain {
   190→		m.matrixRain[i] = matrixDrop{
   191→			x:         float64(rand.Intn(120)),
   192→			y:         rand.Float64() * 40,
   193→			speed:     rand.Float64()*0.3 + 0.1,
   194→			length:    rand.Intn(8) + 3,
   195→			chars:     make([]rune, rand.Intn(8)+3),
   196→			intensity: rand.Float64()*0.7 + 0.3,
   197→		}
   198→		for j := range m.matrixRain[i].chars {
   199→			m.matrixRain[i].chars[j] = chars[rand.Intn(len(chars))]
   200→		}
   201→	}
   202→
   203→	// Initialize global colors from theme
   204→	m.updateGlobalColors()
   205→
   206→	// Initialize energy field
   207→	for i := range m.energyField {
   208→		connections := make([]int, 0)
   209→		// Connect to 1-3 random other nodes
   210→		numConnections := rand.Intn(3) + 1
   211→		for j := 0; j < numConnections; j++ {
   212→			target := rand.Intn(len(m.energyField))
   213→			if target != i {
   214→				connections = append(connections, target)
   215→			}
   216→		}
   217→
   218→		m.energyField[i] = energyNode{
   219→			x:           rand.Float64() * 120,
   220→			y:           rand.Float64() * 40,
   221→			connections: connections,
   222→			pulsePhase:  rand.Float64() * 6.28,
   223→			energy:      rand.Float64()*0.8 + 0.2,
   224→		}
   225→	}
   226→
   227→	return m
   228→}
   229→
   230→func (m model) Init() tea.Cmd {
   231→	return tea.Batch(
   232→		tea.EnterAltScreen,
   233→		tick(),
   234→		fetchProcesses(),
   235→		fetchNetworkData(),
   236→		fetchSystemAlerts(),
   237→	)
   238→}
   239→
   240→func tick() tea.Cmd {
   241→	return tea.Tick(time.Millisecond*50, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
   242→		return tickMsg(t)
   243→	})
   244→}
   245→
   246→func fetchProcesses() tea.Cmd {
   247→	return func() tea.Msg {
   248→		processes, stats := getProcessesAndStats()
   249→		return processData{
   250→			processes:   processes,
   251→			systemStats: stats,
   252→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   253→		}
   254→	}
   255→}
   256→
   257→type networkData struct {
   258→	connections []NetworkConnection
   259→	interfaces  []NetworkInterface
   260→	lastUpdate  time.Time
   261→}
   262→
   263→type alertData struct {
   264→	alerts     []SystemAlert
   265→	lastUpdate time.Time
   266→}
   267→
   268→func fetchNetworkData() tea.Cmd {
   269→	return func() tea.Msg {
   270→		connections := getNetworkConnections()
   271→		interfaces := getNetworkInterfaces()
   272→		return networkData{
   273→			connections: connections,
   274→			interfaces:  interfaces,
   275→			lastUpdate:  time.Now(),
   276→		}
   277→	}
   278→}
   279→
   280→func fetchSystemAlerts() tea.Cmd {
   281→	return func() tea.Msg {
   282→		alerts := getSystemAlerts()
   283→		return alertData{
   284→			alerts:     alerts,
   285→			lastUpdate: time.Now(),
   286→		}
   287→	}
   288→}
   289→
   290→func (m model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
   291→	switch msg := msg.(type) {
   292→	case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
   293→		m.width = msg.Width
   294→		m.height = msg.Height
   295→
   296→		// Update component sizes
   297→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   298→			m.settingsPage.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   299→		}
   300→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   301→			m.aiAssistant.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
   302→		}
   303→
   304→		return m, nil
   305→
   306→	case tea.KeyMsg:
   307→		if m.showKillDialog {
   308→			switch msg.String() {
   309→			case "y", "Y":
   310→				killProcess(m.killPID)
   311→				m.showKillDialog = false
   312→				return m, fetchProcesses()
   313→			case "n", "N", "esc":
   314→				m.showKillDialog = false
   315→				return m, nil
   316→			}
   317→			return m, nil
   318→		}
   319→
   320→		if m.searchMode {
   321→			switch msg.String() {
   322→			case "esc":
   323→				m.searchMode = false
   324→				m.searchQuery = ""
   325→				m.filteredProcs = m.processes
   326→				return m, nil
   327→			case "enter":
   328→				m.searchMode = false
   329→				return m, nil
   330→			case "backspace":
   331→				if len(m.searchQuery) > 0 {
   332→					m.searchQuery = m.searchQuery[:len(m.searchQuery)-1]
   333→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   334→				}
   335→				return m, nil
   336→			default:
   337→				if len(msg.String()) == 1 {
   338→					m.searchQuery += msg.String()
   339→					m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   340→				}
   341→				return m, nil
   342→			}
   343→		}
   344→
   345→		switch {
   346→		case key.Matches(msg, quitKeys):
   347→			m.quitting = true
   348→			return m, tea.Quit
   349→
   350→		case key.Matches(msg, tabKeys):
   351→			modes := []string{"overview", "processes", "network", "alerts", "settings", "ai"}
   352→			currentIndex := 0
   353→			for i, mode := range modes {
   354→				if mode == m.viewMode {
   355→					currentIndex = i
   356→					break
   357→				}
   358→			}
   359→			newMode := modes[(currentIndex+1)%len(modes)]
   360→			m.viewMode = newMode
   361→
   362→			// Handle component activation/deactivation
   363→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   364→			if newMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil {
   365→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   366→			} else if newMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil {
   367→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   368→			}
   369→
   370→			m.selectedRow = 0
   371→			m.scrollOffset = 0
   372→			return m, nil
   373→
   374→		case msg.String() == "1":
   375→			m.viewMode = "overview"
   376→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   377→			return m, nil
   378→		case msg.String() == "2":
   379→			m.viewMode = "processes"
   380→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   381→			return m, nil
   382→		case msg.String() == "3":
   383→			m.viewMode = "network"
   384→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   385→			return m, nil
   386→		case msg.String() == "4":
   387→			m.viewMode = "alerts"
   388→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   389→			return m, nil
   390→		case msg.String() == "5":
   391→			m.viewMode = "settings"
   392→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   393→			if m.settingsPage != nil {
   394→				m.settingsPage.SetActive(true)
   395→			}
   396→			return m, nil
   397→		case msg.String() == "6":
   398→			m.viewMode = "ai"
   399→			m.deactivateAllComponents()
   400→			if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   401→				m.aiAssistant.SetActive(true)
   402→			}
   403→			return m, nil
   404→		case msg.String() == "!":
   405→			m.viewMode = "bash"
   406→			return m, nil
   407→		case msg.String() == "t":
   408→			// Cycle through themes
   409→			return m.cycleTheme()
   410→
   411→		case key.Matches(msg, killKeys):
   412→			if m.viewMode == "processes" && len(m.filteredProcs) > 0 && m.selectedRow < len(m.filteredProcs) {
   413→				m.killPID = m.filteredProcs[m.selectedRow].PID
   414→				m.showKillDialog = true
   415→			}
   416→			return m, nil
   417→
   418→		case key.Matches(msg, searchKeys):
   419→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   420→				m.searchMode = true
   421→				m.searchQuery = ""
   422→			}
   423→			return m, nil
   424→
   425→		case msg.String() == "up", msg.String() == "k":
   426→			if m.selectedRow > 0 {
   427→				m.selectedRow--
   428→				if m.selectedRow < m.scrollOffset {
   429→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow
   430→				}
   431→			}
   432→			return m, nil
   433→
   434→		case msg.String() == "down", msg.String() == "j":
   435→			maxItems := 0
   436→			switch m.viewMode {
   437→			case "processes":
   438→				maxItems = len(m.filteredProcs)
   439→			case "network":
   440→				maxItems = len(m.connections)
   441→			case "alerts":
   442→				maxItems = len(m.alerts)
   443→			}
   444→
   445→			if m.selectedRow < maxItems-1 {
   446→				m.selectedRow++
   447→				visibleRows := m.height - 15
   448→				if m.selectedRow >= m.scrollOffset+visibleRows {
   449→					m.scrollOffset = m.selectedRow - visibleRows + 1
   450→				}
   451→			}
   452→			return m, nil
   453→
   454→		case msg.String() == "c":
   455→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   456→				m.sortColumn = "CPU"
   457→				m.sortProcesses()
   458→			}
   459→			return m, nil
   460→
   461→		case msg.String() == "m":
   462→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   463→				m.sortColumn = "Memory"
   464→				m.sortProcesses()
   465→			}
   466→			return m, nil
   467→
   468→		case msg.String() == "p":
   469→			if m.viewMode == "processes" {
   470→				m.sortColumn = "PID"
   471→				m.sortProcesses()
   472→			}
   473→			return m, nil
   474→		}
   475→
   476→		// Route messages to active components
   477→		if m.viewMode == "settings" && m.settingsPage != nil && m.settingsPage.IsActive() {
   478→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.settingsPage.Update(msg)
   479→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   480→				m.settingsPage = updatedComponent.(*SettingsPageModel)
   481→			}
   482→			if cmd != nil {
   483→				return m, cmd
   484→			}
   485→		}
   486→
   487→		if m.viewMode == "ai" && m.aiAssistant != nil && m.aiAssistant.IsActive() {
   488→			updatedComponent, cmd := m.aiAssistant.Update(msg)
   489→			if updatedComponent != nil {
   490→				m.aiAssistant = updatedComponent.(*AIAssistantModel)
   491→			}
   492→			if cmd != nil {
   493→				return m, cmd
   494→			}
   495→		}
   496→
   497→		return m, nil
   498→
   499→	case tickMsg:
   500→		m.frame++
   501→		m.pulsePhase += 0.05
   502→		m.glowIntensity = 0.3 + 0.2*math.Sin(m.pulsePhase)
   503→
   504→		// Update elegant orbs
   505→		for i := range m.orbs {
   506→			orb := &m.orbs[i]
   507→			orb.x += orb.vx
   508→			orb.y += orb.vy
   509→
   510→			// Gentle bouncing with smooth curves
   511→			if orb.x <= 0 || orb.x >= 120 {
   512→				orb.vx *= -0.8
   513→				orb.x = math.Max(0, math.Min(120, orb.x))
   514→			}
   515→			if orb.y <= 0 || orb.y >= 40 {
   516→				orb.vy *= -0.8
   517→				orb.y = math.Max(0, math.Min(40, orb.y))
   518→			}
   519→
   520→			// Update pulse
   521→			orb.intensity = 0.3 + 0.5*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.02*orb.pulsePeriod+orb.pulseOffset)
   522→		}
   523→
   524→		// Update light rays
   525→		for i := range m.lightRays {
   526→			ray := &m.lightRays[i]
   527→			ray.angle += 0.01
   528→			ray.intensity = 0.2 + 0.4*math.Sin(float64(m.frame)*0.03+float64(i))
   529→		}
   530→
   531→		// Update matrix rain
   532→		for i := range m.matrixRain {
   533→			drop := &m.matrixRain[i]
   534→			drop.y += drop.speed
   535→			if drop.y > 40 {
   536→				drop.y = -float64(drop.length)
   537→				drop.x = float64(rand.Intn(120))
   538→			}
   539→		}
   540→
   541→		// Update energy field
   542→		for i := range m.energyField {
   543→			node := &m.energyField[i]
   544→			node.pulsePhase += 0.02
   545→			node.energy = 0.4 + 0.4*math.Sin(node.pulsePhase)
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		// Fetch new data periodically
   549→		var cmds []tea.Cmd
   550→		if m.frame%40 == 0 { // 2 seconds
   551→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchProcesses())
   552→		}
   553→		if m.frame%50 == 0 { // 2.5 seconds
   554→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchNetworkData())
   555→		}
   556→		if m.frame%80 == 0 { // 4 seconds
   557→			cmds = append(cmds, fetchSystemAlerts())
   558→		}
   559→
   560→		cmds = append(cmds, tick())
   561→		return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
   562→
   563→	case processData:
   564→		m.processes = msg.processes
   565→		m.systemStats = msg.systemStats
   566→
   567→		// Update histories smoothly
   568→		for i, usage := range msg.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   569→			if i < len(m.cpuHistory) {
   570→				m.cpuHistory[i] = append(m.cpuHistory[i][1:], usage)
   571→			}
   572→		}
   573→
   574→		memUsagePercent := float64(msg.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(msg.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   575→		m.memHistory = append(m.memHistory[1:], memUsagePercent)
   576→
   577→		m.sortProcesses()
   578→		m.filteredProcs = filterProcesses(m.processes, m.searchQuery)
   579→
   580→		if m.selectedRow >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
   581→			m.selectedRow = max(0, len(m.filteredProcs)-1)
   582→		}
   583→
   584→		return m, nil
   585→
   586→	case networkData:
   587→		m.connections = msg.connections
   588→		m.interfaces = msg.interfaces
   589→
   590→		// Update network traffic history
   591→		totalTraffic := 0.0
   592→		for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
   593→			totalTraffic += float64(iface.BytesIn+iface.BytesOut) / 1024 / 1024 // MB
   594→		}
   595→		m.networkTraffic = append(m.networkTraffic[1:], totalTraffic)
   596→
   597→		return m, nil
   598→
   599→	case alertData:
   600→		m.alerts = msg.alerts
   601→		return m, nil
   602→
   603→	case errMsg:
   604→		m.err = msg
   605→		return m, nil
   606→	}
   607→
   608→	return m, nil
   609→}
   610→
   611→func (m model) View() string {
   612→	if m.quitting {
   613→		return lipgloss.NewStyle().
   614→			Foreground(primary).
   615→			Align(lipgloss.Center).
   616→			Render("Disconnecting from the matrix...\n")
   617→	}
   618→
   619→	if m.width == 0 || m.height == 0 {
   620→		return "Initializing elegant interface..."
   621→	}
   622→
   623→	// Create main layout
   624→	header := m.renderHeader()
   625→	tabs := m.renderViewTabs()
   626→	content := m.renderContent()
   627→	controls := m.renderControls()
   628→
   629→	// Add subtle background effects
   630→	bg := m.renderBackgroundEffects()
   631→
   632→	layout := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   633→		header,
   634→		tabs,
   635→		content,
   636→		controls,
   637→	)
   638→
   639→	// Overlay background effects
   640→	return m.overlayEffects(layout, bg)
   641→}
   642→
   643→func (m model) renderHeader() string {
   644→	title := "⟨ QUANTUM COMMAND CENTER ⟩"
   645→
   646→	titleStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   647→		Foreground(primary).
   648→		Bold(true).
   649→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   650→		Width(m.width)
   651→
   652→	// Add subtle glow effect
   653→	glowStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   654→		Foreground(glow).
   655→		Faint(true).
   656→		Align(lipgloss.Center).
   657→		Width(m.width)
   658→
   659→	time := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   660→		Foreground(textMuted).
   661→		Align(lipgloss.Right).
   662→		Width(m.width).
   663→		Render(fmt.Sprintf("◉ %s", time.Now().Format("15:04:05")))
   664→
   665→	return lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,
   666→		glowStyle.Render("═══════════════════════════════════════"),
   667→		titleStyle.Render(title),
   668→		glowStyle.Render("═══════════════════════════════════════"),
   669→		time,
   670→		"",
   671→	)
   672→}
   673→
   674→func (m model) renderViewTabs() string {
   675→	tabs := []struct {
   676→		key   string
   677→		name  string
   678→		icon  string
   679→		color lipgloss.Color
   680→	}{
   681→		{"1", "Overview", "⬢", primary},
   682→		{"2", "Processes", "⚡", secondary},
   683→		{"3", "Network", "◈", accent},
   684→		{"4", "Alerts", "⚠", warning},
   685→		{"5", "Settings", "⚙️", danger},
   686→		{"6", "AI Assistant", "🤖", success},
   687→		{"!", "Bash", "⚡", accent},
   688→	}
   689→
   690→	activeIndex := 0
   691→	switch m.viewMode {
   692→	case "overview":
   693→		activeIndex = 0
   694→	case "processes":
   695→		activeIndex = 1
   696→	case "network":
   697→		activeIndex = 2
   698→	case "alerts":
   699→		activeIndex = 3
   700→	case "settings":
   701→		activeIndex = 4
   702→	case "ai":
   703→		activeIndex = 5
   704→	case "bash":
   705→		activeIndex = 6
   706→	}
   707→
   708→	var tabStrs []string
   709→	for i, tab := range tabs {
   710→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s %s", tab.icon, tab.key, tab.name)
   711→
   712→		if i == activeIndex {
   713→			// Active tab with elegant styling
   714→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   715→				Foreground(bg).
   716→				Background(tab.color).
   717→				Bold(true).
   718→				Padding(0, 2).
   719→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   720→				BorderForeground(tab.color).
   721→				Render(content))
   722→		} else {
   723→			// Inactive tab with subtle styling
   724→			tabStrs = append(tabStrs, lipgloss.NewStyle().
   725→				Foreground(tab.color).
   726→				Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
   727→				BorderForeground(textFaint).
   728→				Padding(0, 2).
   729→				Render(content))
   730→		}
   731→	}
   732→
   733→	return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Center, tabStrs...) + "\n"
   734→}
   735→
   736→func (m model) renderContent() string {
   737→	switch m.viewMode {
   738→	case "overview":
   739→		return m.renderOverview()
   740→	case "processes":
   741→		return m.renderProcesses()
   742→	case "network":
   743→		return m.renderNetwork()
   744→	case "alerts":
   745→		return m.renderAlerts()
   746→	case "bash":
   747→		return m.renderBashTerminal()
   748→	case "settings":
   749→		if m.settingsPage != nil {
   750→			return m.settingsPage.View()
   751→		}
   752→		return "Settings not available"
   753→	case "ai":
   754→		if m.aiAssistant != nil {
   755→			return m.aiAssistant.View()
   756→		}
   757→		return "AI Assistant not available"
   758→	default:
   759→		return m.renderOverview()
   760→	}
   761→}

   768→	panelStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().

   779→		BorderForeground(accent).
   780→		Width((m.width / 3) - 2).
   781→		Render(centerPanel)

   791→func (m model) renderSystemPanel() string {
   792→	var s strings.Builder
   793→
   794→	// Title with icon
   795→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   796→		Foreground(primary).
   797→		Bold(true).
   798→		Render("⬢ SYSTEM STATUS")
   799→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   800→
   801→	// CPU information
   802→	if len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage) > 0 {
   803→		avgCPU := 0.0
   804→		for _, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   805→			avgCPU += usage
   806→		}
   807→		avgCPU /= float64(len(m.systemStats.CPUUsage))
   808→
   809→		cpuLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("CPU Usage:")
   810→		cpuBar := m.renderElegantBar(avgCPU, 100, 20, success, danger)
   811→		cpuText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%%", avgCPU))
   812→
   813→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s %s\n\n", cpuLabel, cpuBar, cpuText))
   814→
   815→		// CPU cores
   816→		s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render("Cores:\n"))
   817→		for i, usage := range m.systemStats.CPUUsage {
   818→			if i >= 8 {
   819→				break
   820→			} // Limit display
   821→			coreBar := m.renderMiniBar(usage, 100, 12, success, danger)
   822→			s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("C%d %s %.1f%%\n", i, coreBar, usage))
   823→		}
   824→		s.WriteString("\n")
   825→	}
   826→
   827→	// Memory information
   828→	if m.systemStats.MemTotal > 0 {
   829→		memUsage := float64(m.systemStats.MemUsed) / float64(m.systemStats.MemTotal) * 100
   830→
   831→		memLabel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Memory Usage:")
   832→		memBar := m.renderElegantBar(memUsage, 100, 20, success, danger)
   833→		memText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(fmt.Sprintf("%.1f%% (%s/%s)",
   834→			memUsage, formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemUsed), formatBytes(m.systemStats.MemTotal)))
   835→
   836→		s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n%s\n\n", memLabel, memBar, memText))
   837→	}
   838→
   839→	// Load average
   840→	loadText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Load Average:")
   841→	loadValues := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(
   842→		fmt.Sprintf("%.2f %.2f %.2f", m.systemStats.LoadAvg[0], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[1], m.systemStats.LoadAvg[2]))
   843→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s\n\n", loadText, loadValues))
   844→
   845→	// Uptime
   846→	uptimeText := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Uptime:")
   847→	uptimeValue := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(formatDuration(m.systemStats.Uptime))
   848→	s.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s\n%s", uptimeText, uptimeValue))
   849→
   850→	return s.String()
   851→}

   853→func (m model) renderNetworkPanel() string {
   854→	var s strings.Builder
   855→
   856→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   857→		Foreground(accent).
   858→		Bold(true).
   859→		Render("◈ NETWORK STATUS")
   860→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   861→
   862→	// Network interfaces
   863→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Interfaces:\n"))
   864→	for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
   865→		if len(iface.Name) == 0 {
   866→			continue
   867→		}
   868→
   869→		ifaceStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   870→			Foreground(textMuted).
   871→			Border(lipgloss.NormalBorder(), false, false, false, true).
   872→			BorderForeground(accent).
   873→			PaddingLeft(1)
   874→
   875→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s\n↑ %s  ↓ %s",
   876→			iface.Name, formatBytes(iface.BytesOut), formatBytes(iface.BytesIn))
   877→
   878→		s.WriteString(ifaceStyle.Render(content) + "\n\n")
   879→	}
   880→
   881→	// Active connections
   882→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Active Connections:\n"))
   883→	connectionCount := min(len(m.connections), 8)
   884→	for i := 0; i < connectionCount; i++ {
   885→		conn := m.connections[i]
   886→
   887→		stateColor := success
   888→		switch conn.State {
   889→		case "ESTABLISHED":
   890→			stateColor = success
   891→		case "LISTEN":
   892→			stateColor = accent
   893→		case "TIME_WAIT":
   894→			stateColor = warning
   895→		default:
   896→			stateColor = textMuted
   897→		}
   898→
   899→		connText := fmt.Sprintf("%-4s %s:%s → %s",
   900→			conn.Protocol, conn.LocalAddr, conn.LocalPort, conn.State)
   901→		if len(connText) > 28 {
   902→			connText = connText[:25] + "..."
   903→		}
   904→
   905→		s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(stateColor).Render(connText) + "\n")
   906→	}
   907→
   908→	// Network activity visualization
   909→	s.WriteString("\n" + lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render("Activity:") + "\n")
   910→	activityViz := m.renderNetworkActivity()
   911→	s.WriteString(activityViz)
   912→
   913→	return s.String()
   914→}

   916→func (m model) renderAlertsPanel() string {
   917→	var s strings.Builder
   918→
   919→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   920→		Foreground(warning).
   921→		Bold(true).
   922→		Render("⚠ SYSTEM ALERTS")
   923→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
   924→
   925→	if len(m.alerts) == 0 {
   926→		noAlerts := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   927→			Foreground(success).
   928→			Render("✓ All systems nominal")
   929→		s.WriteString(noAlerts)
   930→		return s.String()
   931→	}
   932→
   933→	// Show recent alerts with elegant styling
   934→	maxAlerts := min(len(m.alerts), 10)
   935→	for i := 0; i < maxAlerts; i++ {
   936→		alert := m.alerts[i]
   937→
   938→		var levelColor lipgloss.Color
   939→		var icon string
   940→		switch alert.Level {
   941→		case "ERROR":
   942→			levelColor = danger
   943→			icon = "●"
   944→		case "WARN":
   945→			levelColor = warning
   946→			icon = "◐"
   947→		case "INFO":
   948→			levelColor = accent
   949→			icon = "◯"
   950→		default:
   951→			levelColor = textMuted
   952→			icon = "○"
   953→		}
   954→
   955→		timestamp := alert.Timestamp.Format("15:04")
   956→		message := alert.Message
   957→		if len(message) > 30 {
   958→			message = message[:27] + "..."
   959→		}
   960→
   961→		alertStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   962→			Foreground(levelColor).
   963→			Border(lipgloss.NormalBorder(), false, false, false, true).
   964→			BorderForeground(levelColor).
   965→			PaddingLeft(1)
   966→
   967→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s %s\n%s", icon, timestamp, message)
   968→		s.WriteString(alertStyle.Render(content) + "\n\n")
   969→	}
   970→
   971→	return s.String()
   972→}

   974→func (m model) renderProcesses() string {
   975→	var s strings.Builder
   976→
   977→	// Header
   978→	title := fmt.Sprintf("⚡ PROCESS MONITOR (%d processes)", len(m.filteredProcs))
   979→	if m.searchQuery != "" {
   980→		title += fmt.Sprintf(" - Filtered: '%s'", m.searchQuery)
   981→	}
   982→
   983→	headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   984→		Foreground(secondary).
   985→		Bold(true)
   986→	s.WriteString(headerStyle.Render(title) + "\n\n")
   987→
   988→	// Column headers with elegant styling
   989→	headers := []string{"PID", "USER", "CPU%", "MEM%", "STATE", "COMMAND"}
   990→	widths := []int{8, 12, 8, 8, 8, m.width - 50}
   991→
   992→	var headerParts []string
   993→	for i, header := range headers {
   994→		headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
   995→			Foreground(primary).
   996→			Bold(true).
   997→			Width(widths[i]).
   998→			Align(lipgloss.Left)
   999→		headerParts = append(headerParts, headerStyle.Render(header))
  1000→	}
  1001→
  1002→	s.WriteString(strings.Join(headerParts, " ") + "\n")
  1003→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1004→		Foreground(textFaint).
  1005→		Render(strings.Repeat("─", m.width-2)) + "\n\n")
  1006→
  1007→	// Process list
  1008→	visibleRows := m.height - 15
  1009→	startIdx := m.scrollOffset
  1010→	endIdx := min(startIdx+visibleRows, len(m.filteredProcs))
  1011→
  1012→	for i := startIdx; i < endIdx; i++ {
  1013→		if i >= len(m.filteredProcs) {
  1014→			break
  1015→		}
  1016→
  1017→		proc := m.filteredProcs[i]
  1018→		isSelected := i == m.selectedRow
  1019→
  1020→		// Dynamic colors based on values
  1021→		var cpuColor, memColor, stateColor lipgloss.Color
  1022→
  1023→		if proc.CPU > 80 {
  1024→			cpuColor = danger
  1025→		} else if proc.CPU > 40 {
  1026→			cpuColor = warning
  1027→		} else {
  1028→			cpuColor = success
  1029→		}
  1030→
  1031→		if proc.Memory > 10 {
  1032→			memColor = danger
  1033→		} else if proc.Memory > 5 {
  1034→			memColor = warning
  1035→		} else {
  1036→			memColor = success
  1037→		}
  1038→
  1039→		switch proc.State {
  1040→		case "R", "R+":
  1041→			stateColor = success
  1042→		case "S", "S+":
  1043→			stateColor = accent
  1044→		case "T":
  1045→			stateColor = warning
  1046→		case "Z":
  1047→			stateColor = danger
  1048→		default:
  1049→			stateColor = textMuted
  1050→		}
  1051→
  1052→		// Format fields
  1053→		pidText := fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID)
  1054→		userText := proc.User
  1055→		cpuText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.CPU)
  1056→		memText := fmt.Sprintf("%.1f", proc.Memory)
  1057→		stateText := proc.State
  1058→
  1059→		command := proc.Command
  1060→		if len(command) > widths[5] {
  1061→			command = command[:widths[5]-3] + "..."
  1062→		}
  1063→
  1064→		// Create row parts
  1065→		parts := []string{
  1066→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[0]).Render(pidText),
  1067→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[1]).Render(userText),
  1068→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[2]).Foreground(cpuColor).Render(cpuText),
  1069→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[3]).Foreground(memColor).Render(memText),
  1070→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(widths[4]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(stateText),
  1071→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Render(command),
  1072→		}
  1073→
  1074→		row := strings.Join(parts, " ")
  1075→
  1076→		if isSelected {
  1077→			row = lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1078→				Foreground(bg).
  1079→				Background(primary).
  1080→				Bold(true).
  1081→				Width(m.width - 2).
  1082→				Render(" " + row + " ")
  1083→		}
  1084→
  1085→		s.WriteString(row + "\n")
  1086→	}
  1087→
  1088→	return s.String()
  1089→}

  1091→func (m model) renderNetwork() string {
  1092→	var s strings.Builder
  1093→
  1094→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1095→		Foreground(accent).
  1096→		Bold(true).
  1097→		Render("◈ NETWORK MONITOR")

  1099→
  1100→	// Interfaces section

  1102→	for _, iface := range m.interfaces {
  1103→		if len(iface.Name) == 0 {
  1104→			continue
  1105→		}
  1106→
  1107→		ifaceBox := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1108→			Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
  1109→			BorderForeground(accent).
  1110→			Padding(1).
  1111→			Margin(0, 1, 1, 0).
  1112→			Width(30)
  1113→
  1114→		content := fmt.Sprintf("%s\n\n↑ Out: %s\n↓ In:  %s\n📦 Packets: %d/%d",
  1115→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(accent).Bold(true).Render(iface.Name),
  1116→			formatBytes(iface.BytesOut),
  1117→			formatBytes(iface.BytesIn),
  1118→			iface.PacketsOut, iface.PacketsIn)
  1119→
  1120→		s.WriteString(ifaceBox.Render(content) + "\n")
  1121→	}
  1122→
  1123→	// Connections section
  1124→	s.WriteString(lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(text).Bold(true).Render("Active Connections:") + "\n\n")
  1125→
  1126→	// Connection headers
  1127→	connHeaders := []string{"PROTO", "LOCAL", "REMOTE", "STATE", "PROCESS"}
  1128→	connWidths := []int{8, 22, 22, 12, m.width - 70}
  1129→
  1130→	var headerParts []string
  1131→	for i, header := range connHeaders {
  1132→		headerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1133→			Foreground(accent).
  1134→			Bold(true).
  1135→			Width(connWidths[i])

  1137→	}
  1138→
  1139→	s.WriteString(strings.Join(headerParts, " ") + "\n")
  1140→	s.WriteString(strings.Repeat("─", m.width-2) + "\n")
  1141→
  1142→	// Connection list
  1143→	maxConns := min(len(m.connections), m.height-18)
  1144→	for i := 0; i < maxConns; i++ {
  1145→		conn := m.connections[i]
  1146→
  1147→		stateColor := success
  1148→		switch conn.State {
  1149→		case "ESTABLISHED":
  1150→			stateColor = success
  1151→		case "LISTEN":
  1152→			stateColor = accent
  1153→		case "TIME_WAIT":
  1154→			stateColor = warning
  1155→		default:
  1156→			stateColor = textMuted
  1157→		}
  1158→
  1159→		local := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.LocalAddr, conn.LocalPort)
  1160→		remote := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", conn.RemoteAddr, conn.RemotePort)
  1161→
  1162→		if len(local) > connWidths[1] {
  1163→			local = local[:connWidths[1]-3] + "..."
  1164→		}
  1165→		if len(remote) > connWidths[2] {
  1166→			remote = remote[:connWidths[2]-3] + "..."
  1167→		}
  1168→		if len(conn.ProcessName) > connWidths[4] {
  1169→			conn.ProcessName = conn.ProcessName[:connWidths[4]-3] + "..."
  1170→		}
  1171→
  1172→		parts := []string{
  1173→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[0]).Render(conn.Protocol),
  1174→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[1]).Render(local),
  1175→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[2]).Render(remote),
  1176→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(connWidths[3]).Foreground(stateColor).Render(conn.State),
  1177→			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textMuted).Render(conn.ProcessName),
  1178→		}
  1179→
  1180→		s.WriteString(strings.Join(parts, " ") + "\n")
  1181→	}
  1182→
  1183→	return s.String()
  1184→}

  1186→func (m model) renderAlerts() string {
  1187→	var s strings.Builder
  1188→
  1189→	title := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1190→		Foreground(warning).
  1191→		Bold(true).
  1192→		Render("⚠ SYSTEM ALERTS")
  1193→	s.WriteString(title + "\n\n")
  1194→
  1195→	if len(m.alerts) == 0 {

  1199→			Width(m.width).
  1200→			Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
  1201→			BorderForeground(success).

  1203→			Render("✓ No Active Alerts\n\nAll systems are operating normally")
  1204→
  1205→		s.WriteString(noAlerts)

  1207→	}
  1208→
  1209→	// Alert list with elegant cards
  1210→	maxAlerts := min(len(m.alerts), m.height-10)
  1211→	for i := 0; i < maxAlerts; i++ {
  1212→		alert := m.alerts[i]
  1213→
  1214→		var levelColor lipgloss.Color
  1215→		var icon string
  1216→		var severity string
  1217→
  1218→		switch alert.Level {
  1219→		case "ERROR":
  1220→			levelColor = danger
  1221→			icon = "🔴"
  1222→			severity = "CRITICAL"
  1223→		case "WARN":
  1224→			levelColor = warning
  1225→			icon = "🟡"
  1226→			severity = "WARNING"
  1227→		case "INFO":
  1228→			levelColor = accent
  1229→			icon = "🔵"
  1230→			severity = "INFO"
  1231→		default:
  1232→			levelColor = textMuted
  1233→			icon = "⚪"
  1234→			severity = "NOTICE"
  1235→		}
  1236→
  1237→		timestamp := alert.Timestamp.Format("2006-01-02 15:04:05")
  1238→
  1239→		alertCard := lipgloss.NewStyle().
  1240→			Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
  1241→			BorderForeground(levelColor).
  1242→			Padding(1).
  1243→			Margin(0, 0, 1, 0).

  1300→func (m model) renderElegantBar(value, max float64, width int, lowColor, highColor lipgloss.Color) string {
  1301→	if max == 0 {
  1302→		return ""
  1303→	}
  1304→
  1305→	ratio := value / max
  1306→	filled := int(ratio * float64(width))
  1307→	if filled > width {
  1308→		filled = width
  1309→	}
  1310→
  1311→	// Create gradient effect
  1312→	var segments []string
  1313→	for i := 0; i < width; i++ {
  1314→		if i < filled {
  1315→			if ratio > 0.7 {
  1316→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(highColor).Render("█"))
  1317→			} else if ratio > 0.4 {
  1318→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(warning).Render("█"))
  1319→			} else {
  1320→				segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lowColor).Render("█"))
  1321→			}
  1322→		} else {
  1323→			segments = append(segments, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(textFaint).Render("░"))
  1324→		}
  1325→	}
  1326→
  1327→	return strings.Join(segments, "")
  1328→}

  1398→// Utility functions
  1399→func formatBytes(bytes uint64) string {
  1400→	const unit = 1024
  1401→	if bytes < unit {
  1402→		return fmt.Sprintf("%d B", bytes)
  1403→	}
  1404→	div, exp := int64(unit), 0
  1405→	for n := bytes / unit; n >= unit; n /= unit {
  1406→		div *= unit
  1407→		exp++
  1408→	}
  1409→	return fmt.Sprintf("%.1f %cB", float64(bytes)/float64(div), "KMGTPE"[exp])
  1410→}
  1411→
  1412→func formatDuration(d time.Duration) string {
  1413→	days := int(d.Hours()) / 24
  1414→	hours := int(d.Hours()) % 24
  1415→	minutes := int(d.Minutes()) % 60
  1416→
  1417→	if days > 0 {
  1418→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dd %dh %dm", days, hours, minutes)
  1419→	}
  1420→	if hours > 0 {
  1421→		return fmt.Sprintf("%dh %dm", hours, minutes)
  1422→	}
  1423→	return fmt.Sprintf("%dm", minutes)
  1424→}

  1430→// Process management functions
  1431→func (m *model) sortProcesses() {
  1432→	if len(m.processes) == 0 {
  1433→		return
  1434→	}
  1435→
  1436→	sort.Slice(m.processes, func(i, j int) bool {
  1437→		var less bool
  1438→		switch m.sortColumn {
  1439→		case "CPU":
  1440→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1441→		case "Memory":
  1442→			less = m.processes[i].Memory < m.processes[j].Memory
  1443→		case "PID":
  1444→			less = m.processes[i].PID < m.processes[j].PID
  1445→		default:
  1446→			less = m.processes[i].CPU < m.processes[j].CPU
  1447→		}
  1448→		if m.sortReverse {
  1449→			less = !less
  1450→		}
  1451→		return less
  1452→	})
  1453→}

  1455→func filterProcesses(processes []Process, query string) []Process {
  1456→	if query == "" {
  1457→		return processes
  1458→	}
  1459→
  1460→	query = strings.ToLower(query)
  1461→	var filtered []Process
  1462→
  1463→	for _, proc := range processes {
  1464→		if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Name), query) ||
  1465→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.Command), query) ||
  1466→			strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(proc.User), query) ||
  1467→			strings.Contains(fmt.Sprintf("%d", proc.PID), query) {
  1468→			filtered = append(filtered, proc)
  1469→		}
  1470→	}
  1471→
  1472→	return filtered
  1473→}

  1479→// Data fetching functions (enhanced implementations)
  1480→func getProcessesAndStats() ([]Process, SystemStats) {
  1481→	var processes []Process
  1482→	stats := SystemStats{
  1483→		CPUCores: runtime.NumCPU(),
  1484→		CPUUsage: make([]float64, runtime.NumCPU()),
  1485→	}
  1486→
  1487→	// Get CPU usage per core
  1488→	for i := 0; i < runtime.NumCPU(); i++ {
  1489→		stats.CPUUsage[i] = rand.Float64() * 100
  1490→	}
  1491→
  1492→	// Simulate memory stats
  1493→	stats.MemTotal = 8 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 8GB
  1494→	stats.MemUsed = uint64(rand.Float64() * float64(stats.MemTotal) * 0.8)
  1495→	stats.LoadAvg = [3]float64{rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2, rand.Float64() * 2}
  1496→	stats.Uptime = time.Hour * 24 * time.Duration(rand.Intn(30))
  1497→
  1498→	// Get process list via ps
  1499→	cmd := exec.Command("ps", "axo", "pid,user,pcpu,pmem,state,ppid,etime,command")
  1500→	output, err := cmd.Output()
  1501→	if err != nil {
  1502→		return processes, stats
  1503→	}
  1504→
  1505→	lines := strings.Split(string(output), "\n")
  1506→	for i, line := range lines {
  1507→		if i == 0 || line == "" {
  1508→			continue
  1509→		}
  1510→
  1511→		fields := strings.Fields(line)
  1512→		if len(fields) < 8 {
  1513→			continue
  1514→		}
  1515→
  1516→		pid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[0])
  1517→		cpu, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[2], 64)
  1518→		mem, _ := strconv.ParseFloat(fields[3], 64)
  1519→		ppid, _ := strconv.Atoi(fields[5])
  1520→
  1521→		command := strings.Join(fields[7:], " ")
  1522→		name := fields[7]
  1523→		if strings.Contains(name, "/") {
  1524→			parts := strings.Split(name, "/")
  1525→			name = parts[len(parts)-1]
  1526→		}
  1527→
  1528→		processes = append(processes, Process{
  1529→			PID:       pid,
  1530→			Name:      name,
  1531→			User:      fields[1],
  1532→			CPU:       cpu,
  1533→			Memory:    mem,
  1534→			State:     fields[4],
  1535→			PPID:      ppid,
  1536→			StartTime: fields[6],
  1537→			Command:   command,
  1538→		})
  1539→	}
  1540→
  1541→	return processes, stats
  1542→}

  1680→// cycleTheme cycles through available themes
  1681→func (m model) cycleTheme() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
  1682→	themes := m.themeManager.GetThemeNames()
  1683→	currentTheme := m.themeManager.GetCurrentTheme().Name
  1684→
  1685→	// Find current theme index
  1686→	currentIndex := 0
  1687→	for i, theme := range themes {
  1688→		if theme == currentTheme {
  1689→			currentIndex = i
  1690→			break
  1691→		}
  1692→	}
  1693→
  1694→	// Get next theme
  1695→	nextIndex := (currentIndex + 1) % len(themes)
  1696→	nextTheme := themes[nextIndex]
  1697→
  1698→	// Apply the theme
  1699→	m.themeManager.ApplyTheme(nextTheme)
  1700→
  1701→	// Update global colors
  1702→	m.updateGlobalColors()
  1703→
  1704→	return m, nil
  1705→}
